authors_text: Hao Ren,Xiaojun Liang,Chunhua Yang,Zhiwen Chen,Weihua Gui
title: Spatial-temporal associations representation and application for process monitoring using graph convolution neural network
title_zh: 图卷积神经网络的时空关联表示及其在过程监控中的应用
abstract: Thank you very much for the attention and concern of colleagues and scholars in this work. With the comments and guidance of experts, editors, and reviewers, this work has been accepted for publishing in the journal "Process Safety and Environmental Protection". The theme of this paper relies on the Spatial-temporal associations of numerous variables in the same industrial processes, which refers to numerous variables obtained in dynamic industrial processes with Spatial-temporal correlation characteristics, i.e., these variables are not only highly correlated in time but also interrelated in space. To handle this problem, three key issues need to be well addressed: variable characteristics modeling and representation, graph network construction (temporal information), and graph characteristics perception. The first issue is implemented by assuming the data follows one improved Gaussian distribution, while the graph network can be defined by the monitoring variables and their edges which are calculated by their characteristics in time. Finally, these networks corresponding to process states at different times are fed into a graph convolutional neural network to implement graph classification to achieve process monitoring. A benchmark experiment (Tennessee Eastman chemical process) and one application study (cobalt purification from zinc solution) are employed to demonstrate the feasibility and applicability of this paper.

abstract_zh: 非常感谢各位同行和学者对本工作的关注和关心。在专家、编辑、审稿人的意见和指导下，该工作已在《过程安全与环境保护》杂志上接受发表。本文的主题依赖于同一产业过程中众多变量的时空关联性，是指在动态的产业过程中获得的众多变量具有时空相关性特征，即这些变量不仅在时间上高度相关，而且在空间上也相互关联。要解决这个问题，需要很好地解决三个关键问题：变量特征建模与表示、图网络构建（时间信息）和图特征感知。第一个问题是通过假设数据遵循改进的高斯分布来实现的，而图网络可以由监控变量及其随时间特征计算出的边来定义。最后，将这些对应不同时刻的过程状态的网络输入到图卷积神经网络中，实现图分类，从而实现过程监控。通过一项基准实验（田纳西伊士曼化学工艺）和一项应用研究（从锌溶液中纯化钴）来证明本文的可行性和适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积神经网络（GCN）的工业过程监控方法，通过建模变量的时空关联性实现过程状态分类。
AI.motivation: 工业过程中变量存在复杂的时空相关性，传统方法难以同时捕捉时空特征，需开发新型建模技术提升监控效果。
AI.method: 假设数据服从改进高斯分布建模变量特征，基于时间特性构建图网络，利用GCN对不同时刻的图网络进行分类以实现过程监控。
AI.result: 在Tennessee Eastman化工过程基准测试和钴萃取应用案例中验证了方法的可行性与适用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效表征工业过程的时空关联性，为复杂过程监控提供新思路，实验验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Dimitris Stripelis,Umang Gupta,Hamza Saleem,Nikhil Dhinagar,Tanmay Ghai,Rafael Chrysovalantis Anastasiou,Armaghan Asghar,Greg Ver Steeg,Srivatsan Ravi,Muhammad Naveed,Paul M. Thompson,Jose Luis Ambite
title: Secure & Private Federated Neuroimaging
title_zh: 安全且私密的联合神经影像
comment: 18 pages, 13 figures, 2 tables
comments: 18 pages, 13 figures, 2 tables
abstract: The amount of biomedical data continues to grow rapidly. However, collecting data from multiple sites for joint analysis remains challenging due to security, privacy, and regulatory concerns. To overcome this challenge, we use Federated Learning, which enables distributed training of neural network models over multiple data sources without sharing data. Each site trains the neural network over its private data for some time, then shares the neural network parameters (i.e., weights, gradients) with a Federation Controller, which in turn aggregates the local models, sends the resulting community model back to each site, and the process repeats. Our Federated Learning architecture, MetisFL, provides strong security and privacy. First, sample data never leaves a site. Second, neural network parameters are encrypted before transmission and the global neural model is computed under fully-homomorphic encryption. Finally, we use information-theoretic methods to limit information leakage from the neural model to prevent a curious site from performing model inversion or membership attacks. We present a thorough evaluation of the performance of secure, private federated learning in neuroimaging tasks, including for predicting Alzheimer's disease and estimating BrainAGE from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) studies, in challenging, heterogeneous federated environments where sites have different amounts of data and statistical distributions.
summary: The amount of biomedical data continues to grow rapidly. However, collecting data from multiple sites for joint analysis remains challenging due to security, privacy, and regulatory concerns. To overcome this challenge, we use Federated Learning, which enables distributed training of neural network models over multiple data sources without sharing data. Each site trains the neural network over its private data for some time, then shares the neural network parameters (i.e., weights, gradients) with a Federation Controller, which in turn aggregates the local models, sends the resulting community model back to each site, and the process repeats. Our Federated Learning architecture, MetisFL, provides strong security and privacy. First, sample data never leaves a site. Second, neural network parameters are encrypted before transmission and the global neural model is computed under fully-homomorphic encryption. Finally, we use information-theoretic methods to limit information leakage from the neural model to prevent a curious site from performing model inversion or membership attacks. We present a thorough evaluation of the performance of secure, private federated learning in neuroimaging tasks, including for predicting Alzheimer's disease and estimating BrainAGE from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) studies, in challenging, heterogeneous federated environments where sites have different amounts of data and statistical distributions.
abstract_zh: 生物医学数据量持续快速增长。然而，出于安全、隐私和监管方面的考虑，从多个站点收集数据进行联合分析仍然具有挑战性。为了克服这一挑战，我们使用联邦学习，它可以在多个数据源上进行神经网络模型的分布式训练，而无需共享数据。每个站点都会在其私有数据上训练神经网络一段时间，然后与联邦控制器共享神经网络参数（即权重、梯度），联邦控制器又聚合本地模型，将生成的社区模型发送回每个站点，然后重复该过程。我们的联合学习架构 MetisFL 提供强大的安全性和隐私性。首先，样本数据永远不会离开站点。其次，神经网络参数在传输前进行加密，并在全同态加密下计算全局神经模型。最后，我们使用信息论方法来限制神经模型的信息泄漏，以防止好奇的站点执行模型反转或成员攻击。我们对神经影像任务中安全、私密的联邦学习的性能进行了全面评估，包括在具有不同数量的数据和统计分布的站点具有不同数量的数据和统计分布的具有挑战性的异构联邦环境中预测阿尔茨海默病和通过磁共振成像 (MRI) 研究估计 BrainAGE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种安全且私密的联邦学习框架MetisFL，用于神经影像任务，确保数据在多方协作训练中不被泄露。
AI.motivation: 生物医学数据增长迅速，但多站点联合分析面临数据安全、隐私及法规限制，传统方法需共享数据存在风险。
AI.method: MetisFL通过数据本地训练、参数加密传输、全同态加密全局模型及信息论方法防止模型逆向攻击，保障隐私。
AI.result: 在阿尔茨海默病预测和BrainAGE估计任务中，MetisFL在异构联邦环境中实现了安全有效的模型训练与评估。
AI.conclusion: MetisFL为神经影像领域的联邦学习提供了强安全性和隐私保护方案，推动跨机构协作研究。

authors_text: Shuhan Qi,Shuhao Zhang,Xiaohan Hou,Jiajia Zhang,Xuan Wang,Jing Xiao
title: Efficient Distributed Framework for Collaborative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 协作多智能体强化学习的高效分布式框架
comment: 9 pages, 20 figures
comments: 9 pages, 20 figures
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning for incomplete information environments has attracted extensive attention from researchers. However, due to the slow sample collection and poor sample exploration, there are still some problems in multi-agent reinforcement learning, such as unstable model iteration and low training efficiency. Moreover, most of the existing distributed framework are proposed for single-agent reinforcement learning and not suitable for multi-agent. In this paper, we design an distributed MARL framework based on the actor-work-learner architecture. In this framework, multiple asynchronous environment interaction modules can be deployed simultaneously, which greatly improves the sample collection speed and sample diversity. Meanwhile, to make full use of computing resources, we decouple the model iteration from environment interaction, and thus accelerate the policy iteration. Finally, we verified the effectiveness of propose framework in MaCA military simulation environment and the SMAC 3D realtime strategy gaming environment with imcomplete information characteristics.
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning for incomplete information environments has attracted extensive attention from researchers. However, due to the slow sample collection and poor sample exploration, there are still some problems in multi-agent reinforcement learning, such as unstable model iteration and low training efficiency. Moreover, most of the existing distributed framework are proposed for single-agent reinforcement learning and not suitable for multi-agent. In this paper, we design an distributed MARL framework based on the actor-work-learner architecture. In this framework, multiple asynchronous environment interaction modules can be deployed simultaneously, which greatly improves the sample collection speed and sample diversity. Meanwhile, to make full use of computing resources, we decouple the model iteration from environment interaction, and thus accelerate the policy iteration. Finally, we verified the effectiveness of propose framework in MaCA military simulation environment and the SMAC 3D realtime strategy gaming environment with imcomplete information characteristics.
abstract_zh: 针对不完全信息环境的多智能体强化学习引起了研究者的广泛关注。然而，由于样本采集速度慢、样本探索性差，多智能体强化学习仍然存在模型迭代不稳定、训练效率低等问题。此外，大多数现有的分布式框架都是针对单智能体强化学习提出的，并不适合多智能体。在本文中，我们设计了一个基于参与者-工作-学习器架构的分布式 MARL 框架。在该框架中，可以同时部署多个异步环境交互模块，大大提高了样本采集速度和样本多样性。同时，为了充分利用计算资源，我们将模型迭代与环境交互解耦，从而加速策略迭代。最后，我们在具有不完全信息特征的MaCA军事仿真环境和SMAC 3D实时策略博弈环境中验证了该框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于actor-worker-learner架构的分布式多智能体强化学习框架，以解决样本收集效率低、模型迭代不稳定等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式框架多针对单智能体，难以应对多智能体强化学习中的样本收集缓慢、探索效率低及训练不稳定等挑战。
AI.method: 通过部署多个异步环境交互模块提升样本多样性与采集速度，并解耦模型迭代与环境交互以加速策略更新。
AI.result: 在MaCA军事模拟和SMAC 3D实时策略游戏环境中验证了框架的有效性，证明其能提升训练效率与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了多智能体强化学习的分布式训练难题，适用于不完全信息场景下的协作任务。

search_text: Efficient Distributed Framework for Collaborative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 协作多智能体强化学习的高效分布式框架 Multi-agent reinforcement learning for incomplete information environments has attracted extensive attention from researchers. However, due to the slow sample collection and poor sample exploration, there are still some problems in multi-agent reinforcement learning, such as unstable model iteration and low training efficiency. Moreover, most of the existing distributed framework are proposed for single-agent reinforcement learning and not suitable for multi-agent. In this paper, we design an distributed MARL framework based on the actor-work-learner architecture. In this framework, multiple asynchronous environment interaction modules can be deployed simultaneously, which greatly improves the sample collection speed and sample diversity. Meanwhile, to make full use of computing resources, we decouple the model iteration from environment interaction, and thus accelerate the policy iteration. Finally, we verified the effectiveness of propose framework in MaCA military simulation environment and the SMAC 3D realtime strategy gaming environment with imcomplete information characteristics. 针对不完全信息环境的多智能体强化学习引起了研究者的广泛关注。然而，由于样本采集速度慢、样本探索性差，多智能体强化学习仍然存在模型迭代不稳定、训练效率低等问题。此外，大多数现有的分布式框架都是针对单智能体强化学习提出的，并不适合多智能体。在本文中，我们设计了一个基于参与者-工作-学习器架构的分布式 MARL 框架。在该框架中，可以同时部署多个异步环境交互模块，大大提高了样本采集速度和样本多样性。同时，为了充分利用计算资源，我们将模型迭代与环境交互解耦，从而加速策略迭代。最后，我们在具有不完全信息特征的MaCA军事仿真环境和SMAC 3D实时策略博弈环境中验证了该框架的有效性。 本文设计了一个基于actor-worker-learner架构的分布式多智能体强化学习框架，以解决样本收集效率低、模型迭代不稳定等问题。 Shuhan Qi,Shuhao Zhang,Xiaohan Hou,Jiajia Zhang,Xuan Wang,Jing Xiao cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

title: Salient Object Detection via Bounding-box Supervision
title_zh: 通过边界框监督进行显着目标检测
comment: 5 pages,4 figures,submitted to ICIP 2022
comments: 5 pages,4 figures,submitted to ICIP 2022
abstract: The success of fully supervised saliency detection models depends on a large number of pixel-wise labeling. In this paper, we work on bounding-box based weakly-supervised saliency detection to relieve the labeling effort. Given the bounding box annotation, we observe that pixels inside the bounding box may contain extensive labeling noise. However, as a large amount of background is excluded, the foreground bounding box region contains a less complex background, making it possible to perform handcrafted features-based saliency detection with only the cropped foreground region. As the conventional handcrafted features are not representative enough, leading to noisy saliency maps, we further introduce structure-aware self-supervised loss to regularize the structure of the prediction. Further, we claim that pixels outside the bounding box should be background, thus partial cross-entropy loss function can be used to accurately localize the accurate background region. Experimental results on six benchmark RGB saliency datasets illustrate the effectiveness of our model.
summary: The success of fully supervised saliency detection models depends on a large number of pixel-wise labeling. In this paper, we work on bounding-box based weakly-supervised saliency detection to relieve the labeling effort. Given the bounding box annotation, we observe that pixels inside the bounding box may contain extensive labeling noise. However, as a large amount of background is excluded, the foreground bounding box region contains a less complex background, making it possible to perform handcrafted features-based saliency detection with only the cropped foreground region. As the conventional handcrafted features are not representative enough, leading to noisy saliency maps, we further introduce structure-aware self-supervised loss to regularize the structure of the prediction. Further, we claim that pixels outside the bounding box should be background, thus partial cross-entropy loss function can be used to accurately localize the accurate background region. Experimental results on six benchmark RGB saliency datasets illustrate the effectiveness of our model.
abstract_zh: 完全监督的显着性检测模型的成功取决于大量的像素级标记。在本文中，我们致力于基于边界框的弱监督显着性检测，以减轻标记工作。给定边界框注释，我们观察到边界框内的像素可能包含大量标签噪声。然而，由于大量背景被排除，前景边界框区域包含不太复杂的背景，使得仅使用裁剪的前景区域来执行基于手工特征的显着性检测成为可能。由于传统的手工特征不够代表性，导致显着性图存在噪声，因此我们进一步引入结构感知的自监督损失来规范预测的结构。此外，我们声称边界框之外的像素应该是背景，因此可以使用部分交叉熵损失函数来准确定位准确的背景区域。六个基准 RGB 显着性数据集的实验结果说明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边界框监督的弱监督显著性检测方法，减少对大量像素级标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 全监督显著性检测需要大量像素标注，成本高昂。边界框标注可降低标注难度，但需解决内部噪声和背景分离问题。
AI.method: 利用边界框区域手工特征进行检测，引入结构感知自监督损失优化预测结构，并采用部分交叉熵损失定位背景区域。
AI.result: 在六个基准RGB显著性数据集上验证了模型有效性，显著性检测性能优于现有弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 边界框监督结合结构正则化能有效实现弱监督显著性检测，为减少标注依赖提供新思路。

title: Developing cooperative policies for multi-stage reinforcement learning tasks
title_zh: 制定多阶段强化学习任务的合作策略
comment: This paper supersedes the rejected paper "Developing cooperative policies for multi-stage tasks". arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.00203
comments: This paper supersedes the rejected paper "Developing cooperative policies for multi-stage tasks". arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.00203
abstract: Many hierarchical reinforcement learning algorithms utilise a series of independent skills as a basis to solve tasks at a higher level of reasoning. These algorithms don't consider the value of using skills that are cooperative instead of independent. This paper proposes the Cooperative Consecutive Policies (CCP) method of enabling consecutive agents to cooperatively solve long time horizon multi-stage tasks. This method is achieved by modifying the policy of each agent to maximise both the current and next agent's critic. Cooperatively maximising critics allows each agent to take actions that are beneficial for its task as well as subsequent tasks. Using this method in a multi-room maze domain and a peg in hole manipulation domain, the cooperative policies were able to outperform a set of naive policies, a single agent trained across the entire domain, as well as another sequential HRL algorithm.
summary: Many hierarchical reinforcement learning algorithms utilise a series of independent skills as a basis to solve tasks at a higher level of reasoning. These algorithms don't consider the value of using skills that are cooperative instead of independent. This paper proposes the Cooperative Consecutive Policies (CCP) method of enabling consecutive agents to cooperatively solve long time horizon multi-stage tasks. This method is achieved by modifying the policy of each agent to maximise both the current and next agent's critic. Cooperatively maximising critics allows each agent to take actions that are beneficial for its task as well as subsequent tasks. Using this method in a multi-room maze domain and a peg in hole manipulation domain, the cooperative policies were able to outperform a set of naive policies, a single agent trained across the entire domain, as well as another sequential HRL algorithm.
abstract_zh: 许多分层强化学习算法利用一系列独立的技能作为基础来解决更高层次推理的任务。这些算法没有考虑使用合作技能而不是独立技能的价值。本文提出了协作连续策略（CCP）方法，使连续代理能够协作解决长时间范围的多阶段任务。该方法是通过修改每个代理的策略以最大化当前和下一个代理的批评者来实现的。合作最大化批评者允许每个智能体采取对其任务以及后续任务有利的行动。在多房间迷宫域和洞操纵域中使用这种方法，协作策略能够优于一组朴素策略、跨整个域训练的单个代理以及另一种顺序 HRL 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CCP的方法，通过让多个智能体在多阶段任务中合作，以提升分层强化学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分层强化学习算法通常依赖独立技能，忽视了智能体间协作可能带来的更高效率，尤其是在长期多阶段任务中。
AI.method: 通过修改每个智能体的策略，使其同时最大化当前和下一智能体的评论家值，从而实现跨阶段的协作决策。
AI.result: 在多房间迷宫和机械操作任务中，CCP方法优于独立策略、单一智能体和传统分层强化学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 协作策略能有效提升多阶段任务的解决能力，证明了跨阶段智能体协作的重要性。

title: Hierarchical Constrained Stochastic Shortest Path Planning via Cost Budget Allocation
title_zh: 通过成本预算分配的分层约束随机最短路径规划
abstract: Stochastic sequential decision making often requires hierarchical structure in the problem where each high-level action should be further planned with primitive states and actions. In addition, many real-world applications require a plan that satisfies constraints on the secondary costs such as risk measure or fuel consumption. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical constrained stochastic shortest path problem (HC-SSP) that meets those two crucial requirements in a single framework. Although HC-SSP provides a useful framework to model such planning requirements in many real-world applications, the resulting problem has high complexity and makes it difficult to find an optimal solution fast which prevents user from applying it to real-time and risk-sensitive applications. To address this problem, we present an algorithm that iteratively allocates cost budget to lower level planning problems based on branch-and-bound scheme to find a feasible solution fast and incrementally update the incumbent solution. We demonstrate the proposed algorithm in an evacuation scenario and prove the advantage over a state-of-the-art mathematical programming based approach.

In addition, many real-world applications require a plan that satisfies constraints on the secondary costs such as risk measure or fuel consumption. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical constrained stochastic shortest path problem (HC-SSP) that meets those two crucial requirements in a single framework. Although HC-SSP provides a useful framework to model such planning requirements in many real-world applications, the resulting problem has high complexity and makes it difficult to find an optimal solution fast which prevents user from applying it to real-time and risk-sensitive applications. To address this problem, we present an algorithm that iteratively allocates cost budget to lower level planning problems based on branch-and-bound scheme to find a feasible solution fast and incrementally update the incumbent solution. We demonstrate the proposed algorithm in an evacuation scenario and prove the advantage over a state-of-the-art mathematical programming based approach.
abstract_zh: 随机顺序决策通常需要问题的层次结构，其中每个高级操作都应使用原始状态和操作进一步规划。此外，许多现实世界的应用需要一个满足二次成本约束的计划，例如风险度量或燃料消耗。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层约束随机最短路径问题（HC-SSP），它在单个框架中满足这两个关键要求。尽管 HC-SSP 提供了一个有用的框架来对许多实际应用中的此类规划需求进行建模，但由此产生的问题具有很高的复杂性，并且很难快速找到最佳解决方案，从而阻止用户将其应用于实时和风险敏感的应用程序。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于分支定界方案迭代地将成本预算分配给较低级别​​规划问题的算法，以快速找到可行的解决方案并增量更新现有解决方案。我们在疏散场景中演示了所提出的算法，并证明了其相对于最先进的基于数学编程的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层约束随机最短路径规划框架（HC-SSP），结合分层决策结构与次级成本约束，并设计基于成本预算分配的高效求解算法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理分层决策结构与多约束条件，且复杂性高导致无法满足实时应用需求。
AI.method: 基于分支定界框架设计迭代算法，通过动态分配成本预算至低层规划子问题，快速生成可行解并逐步优化。
AI.result: 在疏散场景实验中验证算法有效性，证明其相较数学规划方法在求解效率与约束满足度上具有优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效解决了HC-SSP的高复杂性问题，为实时风险敏感场景提供了可行的分层约束规划方案。

search_text: Hierarchical Constrained Stochastic Shortest Path Planning via Cost Budget Allocation 通过成本预算分配的分层约束随机最短路径规划 Stochastic sequential decision making often requires hierarchical structure in the problem where each high-level action should be further planned with primitive states and actions. In addition, many real-world applications require a plan that satisfies constraints on the secondary costs such as risk measure or fuel consumption. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical constrained stochastic shortest path problem (HC-SSP) that meets those two crucial requirements in a single framework. Although HC-SSP provides a useful framework to model such planning requirements in many real-world applications, the resulting problem has high complexity and makes it difficult to find an optimal solution fast which prevents user from applying it to real-time and risk-sensitive applications. To address this problem, we present an algorithm that iteratively allocates cost budget to lower level planning problems based on branch-and-bound scheme to find a feasible solution fast and incrementally update the incumbent solution. We demonstrate the proposed algorithm in an evacuation scenario and prove the advantage over a state-of-the-art mathematical programming based approach. 随机顺序决策通常需要问题的层次结构，其中每个高级操作都应使用原始状态和操作进一步规划。此外，许多现实世界的应用需要一个满足二次成本约束的计划，例如风险度量或燃料消耗。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层约束随机最短路径问题（HC-SSP），它在单个框架中满足这两个关键要求。尽管 HC-SSP 提供了一个有用的框架来对许多实际应用中的此类规划需求进行建模，但由此产生的问题具有很高的复杂性，并且很难快速找到最佳解决方案，从而阻止用户将其应用于实时和风险敏感的应用程序。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于分支定界方案迭代地将成本预算分配给较低级别​​规划问题的算法，以快速找到可行的解决方案并增量更新现有解决方案。我们在疏散场景中演示了所提出的算法，并证明了其相对于最先进的基于数学编程的方法的优势。 本文提出一种分层约束随机最短路径规划框架（HC-SSP），结合分层决策结构与次级成本约束，并设计基于成本预算分配的高效求解算法。 Sungkweon Hong,Brian C. authors_text: Jiachen Lian,Chunlei Zhang,Gopala Krishna Anumanchipalli,Dong Yu
title: Towards Improved Zero-shot Voice Conversion with Conditional DSVAE
title_zh: 通过条件 DSVAE 实现改进的零样本语音转换
comment: Accepted to 2022 Interspeech. Demo link is here https://jlian2.github.io/Improved-Voice-Conversion-with-Conditional-DSVAE/
comments: Accepted to 2022 Interspeech. Demo link is here https://jlian2.github.io/Improved-Voice-Conversion-with-Conditional-DSVAE/
abstract: Disentangling content and speaking style information is essential for zero-shot non-parallel voice conversion (VC). Our previous study investigated a novel framework with disentangled sequential variational autoencoder (DSVAE) as the backbone for information decomposition. We have demonstrated that simultaneous disentangling content embedding and speaker embedding from one utterance is feasible for zero-shot VC. In this study, we continue the direction by raising one concern about the prior distribution of content branch in the DSVAE baseline. We find the random initialized prior distribution will force the content embedding to reduce the phonetic-structure information during the learning process, which is not a desired property. Here, we seek to achieve a better content embedding with more phonetic information preserved. We propose conditional DSVAE, a new model that enables content bias as a condition to the prior modeling and reshapes the content embedding sampled from the posterior distribution. In our experiment on the VCTK dataset, we demonstrate that content embeddings derived from the conditional DSVAE overcome the randomness and achieve a much better phoneme classification accuracy, a stabilized vocalization and a better zero-shot VC performance compared with the competitive DSVAE baseline.
summary: Disentangling content and speaking style information is essential for zero-shot non-parallel voice conversion (VC). Our previous study investigated a novel framework with disentangled sequential variational autoencoder (DSVAE) as the backbone for information decomposition. We have demonstrated that simultaneous disentangling content embedding and speaker embedding from one utterance is feasible for zero-shot VC. In this study, we continue the direction by raising one concern about the prior distribution of content branch in the DSVAE baseline. We find the random initialized prior distribution will force the content embedding to reduce the phonetic-structure information during the learning process, which is not a desired property. Here, we seek to achieve a better content embedding with more phonetic information preserved. We propose conditional DSVAE, a new model that enables content bias as a condition to the prior modeling and reshapes the content embedding sampled from the posterior distribution. In our experiment on the VCTK dataset, we demonstrate that content embeddings derived from the conditional DSVAE overcome the randomness and achieve a much better phoneme classification accuracy, a stabilized vocalization and a better zero-shot VC performance compared with the competitive DSVAE baseline.
abstract_zh: 解开内容和说话风格信息对于零样本非并行语音转换 (VC) 至关重要。我们之前的研究调查了一种新颖的框架，该框架以解缠序贯变分自动编码器（DSVAE）作为信息分解的支柱。我们已经证明，从一个话语中同时分离内容嵌入和说话人嵌入对于零样本 VC 是可行的。在这项研究中，我们通过提出对 DSVAE 基线中内容分支的先验分布的担忧来继续这一方向。我们发现随机初始化的先验分布将迫使内容嵌入在学习过程中减少语音结构信息，这不是期望的属性。在这里，我们寻求实现更好的内容嵌入，并保留更多的语音信息。我们提出了条件 DSVAE，这是一种新模型，可以将内容偏差作为先验建模的条件，并重塑从后验分布采样的内容嵌入。在 VCTK 数据集上的实验中，我们证明了从条件 DVAE 派生的内容嵌入克服了随机性，与竞争性 DVAE 基线相比，实现了更好的音素分类精度、稳定的发声和更好的零样本 VC 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的条件DSVAE模型，以解决零样本语音转换中内容嵌入的音素结构信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统DSVAE模型中内容分支的随机先验分布会导致音素结构信息在学习过程中被压缩，影响零样本语音转换效果。
AI.method: 通过引入内容偏差作为先验建模的条件，对后验分布采样的内容嵌入进行重塑，构建条件DSVAE模型。
AI.result: 在VCTK数据集实验中，条件DSVAE在音素分类准确率、语音稳定性及零样本语音转换性能上均优于基线DSVAE。
AI.conclusion: 条件DSVAE有效保留了内容嵌入的音素信息，为零样本语音转换提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoqin Zhang,Ziwei Huang,Jingjing Zheng,Shuo Wang,Xianta Jiang
title: DcnnGrasp: Towards Accurate Grasp Pattern Recognition with Adaptive Regularizer Learning
title_zh: DCnnGrasp：通过自适应正则化学习实现准确的抓取模式识别
abstract: The task of grasp pattern recognition aims to derive the applicable grasp types of an object according to the visual information. Current state-of-the-art methods ignore category information of objects which is crucial for grasp pattern recognition. This paper presents a novel dual-branch convolutional neural network (DcnnGrasp) to achieve joint learning of object category classification and grasp pattern recognition. DcnnGrasp takes object category classification as an auxiliary task to improve the effectiveness of grasp pattern recognition. Meanwhile, a new loss function called joint cross-entropy with an adaptive regularizer is derived through maximizing a posterior, which significantly improves the model performance. Besides, based on the new loss function, a training strategy is proposed to maximize the collaborative learning of the two tasks. The experiment was performed on five household objects datasets including the RGB-D Object dataset, Hit-GPRec dataset, Amsterdam library of object images (ALOI), Columbia University Image Library (COIL-100), and MeganePro dataset 1. The experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method can achieve competitive performance on grasp pattern recognition with several state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, our method even outperformed the second-best one by nearly 15% in terms of global accuracy for the case of testing a novel object on the RGB-D Object dataset.
summary: The task of grasp pattern recognition aims to derive the applicable grasp types of an object according to the visual information. Current state-of-the-art methods ignore category information of objects which is crucial for grasp pattern recognition. This paper presents a novel dual-branch convolutional neural network (DcnnGrasp) to achieve joint learning of object category classification and grasp pattern recognition. DcnnGrasp takes object category classification as an auxiliary task to improve the effectiveness of grasp pattern recognition. Meanwhile, a new loss function called joint cross-entropy with an adaptive regularizer is derived through maximizing a posterior, which significantly improves the model performance. Besides, based on the new loss function, a training strategy is proposed to maximize the collaborative learning of the two tasks. The experiment was performed on five household objects datasets including the RGB-D Object dataset, Hit-GPRec dataset, Amsterdam library of object images (ALOI), Columbia University Image Library (COIL-100), and MeganePro dataset 1. The experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method can achieve competitive performance on grasp pattern recognition with several state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, our method even outperformed the second-best one by nearly 15% in terms of global accuracy for the case of testing a novel object on the RGB-D Object dataset.
abstract_zh: 抓取模式识别的任务旨在根据视觉信息导出物体适用的抓取类型。当前最先进的方法忽略了对象的类别信息，这对于抓取模式识别至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的双分支卷积神经网络（DcnnGrasp）来实现对象类别分类和抓取模式识别的联合学习。 DCnnGrasp将物体类别分类作为辅助任务，以提高抓取模式识别的有效性。同时，通过最大化后验推导出带有自适应正则化器的联合交叉熵损失函数，显着提高了模型性能。此外，基于新的损失函数，提出了一种训练策略来最大化两个任务的协作学习。实验在五个家庭物体数据集上进行，包括 RGB-D 物体数据集、Hit-GPRec 数据集、阿姆斯特丹物体图像库 (ALOI)、哥伦比亚大学图像库 (COIL-100) 和 MeganePro 数据集 1。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在抓握模式识别方面可以与几种最先进的方法相媲美。具体来说，在 RGB-D 对象数据集上测试新对象的情况下，我们的方法在全局准确度方面甚至比第二好的方法高出近 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的双分支卷积神经网络DcnnGrasp，用于实现物体类别分类和抓取模式识别的联合学习。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的抓取模式识别方法忽略了物体类别信息，而类别信息对于抓取模式识别至关重要。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的损失函数，称为联合交叉熵与自适应正则化器，并通过最大化后验概率推导出该损失函数，同时提出了一种训练策略以实现两个任务的协同学习。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多个家庭物品数据集上实现了与几种最先进的方法相当的性能，特别是在RGB-D对象数据集上测试新物体时，其全局准确率甚至比第二好的方法高出近15%。
AI.conclusion: DcnnGrasp通过联合学习物体类别分类和抓取模式识别，结合新的损失函数和训练策略，显著提高了抓取模式识别的性能。

search_text: DcnnGrasp: Towards Accurate Grasp Pattern Recognition with Adaptive Regularizer Learning DCnnGrasp：通过自适应正则化学习实现准确的抓取模式识别 The task of grasp pattern recognition aims to derive the applicable grasp types of an object according to the visual information. Current state-of-the-art methods ignore category information of objects which is crucial for grasp pattern recognition. This paper presents a novel dual-branch convolutional neural network (DcnnGrasp) to achieve joint learning of object category classification and grasp pattern recognition. DcnnGrasp takes object category classification as an auxiliary task to improve the effectiveness of grasp pattern recognition. Meanwhile, a new loss function called joint cross-entropy with an adaptive regularizer is derived through maximizing a posterior, which significantly improves the model performance. Besides, based on the new loss function, a training strategy is proposed to maximize the collaborative learning of the two tasks. The experiment was performed on five household objects datasets including the RGB-D Object dataset, Hit-GPRec dataset, Amsterdam library of object images (ALOI), Columbia University Image Library (COIL-100), and MeganePro dataset 1. The experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method can achieve competitive performance on grasp pattern recognition with several state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, our method even outperformed the second-best one by nearly 15% in terms of global accuracy for the case of testing a novel object on the RGB-D Object dataset. 抓取模式识别的任务旨在根据视觉信息导出物体适用的抓取类型。当前最先进的方法忽略了对象的类别信息，这对于抓取模式识别至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的双分支卷积神经网络（DcnnGrasp）来实现对象类别分类和抓取模式识别的联合学习。 DCnnGrasp将物体类别分类作为辅助任务，以提高抓取模式识别的有效性。同时，通过最大化后验推导出带有自适应正则化器的联合交叉熵损失函数，显着提高了模型性能。此外，基于新的损失函数，提出了一种训练策略来最大化两个任务的协作学习。实验在五个家庭物体数据集上进行，包括 RGB-D 物体数据集、Hit-GPRec 数据集、阿姆斯特丹物体图像库 (ALOI)、哥伦比亚大学图像库 (COIL-100) 和 MeganePro 数据集 1。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在抓握模式识别方面可以与几种最先进的方法相媲美。具体来说，在 RGB-D 对象数据集上测试新对象的情况下，我们的方法在全局准确度方面甚至比第二好的方法高出近 15%。 本文提出了一种新的双分支卷积神经网络DcnnGrasp，用于实现物体类别分类和抓取模式识别的联合学习。 Xiaoqin Zhang,Ziwei Huang,Jingjing Zheng,Shuo Wang,Xianta Jiang cs.CV

title: A State-Distribution Matching Approach to Non-Episodic Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 非情景强化学习的状态分布匹配方法
abstract: While reinforcement learning (RL) provides a framework for learning through trial and error, translating RL algorithms into the real world has remained challenging. A major hurdle to real-world application arises from the development of algorithms in an episodic setting where the environment is reset after every trial, in contrast with the continual and non-episodic nature of the real-world encountered by embodied agents such as humans and robots. Prior works have considered an alternating approach where a forward policy learns to solve the task and the backward policy learns to reset the environment, but what initial state distribution should the backward policy reset the agent to? Assuming access to a few demonstrations, we propose a new method, MEDAL, that trains the backward policy to match the state distribution in the provided demonstrations. This keeps the agent close to the task-relevant states, allowing for a mix of easy and difficult starting states for the forward policy. Our experiments show that MEDAL matches or outperforms prior methods on three sparse-reward continuous control tasks from the EARL benchmark, with 40% gains on the hardest task, while making fewer assumptions than prior works.
summary: While reinforcement learning (RL) provides a framework for learning through trial and error, translating RL algorithms into the real world has remained challenging. A major hurdle to real-world application arises from the development of algorithms in an episodic setting where the environment is reset after every trial, in contrast with the continual and non-episodic nature of the real-world encountered by embodied agents such as humans and robots. Prior works have considered an alternating approach where a forward policy learns to solve the task and the backward policy learns to reset the environment, but what initial state distribution should the backward policy reset the agent to? Assuming access to a few demonstrations, we propose a new method, MEDAL, that trains the backward policy to match the state distribution in the provided demonstrations. This keeps the agent close to the task-relevant states, allowing for a mix of easy and difficult starting states for the forward policy. Our experiments show that MEDAL matches or outperforms prior methods on three sparse-reward continuous control tasks from the EARL benchmark, with 40% gains on the hardest task, while making fewer assumptions than prior works.
abstract_zh: 虽然强化学习 (RL) 提供了通过反复试验进行学习的框架，但将 RL 算法转化为现实世界仍然具有挑战性。现实世界应用的一个主要障碍来自于情景环境中算法的开发，其中环境在每次试验后都会重置，这与人类和机器人等实体所遇到的现实世界的连续性和非情景性质形成鲜明对比。先前的工作考虑了一种交替方法，其中前向策略学习解决任务，后向策略学习重置环境，但是后向策略应该将代理重置为什么初始状态分布？假设可以访问一些演示，我们提出了一种新方法 MEDAL，它训练后向策略以匹配所提供演示中的状态分布。这使智能体保持接近任务相关状态，从而允许前向策略混合使用简单和困难的起始状态。我们的实验表明，MEDAL 在 EARL 基准的三个稀疏奖励连续控制任务上匹配或优于先前的方法，在最困难的任务上获得 40% 的增益，同时比先前的工作做出更少的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MEDAL方法，通过匹配演示中的状态分布解决非回合制强化学习中的初始状态分布问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的强化学习任务具有持续性和非回合制特性，而传统算法依赖回合制设置，导致初始状态分布难以确定，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: MEDAL方法利用少量演示数据训练后向策略，使其生成的状态分布与演示数据匹配，从而为前向策略提供多样化且任务相关的初始状态。
AI.result: 在EARL基准的三个稀疏奖励连续控制任务中，MEDAL表现优于现有方法，最难任务提升40%，且假设条件更少。
AI.conclusion: MEDAL通过状态分布匹配有效解决了非回合制强化学习的初始状态问题，为现实场景应用提供了更灵活的算法框架。

A major hurdle to real-world application arises from the development of algorithms in an episodic setting where the environment is reset after every trial, in contrast with the continual and non-episodic nature of the real-world encountered by embodied agents such as humans and robots. Prior works have considered an alternating approach where a forward policy learns to solve the task and the backward policy learns to reset the environment, but what initial state distribution should the backward policy reset the agent to? Assuming access to a few demonstrations, we propose a new method, MEDAL, that trains the backward policy to match the state distribution in the provided demonstrations. This keeps the agent close to the task-relevant states, allowing for a mix of easy and difficult starting states for the forward policy. Our experiments show that MEDAL matches or outperforms prior methods on three sparse-reward continuous control tasks from the EARL benchmark, with 40% gains on the hardest task, while making fewer assumptions than prior works. 虽然强化学习 (RL) 提供了通过反复试验进行学习的框架，但将 RL 算法转化为现实世界仍然具有挑战性。现实世界应用的一个主要障碍来自于情景环境中算法的开发，其中环境在每次试验后都会重置，这与人类和机器人等实体所遇到的现实世界的连续性和非情景性质形成鲜明对比。先前的工作考虑了一种交替方法，其中前向策略学习解决任务，后向策略学习重置环境，但是后向策略应该将代理重置为什么初始状态分布？假设可以访问一些演示，我们提出了一种新方法 MEDAL，它训练后向策略以匹配所提供演示中的状态分布。这使智能体保持接近任务相关状态，从而允许前向策略混合使用简单和困难的起始状态。我们的实验表明，MEDAL 在 EARL 基准的三个稀疏奖励连续控制任务上匹配或优于先前的方法，在最困难的任务上获得 40% 的增益，同时比先前的工作做出更少的假设。 本文提出MEDAL方法，通过匹配演示中的状态分布解决非回合制强化学习中的初始状态分布问题。 Archit Sharma,Rehaan Ahmad,Chelsea Finn cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Son Hoang Dau,Quang Cao,Rinaldo Gagiano,Duy Huynh,Xun Yi,Phuc Lu Le,Quang-Hung Luu,Emanuele Viterbo,Yu-Chih Huang,Jingge Zhu,Mohammad M. Jalalzai,Chen Feng
title: TreePIR: Efficient Private Retrieval of Merkle Proofs via Tree Colorings with Fast Indexing and Zero Storage Overhead
title_zh: TreePIR：通过树着色高效私人检索 Merkle 证明，具有快速索引和零存储开销
comment: 25 pages
comments: 25 pages
abstract: A Batch Private Information Retrieval (batch-PIR) scheme allows a client to retrieve multiple data items from a database without revealing them to the storage server(s). Most existing approaches for batch-PIR are based on batch codes, in particular, probabilistic batch codes (PBC) (Angel et al. S&P'18), which incur large storage overheads. In this work, we show that \textit{zero} storage overhead is achievable for tree-shaped databases. In particular, we develop TreePIR, a novel approach tailored made for private retrieval of the set of nodes along an arbitrary root-to-leaf path in a Merkle tree with no storage redundancy. This type of trees has been widely implemented in many real-world systems such as Amazon DynamoDB, Google's Certificate Transparency, and blockchains. Tree nodes along a root-to-leaf path forms the well-known Merkle proof. TreePIR, which employs a novel tree coloring, outperforms PBC, a fundamental component in state-of-the-art batch-PIR schemes (Angel et al. S&P'18, Mughees-Ren S&P'23, Liu et al. S&P'24), in all metrics, achieving $3\times$ lower total storage and $1.5$-$2\times$ lower computation and communication costs. Most notably, TreePIR has $8$-$160\times$ lower setup time and its polylog-complexity indexing algorithm is $19$-$160\times$ faster than PBC for trees of $2^{10}$-$2^{24}$ leaves.
summary: A Batch Private Information Retrieval (batch-PIR) scheme allows a client to retrieve multiple data items from a database without revealing them to the storage server(s). Most existing approaches for batch-PIR are based on batch codes, in particular, probabilistic batch codes (PBC) (Angel et al. S&P'18), which incur large storage overheads. In this work, we show that \textit{zero} storage overhead is achievable for tree-shaped databases. In particular, we develop TreePIR, a novel approach tailored made for private retrieval of the set of nodes along an arbitrary root-to-leaf path in a Merkle tree with no storage redundancy. This type of trees has been widely implemented in many real-world systems such as Amazon DynamoDB, Google's Certificate Transparency, and blockchains. Tree nodes along a root-to-leaf path forms the well-known Merkle proof. TreePIR, which employs a novel tree coloring, outperforms PBC, a fundamental component in state-of-the-art batch-PIR schemes (Angel et al. S&P'18, Mughees-Ren S&P'23, Liu et al. S&P'24), in all metrics, achieving $3\times$ lower total storage and $1.5$-$2\times$ lower computation and communication costs. Most notably, TreePIR has $8$-$160\times$ lower setup time and its polylog-complexity indexing algorithm is $19$-$160\times$ faster than PBC for trees of $2^{10}$-$2^{24}$ leaves.
abstract_zh: 批量私人信息检索（batch-PIR）方案允许客户端从数据库检索多个数据项，而无需将它们透露给存储服务器。大多数现有的批处理 PIR 方法都基于批处理代码，特别是概率批处理代码 (PBC)（Angel 等人，S&P'18），这会产生大量存储开销。在这项工作中，我们证明树形数据库可以实现 \textit{zero} 存储开销。特别是，我们开发了 TreePIR，这是一种专为私有检索 Merkle 树中任意根到叶路径的节点集而设计的新颖方法，没有存储冗余。这种类型的树已广泛应用于许多现实世界的系统中，例如 Amazon DynamoDB、Google 的证书透明度和区块链。沿着根到叶路径的树节点形成了著名的默克尔证明。 TreePIR 采用了一种新颖的树着色技术，在所有指标中均优于 PBC，PBC 是最先进的批量 PIR 方案的基本组成部分（Angel 等人 S&P'18、Mughees-Ren S&P'23、Liu 等人 S&P'24），总存储成本降低了 3 美元，计算和通信成本降低了 1.5 美元 - 2 倍。最值得注意的是，对于 $2^{10}$-$2^{24}$ 叶子的树，TreePIR 的设置时间缩短了 $8$-$160\times$，其多对数复杂度索引算法比 PBC 快 $19$-$160\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TreePIR，一种通过树着色实现零存储开销的高效私有检索方法，用于从Merkle树中检索根到叶路径的节点集合。
AI.motivation: 现有批量私有信息检索（batch-PIR）方案依赖概率批量编码（PBC），导致存储开销过大，而树形数据库（如区块链、DynamoDB）需要更高效的零冗余解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于树着色的TreePIR方案，利用Merkle树路径特性，结合快速索引算法实现零存储开销的私有检索，避免传统PBC的冗余存储。
AI.result: 相比PBC，TreePIR在存储成本降低3倍，计算与通信成本降低1.5-2倍，设置时间减少8-160倍，索引算法速度提升19-160倍。
AI.conclusion: TreePIR为树形数据库提供了高效、零存储开销的私有检索方案，显著优于现有方法，适用于区块链等实际系统。

method: 设计基于树着色的TreePIR方案，利用Merkle树路径特性，结合快速索引算法实现零存储开销的私有检索，避免传统PBC的冗余存储。
result: 相比PBC，TreePIR在存储成本降低3倍，计算与通信成本降低1.5-2倍，设置时间减少8-160倍，索引算法速度提升19-160倍。
conclusion: TreePIR为树形数据库提供了高效、零存储开销的私有检索方案，显著优于现有方法，适用于区块链等实际系统。
search_text: TreePIR: Efficient Private Retrieval of Merkle Proofs via Tree Colorings with Fast Indexing and Zero Storage Overhead TreePIR：通过树着色高效私人检索 Merkle 证明，具有快速索引和零存储开销 A Batch Private Information Retrieval (batch-PIR) scheme allows a client to retrieve multiple data items from a database without revealing them to the storage server(s). Most existing approaches for batch-PIR are based on batch codes, in particular, probabilistic batch codes (PBC) (Angel et al. S&P'18), which incur large storage overheads. In this work, we show that \textit{zero} storage overhead is achievable for tree-shaped databases. In particular, we develop TreePIR, a novel approach tailored made for private retrieval of the set of nodes along an arbitrary root-to-leaf path in a Merkle tree with no storage redundancy. This type of trees has been widely implemented in many real-world systems such as Amazon DynamoDB, Google's Certificate Transparency, and blockchains. Tree nodes along a root-to-leaf path forms the well-known Merkle proof. TreePIR, which employs a novel tree coloring, outperforms PBC, a fundamental component in state-of-the-art batch-PIR schemes (Angel et al. S&P'18, Mughees-Ren S&P'23, Liu et al. S&P'24), in all metrics, achieving $3\times$ lower total storage and $1.5$-$2\times$ lower computation and communication costs. Most notably, TreePIR has $8$-$160\times$ lower setup time and its polylog-complexity indexing algorithm is $19$-$160\times$ faster than PBC for trees of $2^{10}$-$2^{24}$ leaves. 批量私人信息检索（batch-PIR）方案允许客户端从数据库检索多个数据项，而无需将它们透露给存储服务器。大多数现有的批处理 PIR 方法都基于批处理代码，特别是概率批处理代码 (PBC)（Angel 等人，S&P'18），这会产生大量存储开销。在这项工作中，我们证明树形数据库可以实现 \textit{zero} 存储开销。特别是，我们开发了 TreePIR，这是一种专为私有检索 Merkle 树中任意根到叶路径的节点集而设计的新颖方法，没有存储冗余。这种类型的树已广泛应用于许多现实世界的系统中，例如 Amazon DynamoDB、Google 的证书透明度和区块链。沿着根到叶路径的树节点形成了著名的默克尔证明。 TreePIR 采用了一种新颖的树着色技术，在所有指标中均优于 PBC，PBC 是最先进的批量 PIR 方案的基本组成部分（Angel 等人 S&P'18、Mughees-Ren S&P'23、Liu 等人 S&P'24），总存储成本降低了 3 美元，计算和通信成本降低了 1.5 美元 - 2 倍。最值得注意的是，对于 $2^{10}$-$2^{24}$ 叶子的树，TreePIR 的设置时间缩短了 $8$-$160\times$，其多对数复杂度索引算法比 PBC 快 $19$-$160\times$。 本文提出TreePIR，一种通过树着色实现零存储开销的高效私有检索方法，用于从Merkle树中检索根到叶路径的节点集合。 Son Hoang Dau,Quang Cao,Rinaldo Gagiano,Duy Huynh,Xun Yi,Phuc Lu Le,Quang-Hung Luu,Emanuele Viterbo,Yu-Chih Huang,Jingge Zhu,Mohammad M. Jalalzai,Chen Feng cs.DS,cs.CR,math.CO

title: Best of Both Worlds: Multi-task Audio-Visual Automatic Speech Recognition and Active Speaker Detection
title_zh: 两全其美：多任务视听自动语音识别和活动说话人检测
abstract: Under noisy conditions, automatic speech recognition (ASR) can greatly benefit from the addition of visual signals coming from a video of the speaker's face. However, when multiple candidate speakers are visible this traditionally requires solving a separate problem, namely active speaker detection (ASD), which entails selecting at each moment in time which of the visible faces corresponds to the audio. Recent work has shown that we can solve both problems simultaneously by employing an attention mechanism over the competing video tracks of the speakers' faces, at the cost of sacrificing some accuracy on active speaker detection. This work closes this gap in active speaker detection accuracy by presenting a single model that can be jointly trained with a multi-task loss. By combining the two tasks during training we reduce the ASD classification accuracy by approximately 25%, while simultaneously improving the ASR performance when compared to the multi-person baseline trained exclusively for ASR.
summary: Under noisy conditions, automatic speech recognition (ASR) can greatly benefit from the addition of visual signals coming from a video of the speaker's face. However, when multiple candidate speakers are visible this traditionally requires solving a separate problem, namely active speaker detection (ASD), which entails selecting at each moment in time which of the visible faces corresponds to the audio. Recent work has shown that we can solve both problems simultaneously by employing an attention mechanism over the competing video tracks of the speakers' faces, at the cost of sacrificing some accuracy on active speaker detection. This work closes this gap in active speaker detection accuracy by presenting a single model that can be jointly trained with a multi-task loss. By combining the two tasks during training we reduce the ASD classification accuracy by approximately 25%, while simultaneously improving the ASR performance when compared to the multi-person baseline trained exclusively for ASR.
abstract_zh: 在嘈杂的条件下，自动语音识别 (ASR) 可以极大地受益于来自说话者面部视频的视觉信号的添加。然而，当多个候选说话者可见时，传统上需要解决一个单独的问题，即主动说话者检测（ASD），这需要在每个时刻及时选择哪个可见面孔对应于音频。最近的工作表明，我们可以通过在说话者脸部的竞争视频轨道上采用注意机制来同时解决这两个问题，但代价是牺牲主动说话者检测的一些准确性。这项工作通过提出一个可以与多任务损失联合训练的单一模型，缩小了主动说话者检测准确性方面的差距。通过在训练期间结合这两项任务，我们将 ASD 分类准确率降低了约 25%，同时与专门针对 ASR 训练的多人基线相比，提高了 ASR 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合训练的多任务模型，同时解决多说话人场景下的音频-视觉自动语音识别（ASR）和主动说话人检测（ASD）问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在多说话人场景中需分别处理ASR和ASD任务，或通过注意力机制牺牲ASD精度。现有方案未能兼顾两者性能。
AI.method: 设计单模型架构，通过多任务损失函数联合训练ASR与ASD任务，利用视觉信号增强语音识别并实现说话人检测。
AI.result: ASD分类准确率下降约25%，但相比仅训练ASR的基线模型，多说话人场景下的ASR性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练框架能在无需独立ASD模块的情况下提升ASR性能，为多模态语音任务提供更高效的解决方案。

title: Separator-Transducer-Segmenter: Streaming Recognition and Segmentation of Multi-party Speech
title_zh: Separator-Transducer-Segmenter：多方语音的流式识别和分割
comment: Submitted to InterSpeech 2022
comments: Submitted to InterSpeech 2022
abstract: Streaming recognition and segmentation of multi-party conversations with overlapping speech is crucial for the next generation of voice assistant applications. In this work we address its challenges discovered in the previous work on multi-turn recurrent neural network transducer (MT-RNN-T) with a novel approach, separator-transducer-segmenter (STS), that enables tighter integration of speech separation, recognition and segmentation in a single model. First, we propose a new segmentation modeling strategy through start-of-turn and end-of-turn tokens that improves segmentation without recognition accuracy degradation. Second, we further improve both speech recognition and segmentation accuracy through an emission regularization method, FastEmit, and multi-task training with speech activity information as an additional training signal. Third, we experiment with end-of-turn emission latency penalty to improve end-point detection for each speaker turn. Finally, we establish a novel framework for segmentation analysis of multi-party conversations through emission latency metrics. With our best model, we report 4.6% abs. turn counting accuracy improvement and 17% rel. word error rate (WER) improvement on LibriCSS dataset compared to the previously published work.
summary: Streaming recognition and segmentation of multi-party conversations with overlapping speech is crucial for the next generation of voice assistant applications. In this work we address its challenges discovered in the previous work on multi-turn recurrent neural network transducer (MT-RNN-T) with a novel approach, separator-transducer-segmenter (STS), that enables tighter integration of speech separation, recognition and segmentation in a single model. First, we propose a new segmentation modeling strategy through start-of-turn and end-of-turn tokens that improves segmentation without recognition accuracy degradation. Second, we further improve both speech recognition and segmentation accuracy through an emission regularization method, FastEmit, and multi-task training with speech activity information as an additional training signal. Third, we experiment with end-of-turn emission latency penalty to improve end-point detection for each speaker turn. Finally, we establish a novel framework for segmentation analysis of multi-party conversations through emission latency metrics. With our best model, we report 4.6% abs. turn counting accuracy improvement and 17% rel. word error rate (WER) improvement on LibriCSS dataset compared to the previously published work.
abstract_zh: 具有重叠语音的多方对话的流式识别和分段对于下一代语音助手应用至关重要。在这项工作中，我们使用一种新颖的方法——分离器-换能器-分段器（STS）——解决了之前关于多轮递归神经网络换能器（MT-RNN-T）的工作中发现的挑战，该方法能够在单个模型中更紧密地集成语音分离、识别和分割。首先，我们通过回合开始和回合结束标记提出了一种新的分割建模策略，该策略可以在不降低识别精度的情况下改进分割。其次，我们通过发射正则化方法 FastEmit 以及以语音活动信息作为附加训练信号的多任务训练，进一步提高了语音识别和分割精度。第三，我们尝试使用回合结束发射延迟惩罚来改进每个扬声器回合的端点检测。最后，我们建立了一个新颖的框架，通过发射延迟指标对多方对话进行分段分析。对于我们最好的模型，我们报告 4.6% 的腹肌。匝数计数精度提高 17% rel.与之前发布的工作相比，LibriCSS 数据集的字错误率 (WER) 有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Separator-Transducer-Segmenter（STS）的新方法，用于实现多方对话中重叠语音的流式识别与分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多方对话的流式语音识别与分割任务中存在分离、识别和分割模块集成度不足的问题，导致准确率受限。
AI.method: 通过引入起始/结束回合标记优化分割策略，结合FastEmit正则化方法和语音活动信息的多任务训练，并采用回合结束发射延迟惩罚机制，构建端到端的集成框架。
AI.result: 在LibriCSS数据集上，相比先前工作实现了4.6%的回合计数绝对准确率提升和17%的词错误率相对下降。
AI.conclusion: STS框架通过紧密集成分离、识别和分割功能，有效提升了多方对话场景下的流式语音处理性能。

authors_text: Son T. Ly,Bai Lin,Hung Q. Vo,Dragan Maric,Badri Roysam,Hien V. Nguyen
title: Multiplexed Immunofluorescence Brain Image Analysis Using Self-Supervised Dual-Loss Adaptive Masked Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用自监督双损失自适应屏蔽自动编码器进行多重免疫荧光脑图像分析
comment: Adding new results on multiplexed image data and data efficiency. Pytorch code: https://github.com/hula-ai/DAMA
comments: Adding new results on multiplexed image data and data efficiency. Pytorch code: https://github.com/hula-ai/DAMA
abstract: Reliable large-scale cell detection and segmentation is the fundamental first step to understanding biological processes in the brain. The ability to phenotype cells at scale can accelerate preclinical drug evaluation and system-level brain histology studies. The impressive advances in deep learning offer a practical solution to cell image detection and segmentation. Unfortunately, categorizing cells and delineating their boundaries for training deep networks is an expensive process that requires skilled biologists. This paper presents a novel self-supervised Dual-Loss Adaptive Masked Autoencoder (DAMA) for learning rich features from multiplexed immunofluorescence brain images. DAMA's objective function minimizes the conditional entropy in pixel-level reconstruction and feature-level regression. Unlike existing self-supervised learning methods based on a random image masking strategy, DAMA employs a novel adaptive mask sampling strategy to maximize mutual information and effectively learn brain cell data. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first effort to develop a self-supervised learning method for multiplexed immunofluorescence brain images. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that DAMA features enable superior cell detection, segmentation, and classification performance without requiring many annotations.
summary: Reliable large-scale cell detection and segmentation is the fundamental first step to understanding biological processes in the brain. The ability to phenotype cells at scale can accelerate preclinical drug evaluation and system-level brain histology studies. The impressive advances in deep learning offer a practical solution to cell image detection and segmentation. Unfortunately, categorizing cells and delineating their boundaries for training deep networks is an expensive process that requires skilled biologists. This paper presents a novel self-supervised Dual-Loss Adaptive Masked Autoencoder (DAMA) for learning rich features from multiplexed immunofluorescence brain images. DAMA's objective function minimizes the conditional entropy in pixel-level reconstruction and feature-level regression. Unlike existing self-supervised learning methods based on a random image masking strategy, DAMA employs a novel adaptive mask sampling strategy to maximize mutual information and effectively learn brain cell data. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first effort to develop a self-supervised learning method for multiplexed immunofluorescence brain images. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that DAMA features enable superior cell detection, segmentation, and classification performance without requiring many annotations.
abstract_zh: 可靠的大规模细胞检测和分割是了解大脑生物过程的基本第一步。大规模细胞表型分析的能力可以加速临床前药物评估和系统级脑组织学研究。深度学习的令人印象深刻的进步为细胞图像检测和分割提供了实用的解决方案。不幸的是，对细胞进行分类并划定其边界以训练深度网络是一个昂贵的过程，需要熟练的生物学家。本文提出了一种新型的自监督双损失自适应掩模自动编码器（DAMA），用于从多重免疫荧光脑图像中学习丰富的特征。 DAMA 的目标函数最小化像素级重建和特征级回归中的条件熵。与现有基于随机图像掩模策略的自监督学习方法不同，DAMA 采用新颖的自适应掩模采样策略来最大化互信息并有效地学习脑细胞数据。据我们所知，这是为多重免疫荧光脑图像开发自我监督学习方法的首次努力。我们的大量实验表明，DAMA 功能无需进行大量注释即可实现卓越的细胞检测、分割和分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督双损失自适应掩码自动编码器（DAMA），用于从多路复用免疫荧光脑图像中学习丰富特征，实现无需大量标注的细胞检测与分割。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖昂贵的人工标注来训练细胞图像分割模型，而该研究旨在开发一种无需大量标注即可高效学习脑细胞数据的自监督学习方法。
AI.method: DAMA通过最小化像素级重建和特征级回归的条件熵构建目标函数，并采用自适应掩码采样策略替代传统随机掩码，以最大化互信息并有效学习脑细胞特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，DAMA在无需大量标注的情况下实现了优越的细胞检测、分割和分类性能，优于现有自监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: DAMA是首个针对多路复用免疫荧光脑图像的自监督学习方法，为大规模脑组织研究提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Social Inclusion in Curated Contexts: Insights from Museum Practices
title_zh: 策划环境中的社会包容：来自博物馆实践的见解
comment: in Proceedings of the 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22), June 21-24, 2022, Seoul, Republic of Korea
comments: in Proceedings of the 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '22), June 21-24, 2022, Seoul, Republic of Korea
abstract: Artificial intelligence literature suggests that minority and fragile communities in society can be negatively impacted by machine learning algorithms due to inherent biases in the design process, which lead to socially exclusive decisions and policies. Faced with similar challenges in dealing with an increasingly diversified audience, the museum sector has seen changes in theory and practice, particularly in the areas of representation and meaning-making. While rarity and grandeur used to be at the centre stage of the early museum practices, folk life and museums' relationships with the diverse communities they serve become a widely integrated part of the contemporary practices. These changes address issues of diversity and accessibility in order to offer more socially inclusive services. Drawing on these changes and reflecting back on the AI world, we argue that the museum experience provides useful lessons for building AI with socially inclusive approaches, especially in situations in which both a collection and access to it will need to be curated or filtered, as frequently happens in search engines, recommender systems and digital libraries. We highlight three principles: (1) Instead of upholding the value of neutrality, practitioners are aware of the influences of their own backgrounds and those of others on their work. By not claiming to be neutral but practising cultural humility, the chances of addressing potential biases can be increased. (2) There should be room for situational interpretation beyond the stages of data collection and machine learning. Before applying models and predictions, the contexts in which relevant parties exist should be taken into account. (3) Community participation serves the needs of communities and has the added benefit of bringing practitioners and communities together.

Faced with similar challenges in dealing with an increasingly diversified audience, the museum sector has seen changes in theory and practice, particularly in the areas of representation and meaning-making. While rarity and grandeur used to be at the centre stage of the early museum practices, folk life and museums' relationships with the diverse communities they serve become a widely integrated part of the contemporary practices. These changes address issues of diversity and accessibility in order to offer more socially inclusive services. Drawing on these changes and reflecting back on the AI world, we argue that the museum experience provides useful lessons for building AI with socially inclusive approaches, especially in situations in which both a collection and access to it will need to be curated or filtered, as frequently happens in search engines, recommender systems and digital libraries. We highlight three principles: (1) Instead of upholding the value of neutrality, practitioners are aware of the influences of their own backgrounds and those of others on their work. By not claiming to be neutral but practising cultural humility, the chances of addressing potential biases can be increased. (2) There should be room for situational interpretation beyond the stages of data collection and machine learning. Before applying models and predictions, the contexts in which relevant parties exist should be taken into account. (3) Community participation serves the needs of communities and has the added benefit of bringing practitioners and communities together.
abstract_zh: 人工智能文献表明，由于设计过程中固有的偏见，社会中的少数群体和脆弱社区可能会受到机器学习算法的负面影响，从而导致社会排他性的决策和政策。面对日益多元化的观众的类似挑战，博物馆部门在理论和实践上都发生了变化，特别是在表现和意义创造领域。虽然稀有性和宏伟曾经是早期博物馆实践的中心阶段，但民间生活和博物馆与其所服务的多元化社区的关系已成为当代实践中广泛整合的一部分。这些变化解决了多样性和可及性问题，以便提供更具社会包容性的服务。借鉴这些变化并反思人工智能世界，我们认为博物馆的经验为利用社会包容性方法构建人工智能提供了有用的经验教训，特别是在藏品和访问都需要策划或过滤的情况下，就像搜索引擎、推荐系统和数字图书馆中经常发生的那样。我们强调三个原则：（1）从业者不是坚持中立的价值观，而是意识到自己和他人的背景对他们工作的影响。通过不声称自己是中立的，而是践行文化谦逊，可以增加解决潜在偏见的机会。 (2) 在数据收集和机器学习阶段之外，应该有情境解释的空间。在应用模型和预测之前，应考虑相关各方存在的背景。 (3) 社区参与服务于社区的需求，并具有将从业者和社区聚集在一起的额外好处。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析博物馆实践中的社会包容策略，为人工智能领域提供构建包容性技术的启示，特别是在信息筛选和推荐系统中。
AI.motivation: 人工智能算法存在社会排斥风险，而博物馆在服务多样化受众时已发展出包容性实践，需将这些经验映射到AI领域以解决类似问题。
AI.method: 通过比较博物馆在代表性、意义建构及社区关系方面的实践演变，提炼出适用于AI系统的三项包容性原则。
AI.result: 提出三项原则：承认非中立性、纳入情境解释、推动社区参与，为AI设计提供社会包容性框架。
AI.conclusion: 博物馆实践证明，通过文化谦逊、情境化设计及社区协作，可有效提升AI系统的社会包容性与公平性。

title: On Scale Space Radon Transform, Properties and Application in CT Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 尺度空间Radon变换及其性质及其在CT图像重建中的应用
abstract: Since the Radon transform (RT) consists in a line integral function, some modeling assumptions are made on Computed Tomography (CT) system, making image reconstruction analytical methods, such as Filtered Backprojection (FBP), sensitive to artifacts and noise. In the other hand, recently, a new integral transform, called Scale Space Radon Transform (SSRT), is introduced where, RT is a particular case. Thanks to its interesting properties, such as good scale space behavior, the SSRT has known number of new applications. In this paper, with the aim to improve the reconstructed image quality for these methods, we propose to model the X-ray beam with the Scale Space Radon Transform (SSRT) where, the assumptions done on the physical dimensions of the CT system elements reflect better the reality. After depicting the basic properties and the inversion of SSRT, the FBP algorithm is used to reconstruct the image from the SSRT sinogram where the RT spectrum used in FBP is replaced by SSRT and the Gaussian kernel, expressed in their frequency domain. PSNR and SSIM, as quality measures, are used to compare RT and SSRT-based image reconstruction on Shepp-Logan head and anthropomorphic abdominal phantoms. The first findings show that the SSRT-based method outperforms the methods based on RT, especially, when the number of projections is reduced, making it more appropriate for applications requiring low-dose radiation, such as medical X-ray CT. While SSRT-FBP and RT-FBP have utmost the same runtime, the experiments show that SSRT-FBP is more robust to Poisson-Gaussian noise corrupting CT data.
summary: Since the Radon transform (RT) consists in a line integral function, some modeling assumptions are made on Computed Tomography (CT) system, making image reconstruction analytical methods, such as Filtered Backprojection (FBP), sensitive to artifacts and noise. In the other hand, recently, a new integral transform, called Scale Space Radon Transform (SSRT), is introduced where, RT is a particular case. Thanks to its interesting properties, such as good scale space behavior, the SSRT has known number of new applications. In this paper, with the aim to improve the reconstructed image quality for these methods, we propose to model the X-ray beam with the Scale Space Radon Transform (SSRT) where, the assumptions done on the physical dimensions of the CT system elements reflect better the reality. After depicting the basic properties and the inversion of SSRT, the FBP algorithm is used to reconstruct the image from the SSRT sinogram where the RT spectrum used in FBP is replaced by SSRT and the Gaussian kernel, expressed in their frequency domain. PSNR and SSIM, as quality measures, are used to compare RT and SSRT-based image reconstruction on Shepp-Logan head and anthropomorphic abdominal phantoms. The first findings show that the SSRT-based method outperforms the methods based on RT, especially, when the number of projections is reduced, making it more appropriate for applications requiring low-dose radiation, such as medical X-ray CT. While SSRT-FBP and RT-FBP have utmost the same runtime, the experiments show that SSRT-FBP is more robust to Poisson-Gaussian noise corrupting CT data.
abstract_zh: 由于氡变换（RT）由线积分函数组成，因此对计算机断层扫描（CT）系统进行了一些建模假设，使得滤波反投影（FBP）等图像重建分析方法对伪影和噪声敏感。另一方面，最近引入了一种新的积分变换，称为尺度空间氡变换（SSRT），其中 RT 是一种特殊情况。由于其有趣的特性，例如良好的尺度空间行为，SSRT 拥有许多新的应用。在本文中，为了提高这些方法的重建图像质量，我们建议使用尺度空间氡变换（SSRT）对X射线束进行建模，其中对CT系统元件的物理尺寸所做的假设更好地反映了现实。在描述了 SSRT 的基本属性和反演之后，使用 FBP 算法从 SSRT 正弦图中重建图像，其中 FBP 中使用的 RT 谱被 SSRT 和高斯核取代，并以频域表示。 PSNR 和 SSIM 作为质量测量，用于比较 Shepp-Logan 头部和拟人腹部模型上基于 RT 和 SSRT 的图像重建。第一个研究结果表明，基于 SSRT 的方法优于基于 RT 的方法，特别是当投影数量减少时，使其更适合需要低剂量辐射的应用，例如医用 X 射线 CT。虽然 SSRT-FBP 和 RT-FBP 的运行时间基本相同，但实验表明 SSRT-FBP 对于破坏 CT 数据的泊松高斯噪声更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将尺度空间Radon变换（SSRT）应用于CT图像重建，以提升图像质量并降低辐射剂量。
AI.motivation: 传统Radon变换在CT重建中易受噪声和伪影影响，尤其在投影数量减少时表现不佳，而SSRT具有更好的尺度空间特性，可能改善重建效果。
AI.method: 通过将X射线束建模为SSRT，替代传统Radon变换，结合FBP算法进行图像重建，并使用PSNR和SSIM指标对比SSRT与RT在Shepp-Logan和腹部仿生体上的重建效果。
AI.result: SSRT-FBP在投影数减少时显著优于RT-FBP，尤其在低剂量场景下图像质量更高，且对泊松-高斯噪声更具鲁棒性，运行时间相当。
AI.conclusion: SSRT在图像质量与噪声抑制方面优于传统方法，适用于低剂量CT等对辐射敏感的应用场景。

authors_text: Le Xie,Xiangtian Zheng,Yannan Sun,Tong Huang,Tony Bruton
title: Massively Digitized Power Grid: Opportunities and Challenges of Use-inspired AI
title_zh: 大规模数字化电网：使用启发式人工智能的机遇和挑战
abstract: This article presents a use-inspired perspective of the opportunities and challenges in a massively digitized power grid. It argues that the intricate interplay of data availability, computing capability, and artificial intelligence (AI) algorithm development are the three key factors driving the adoption of digitized solutions in the power grid. The impact of these three factors on critical functions of power system operation and planning practices are reviewed and illustrated with industrial practice case studies. Open challenges and research opportunities for data, computing, and AI algorithms are articulated within the context of the power industry's tremendous decarbonization efforts.
summary: This article presents a use-inspired perspective of the opportunities and challenges in a massively digitized power grid. It argues that the intricate interplay of data availability, computing capability, and artificial intelligence (AI) algorithm development are the three key factors driving the adoption of digitized solutions in the power grid. The impact of these three factors on critical functions of power system operation and planning practices are reviewed and illustrated with industrial practice case studies. Open challenges and research opportunities for data, computing, and AI algorithms are articulated within the context of the power industry's tremendous decarbonization efforts.
abstract_zh: 本文从使用启发的角度阐述了大规模数字化电网中的机遇和挑战。报告认为，数据可用性、计算能力和人工智能（AI）算法开发之间错综复杂的相互作用是推动电网采用数字化解决方案的三个关键因素。通过工业实践案例研究回顾并说明了这三个因素对电力系统运行和规划实践关键功能的影响。数据、计算和人工智能算法的开放挑战和研究机会在电力行业巨大的脱碳努力的背景下得到阐述。

AI.tldr: 本文从应用驱动的角度分析大规模数字化电网中人工智能的机遇与挑战，探讨数据、计算能力和算法对电力系统的影响。
AI.motivation: 电力行业面临脱碳压力，需通过数字化和AI技术提升效率与可靠性，但存在数据、计算和算法等挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析数据可用性、计算能力和AI算法发展三要素，并结合工业案例研究，评估其对电力系统运行与规划的影响。
AI.result: 明确了三要素对电力系统的影响，识别出数据质量、计算资源分配和算法适应性等关键挑战，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 需加强数据、计算与AI算法的协同优化，推动电力系统智能化转型，助力碳中和目标。

title: Robustness of Humans and Machines on Object Recognition with Extreme Image Transformations
title_zh: 人类和机器在极端图像变换对象识别方面的鲁棒性
comment: Accepted at CVPR NeuroVision Workshop
comments: Accepted at CVPR NeuroVision Workshop
abstract: Recent neural network architectures have claimed to explain data from the human visual cortex. Their demonstrated performance is however still limited by the dependence on exploiting low-level features for solving visual tasks. This strategy limits their performance in case of out-of-distribution/adversarial data. Humans, meanwhile learn abstract concepts and are mostly unaffected by even extreme image distortions. Humans and networks employ strikingly different strategies to solve visual tasks. To probe this, we introduce a novel set of image transforms and evaluate humans and networks on an object recognition task. We found performance for a few common networks quickly decreases while humans are able to recognize objects with a high accuracy.
summary: Recent neural network architectures have claimed to explain data from the human visual cortex. Their demonstrated performance is however still limited by the dependence on exploiting low-level features for solving visual tasks. This strategy limits their performance in case of out-of-distribution/adversarial data. Humans, meanwhile learn abstract concepts and are mostly unaffected by even extreme image distortions. Humans and networks employ strikingly different strategies to solve visual tasks. To probe this, we introduce a novel set of image transforms and evaluate humans and networks on an object recognition task. We found performance for a few common networks quickly decreases while humans are able to recognize objects with a high accuracy.
abstract_zh: 最近的神经网络架构声称可以解释来自人类视觉皮层的数据。然而，它们所表现出的性能仍然受到对利用低级特征来解决视觉任务的依赖的限制。这种策略限制了它们在分布外/对抗性数据的情况下的性能。与此同时，人类学习抽象概念，并且几乎不会受到极端图像扭曲的影响。人类和网络采用截然不同的策略来解决视觉任务。为了探讨这一点，我们引入了一组新颖的图像变换，并在对象识别任务上评估人类和网络。我们发现，当人类能够高精度地识别物体时，一些常见网络的性能会迅速下降。

AI.tldr: 比较人类与机器在极端图像变换下的物体识别鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 探索人类与机器在处理极端图像失真时的策略差异，以提升模型鲁棒性
AI.method: 引入新型极端图像变换集，对比测试人类与神经网络在物体识别任务中的表现
AI.result: 常见神经网络在极端变换下性能显著下降，而人类识别准确率保持较高水平
AI.conclusion: 人类通过抽象概念实现鲁棒识别，而网络依赖低级特征，需探索新策略以提升模型鲁棒性

Humans and networks employ strikingly different strategies to solve visual tasks. To probe this, we introduce a novel set of image transforms and evaluate humans and networks on an object recognition task. We found performance for a few common networks quickly decreases while humans are able to recognize objects with a high accuracy. 最近的神经网络架构声称可以解释来自人类视觉皮层的数据。然而，它们所表现出的性能仍然受到对利用低级特征来解决视觉任务的依赖的限制。这种策略限制了它们在分布外/对抗性数据的情况下的性能。与此同时，人类学习抽象概念，并且几乎不会受到极端图像扭曲的影响。人类和网络采用截然不同的策略来解决视觉任务。为了探讨这一点，我们引入了一组新颖的图像变换，并在对象识别任务上评估人类和网络。我们发现，当人类能够高精度地识别物体时，一些常见网络的性能会迅速下降。 比较人类与机器在极端图像变换下的物体识别鲁棒性 Dakarai Crowder,Girik Malik cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Yingjun Tian,Guoxin Fang,Justas Petrulis,Andrew Weightman,Charlie C. L. Wang
title: Soft Robotic Mannequin: Design and Algorithm for Deformation Control
title_zh: 软体机器人模型：变形控制的设计和算法
abstract: This paper presents a novel soft robotic system for a deformable mannequin that can be employed to physically realize the 3D geometry of different human bodies. The soft membrane on a mannequin is deformed by inflating several curved chambers using pneumatic actuation. Controlling the freeform surface of a soft membrane by adjusting the pneumatic actuation in different chambers is challenging as the membrane's shape is commonly determined by the interaction between all chambers. Using vision feedback provided by a structured-light based 3D scanner, we developed an efficient algorithm to compute the optimized actuation of all chambers which could drive the soft membrane to deform into the best approximation of different target shapes. Our algorithm converges quickly by including pose estimation in the loop of optimization. The time-consuming step of evaluating derivatives on the deformable membrane is avoided by using the Broyden update when possible. The effectiveness of our soft robotic mannequin with controlled deformation has been verified in experiments.
summary: This paper presents a novel soft robotic system for a deformable mannequin that can be employed to physically realize the 3D geometry of different human bodies. The soft membrane on a mannequin is deformed by inflating several curved chambers using pneumatic actuation. Controlling the freeform surface of a soft membrane by adjusting the pneumatic actuation in different chambers is challenging as the membrane's shape is commonly determined by the interaction between all chambers. Using vision feedback provided by a structured-light based 3D scanner, we developed an efficient algorithm to compute the optimized actuation of all chambers which could drive the soft membrane to deform into the best approximation of different target shapes. Our algorithm converges quickly by including pose estimation in the loop of optimization. The time-consuming step of evaluating derivatives on the deformable membrane is avoided by using the Broyden update when possible. The effectiveness of our soft robotic mannequin with controlled deformation has been verified in experiments.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于可变形人体模型的新型软机器人系统，可用于物理实现不同人体的 3D 几何形状。人体模型上的软膜通过气动驱动使几个弯曲的腔室充气而变形。通过调整不同室中的气动驱动来控制软膜的自由曲面具有挑战性，因为膜的形状通常由所有室之间的相互作用决定。利用基于结构光的 3D 扫描仪提供的视觉反馈，我们开发了一种有效的算法来计算所有腔室的优化驱动，从而驱动软膜变形为不同目标形状的最佳近似值。我们的算法通过在优化循环中包含姿态估计来快速收敛。如果可能的话，通过使用布罗伊登更新可以避免评估可变形膜上的导数的耗时步骤。我们的受控变形软机器人模型的有效性已在实验中得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型软体机器人系统及变形控制算法，用于物理实现不同人体的3D几何形状。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以精确控制软体膜的复杂自由曲面变形，需开发高效算法优化多腔室气动致动以实现目标形状。
AI.method: 结合结构光3D扫描视觉反馈，开发包含姿态估计的优化算法，利用Broyden更新避免耗时导数计算。
AI.result: 实验验证系统能快速收敛并准确逼近多种目标形状，证明了变形控制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了软体机器人模特在复杂形状变形控制中的潜力，为物理仿真等应用提供新思路。

title: Few-Shot Image Classification Benchmarks are Too Far From Reality: Build Back Better with Semantic Task Sampling
title_zh: 少样本图像分类基准与现实相差太远：通过语义任务采样更好地重建
comment: CVPR 2022 Workshop on Vision Datasets Understanding
comments: CVPR 2022 Workshop on Vision Datasets Understanding
abstract: Every day, a new method is published to tackle Few-Shot Image Classification, showing better and better performances on academic benchmarks. Nevertheless, we observe that these current benchmarks do not accurately represent the real industrial use cases that we encountered. In this work, through both qualitative and quantitative studies, we expose that the widely used benchmark tieredImageNet is strongly biased towards tasks composed of very semantically dissimilar classes e.g. bathtub, cabbage, pizza, schipperke, and cardoon. This makes tieredImageNet (and similar benchmarks) irrelevant to evaluate the ability of a model to solve real-life use cases usually involving more fine-grained classification. We mitigate this bias using semantic information about the classes of tieredImageNet and generate an improved, balanced benchmark. Going further, we also introduce a new benchmark for Few-Shot Image Classification using the Danish Fungi 2020 dataset. This benchmark proposes a wide variety of evaluation tasks with various fine-graininess. Moreover, this benchmark includes many-way tasks (e.g. composed of 100 classes), which is a challenging setting yet very common in industrial applications. Our experiments bring out the correlation between the difficulty of a task and the semantic similarity between its classes, as well as a heavy performance drop of state-of-the-art methods on many-way few-shot classification, raising questions about the scaling abilities of these methods. We hope that our work will encourage the community to further question the quality of standard evaluation processes and their relevance to real-life applications.

abstract_zh: 每天都会发布一种新方法来解决少样本图像分类问题，并在学术基准上显示出越来越好的表现。尽管如此，我们观察到这些当前基准并不能准确代表我们遇到的真实工业用例。在这项工作中，通过定性和定量研究，我们发现广泛使用的基准 tieredImageNet 强烈偏向于由语义非常不同的类组成的任务，例如浴缸、卷心菜、披萨、schipperke 和菜蓟。这使得 tieredImageNet（和类似的基准）与评估模型解决现实生活用例（通常涉及更细粒度的分类）的能力无关。我们使用有关 tieredImageNet 类的语义信息来减轻这种偏差，并生成改进的、平衡的基准。更进一步，我们还使用丹麦真菌 2020 数据集引入了少镜头图像分类的新基准。该基准提出了各种细粒度的评估任务。此外，该基准测试包括多路任务（例如由 100 个类组成），这是一个具有挑战性的设置，但在工业应用中很常见。我们的实验揭示了任务难度与其类别之间的语义相似性之间的相关性，以及最先进方法在多路少样本分类上的性能大幅下降，引发了关于这些方法的扩展能力的问题。我们希望我们的工作能够鼓励社区进一步质疑标准评估流程的质量及其与现实生活应用的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前小样本图像分类基准测试与实际工业应用脱节，并提出基于语义任务采样的改进基准。
AI.motivation: 现有基准如tieredImageNet偏向语义差异大的类别，无法反映实际应用中更细粒度的分类需求，需构建更贴近现实的评估体系。
AI.method: 利用语义信息重构tieredImageNet基准，消除类别偏差；基于丹麦真菌数据集构建包含多粒度任务和多类别挑战的新基准。
AI.result: 实验显示任务难度与语义相似性相关，现有方法在多类别小样本场景下性能显著下降，暴露了模型扩展能力的不足。
AI.conclusion: 应重新审视标准评估流程的合理性，推动建立更符合实际应用需求的小样本分类基准体系。

title: RotorTM: A Flexible Simulator for Aerial Transportation and Manipulation
title_zh: RotorTM：用于空中运输和操纵的灵活模拟器
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO), 2024. Please cite the paper using appropriate formats
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO), 2024. Please cite the paper using appropriate formats
abstract: Low-cost autonomous Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) have the potential to help humans by simplifying and speeding up complex tasks that require their interaction with the environment, such as construction, package delivery, and search and rescue. These systems, composed of single or multiple vehicles, can be endowed with passive connection mechanisms such as rigid links or cables to perform transportation and manipulation tasks. However, they are inherently complex since they are often underactuated and evolve in nonlinear manifold configuration spaces. In addition, the complexity of systems with cable-suspended load is further increased by the hybrid dynamics depending on the cables' varying tension conditions. This paper presents the first aerial transportation and manipulation simulator incorporating different payloads and passive connection mechanisms with full system dynamics, planning, and control algorithms. Furthermore, it includes a novel general model accounting for the transient hybrid dynamics for aerial systems with cable-suspended load to closely mimic real-world systems. The availability of a flexible and intuitive interface further contributes to its usability and versatility. Comparisons between simulations and real-world experiments with different vehicles' configurations show the fidelity of the simulator results with respect to real-world settings. The experiments also show the simulator's benefit for the rapid prototyping and transitioning of aerial transportation and manipulation systems to real-world deployment.

Comparisons between simulations and real-world experiments with different vehicles' configurations show the fidelity of the simulator results with respect to real-world settings. The experiments also show the simulator's benefit for the rapid prototyping and transitioning of aerial transportation and manipulation systems to real-world deployment.
abstract_zh: 低成本自主微型飞行器 (MAV) 有潜力通过简化和加速需要与环境交互的复杂任务来帮助人类，例如建筑、包裹递送以及搜索和救援。这些系统由单个或多个车辆组成，可以配备刚性连接或电缆等被动连接机制来执行运输和操纵任务。然而，它们本质上是复杂的，因为它们经常被欠驱动并且在非线性流形配置空间中演化。此外，根据电缆不同的张力条件，混合动力学进一步增加了具有电缆悬挂负载的系统的复杂性。本文提出了第一个空中运输和操纵模拟器，结合了不同的有效载荷和被动连接机制以及完整的系统动力学、规划和控制算法。此外，它还包括一个新颖的通用模型，用于解释具有电缆悬挂负载的航空系统的瞬态混合动力学，以密切模拟现实世界的系统。灵活直观的界面进一步增强了其可用性和多功能性。不同车辆配置的模拟与现实实验之间的比较表明了模拟器结果相对于现实世界设置的保真度。实验还显示了模拟器对于快速原型设计以及将空中运输和操纵系统过渡到现实世界部署的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RotorTM，一个集成多种负载和被动连接机制的空中运输与操作模拟器，包含完整系统动力学、规划和控制算法。
AI.motivation: 微型飞行器（MAV）在复杂任务中需与环境交互，但其非线性动力学和缆绳负载的混合动力学特性使系统设计与验证困难。
AI.method: 开发包含瞬态混合动力学通用模型的模拟器，结合被动连接机制与全系统动力学模型，并提供直观交互界面。
AI.result: 仿真结果与真实实验对比验证了模拟器的准确性，展示了其在加速空中运输与操作系统原型设计和实际部署中的优势。
AI.conclusion: RotorTM为研究和开发空中运输与操作系统提供了高保真、灵活的仿真平台，有助于推动该领域技术落地。
