search_text: RotorTM: A Flexible Simulator for Aerial Transportation and Manipulation RotorTM：用于空中运输和操纵的灵活模拟器 Low-cost autonomous Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) have the potential to help humans by simplifying and speeding up complex tasks that require their interaction with the environment, such as construction, package delivery, and search and rescue. These systems, composed of single or multiple vehicles, can be endowed with passive connection mechanisms such as rigid links or cables to perform transportation and manipulation tasks. However, they are inherently complex since they are often underactuated and evolve in nonlinear manifold configuration spaces. In addition, the complexity of systems with cable-suspended load is further increased by the hybrid dynamics depending on the cables' varying tension conditions. This paper presents the first aerial transportation and manipulation simulator incorporating different payloads and passive connection mechanisms with full system dynamics, planning, and control algorithms. Furthermore, it includes a novel general model accounting for the transient hybrid dynamics for aerial systems with cable-suspended load to closely mimic real-world systems. The availability of a flexible and intuitive interface further contributes to its usability and versatility. Comparisons between simulations and real-world experiments with different vehicles' configurations show the fidelity of the simulator results with respect to real-world settings. The experiments also show the simulator's benefit for the rapid prototyping and transitioning of aerial transportation and manipulation systems to real-world deployment. 低成本自主微型飞行器 (MAV) 有潜力通过简化和加速需要与环境交互的复杂任务来帮助人类，例如建筑、包裹递送以及搜索和救援。这些系统由单个或多个车辆组成，可以配备刚性连接或电缆等被动连接机制来执行运输和操纵任务。然而，它们本质上是复杂的，因为它们经常被欠驱动并且在非线性流形配置空间中演化。此外，根据电缆不同的张力条件，混合动力学进一步增加了具有电缆悬挂负载的系统的复杂性。本文提出了第一个空中运输和操纵模拟器，结合了不同的有效载荷和被动连接机制以及完整的系统动力学、规划和控制算法。此外，它还包括一个新颖的通用模型，用于解释具有电缆悬挂负载的航空系统的瞬态混合动力学，以密切模拟现实世界的系统。灵活直观的界面进一步增强了其可用性和多功能性。不同车辆配置的模拟与现实实验之间的比较表明了模拟器结果相对于现实世界设置的保真度。实验还显示了模拟器对于快速原型设计以及将空中运输和操纵系统过渡到现实世界部署的好处。 本文提出RotorTM，一个集成多种负载和被动连接机制的空中运输与操作模拟器，包含完整系统动力学、规划和控制算法。 Guanrui Li,Xinyang Liu,Giuseppe Loianno cs.RO

authors_text: Max Schemmer,Patrick Hemmer,Maximilian Nitsche,Niklas Kühl,Michael Vössing
title: A Meta-Analysis of the Utility of Explainable Artificial Intelligence in Human-AI Decision-Making
title_zh: 可解释人工智能在人类人工智能决策中的效用的元分析
comment: AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES'22)
comments: AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society (AIES'22)
abstract: Research in artificial intelligence (AI)-assisted decision-making is experiencing tremendous growth with a constantly rising number of studies evaluating the effect of AI with and without techniques from the field of explainable AI (XAI) on human decision-making performance. However, as tasks and experimental setups vary due to different objectives, some studies report improved user decision-making performance through XAI, while others report only negligible effects. Therefore, in this article, we present an initial synthesis of existing research on XAI studies using a statistical meta-analysis to derive implications across existing research. We observe a statistically positive impact of XAI on users' performance. Additionally, the first results indicate that human-AI decision-making tends to yield better task performance on text data. However, we find no effect of explanations on users' performance compared to sole AI predictions. Our initial synthesis gives rise to future research investigating the underlying causes and contributes to further developing algorithms that effectively benefit human decision-makers by providing meaningful explanations.
summary: Research in artificial intelligence (AI)-assisted decision-making is experiencing tremendous growth with a constantly rising number of studies evaluating the effect of AI with and without techniques from the field of explainable AI (XAI) on human decision-making performance. However, as tasks and experimental setups vary due to different objectives, some studies report improved user decision-making performance through XAI, while others report only negligible effects. Therefore, in this article, we present an initial synthesis of existing research on XAI studies using a statistical meta-analysis to derive implications across existing research. We observe a statistically positive impact of XAI on users' performance. Additionally, the first results indicate that human-AI decision-making tends to yield better task performance on text data. However, we find no effect of explanations on users' performance compared to sole AI predictions. Our initial synthesis gives rise to future research investigating the underlying causes and contributes to further developing algorithms that effectively benefit human decision-makers by providing meaningful explanations.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）辅助决策的研究正在经历巨大的增长，越来越多的研究评估人工智能（有或没有可解释人工智能（XAI）领域的技术）对人类决策绩效的影响。然而，由于任务和实验设置因目标不同而有所不同，一些研究报告通过 XAI 提高了用户决策性能，而其他研究则报告仅产生了可以忽略不计的效果。因此，在本文中，我们使用统计元分析对 XAI 研究的现有研究进行了初步综合，以得出现有研究的影响。我们观察到 XAI 对用户性能产生了统计上的积极影响。此外，第一个结果表明，人类人工智能决策往往会在文本数据上产生更好的任务性能。然而，与单独的人工智能预测相比，我们发现解释对用户的表现没有影响。我们的初步综合促进了未来研究的根本原因，并有助于进一步开发算法，通过提供有意义的解释来有效地造福人类决策者。

AI.tldr: 本文通过元分析评估可解释人工智能（XAI）在人类与AI协同决策中的效果，探讨其对决策性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对XAI在决策中的作用存在矛盾结论，需通过系统性分析整合不同任务和实验条件下的研究结果，明确XAI的实际效用。
AI.method: 采用统计元分析方法，综合多篇研究数据，比较XAI与非XAI条件下的人类决策表现差异，并分析任务类型（如文本数据）的影响。
AI.result: 发现XAI整体对用户决策性能有统计学显著提升，但解释内容本身对性能无额外影响；文本数据任务中人类-AI协同表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究XAI效果差异的潜在原因，优化算法以提供更有效的解释，从而更好地支持人类决策者。

title: Extracting Latent Steering Vectors from Pretrained Language Models
title_zh: 从预训练语言模型中提取潜在转向向量
comment: Accepted to ACL2022 Findings; 16 pages (9 pages plus references and appendices); Code: https://github.com/nishantsubramani/steering_vectors; Some text overlap with arXiv:2008.09049
comments: Accepted to ACL2022 Findings; 16 pages (9 pages plus references and appendices); Code: https://github.com/nishantsubramani/steering_vectors; Some text overlap with arXiv:2008.09049
abstract: Prior work on controllable text generation has focused on learning how to control language models through trainable decoding, smart-prompt design, or fine-tuning based on a desired objective. We hypothesize that the information needed to steer the model to generate a target sentence is already encoded within the model. Accordingly, we explore a different approach altogether: extracting latent vectors directly from pretrained language model decoders without fine-tuning. Experiments show that there exist steering vectors, which, when added to the hidden states of the language model, generate a target sentence nearly perfectly (> 99 BLEU) for English sentences from a variety of domains. We show that vector arithmetic can be used for unsupervised sentiment transfer on the Yelp sentiment benchmark, with performance comparable to models tailored to this task. We find that distances between steering vectors reflect sentence similarity when evaluated on a textual similarity benchmark (STS-B), outperforming pooled hidden states of models. Finally, we present an analysis of the intrinsic properties of the steering vectors. Taken together, our results suggest that frozen LMs can be effectively controlled through their latent steering space.
summary: Prior work on controllable text generation has focused on learning how to control language models through trainable decoding, smart-prompt design, or fine-tuning based on a desired objective. We hypothesize that the information needed to steer the model to generate a target sentence is already encoded within the model. Accordingly, we explore a different approach altogether: extracting latent vectors directly from pretrained language model decoders without fine-tuning. Experiments show that there exist steering vectors, which, when added to the hidden states of the language model, generate a target sentence nearly perfectly (> 99 BLEU) for English sentences from a variety of domains. We show that vector arithmetic can be used for unsupervised sentiment transfer on the Yelp sentiment benchmark, with performance comparable to models tailored to this task. We find that distances between steering vectors reflect sentence similarity when evaluated on a textual similarity benchmark (STS-B), outperforming pooled hidden states of models. Finally, we present an analysis of the intrinsic properties of the steering vectors. Taken together, our results suggest that frozen LMs can be effectively controlled through their latent steering space.
abstract_zh: 先前关于可控文本生成的工作重点是学习如何通过可训练的解码、智能提示设计或基于期望目标的微调来控制语言模型。我们假设引导模型生成目标句子所需的信息已经编码在模型中。因此，我们完全探索了一种不同的方法：直接从预训练的语言模型解码器中提取潜在向量，无需进行微调。实验表明，存在转向向量，当将其添加到语言模型的隐藏状态时，可以为来自各个领域的英语句子生成几乎完美的目标句子（> 99 BLEU）。我们证明向量算术可用于 Yelp 情绪基准上的无监督情绪转移，其性能与针对此任务定制的模型相当。我们发现，在文本相似性基准（STS-B）上评估时，引导向量之间的距离反映了句子相似性，优于模型的池化隐藏状态。最后，我们对引导向量的内在属性进行了分析。综上所述，我们的结果表明，冻结的 LM 可以通过其潜在的转向空间进行有效控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从预训练语言模型中提取潜在控制向量，无需微调即可实现对文本生成的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 传统可控文本生成方法依赖可训练解码、智能提示设计或微调，但作者认为模型内部已编码生成目标句子所需信息，因此探索直接提取潜在向量的新方法。
AI.method: 通过从预训练语言模型解码器中提取隐藏状态的潜在控制向量，并将其添加到隐藏状态中生成目标句子，利用向量运算实现无监督情感迁移和文本相似度评估。
AI.result: 在英语多领域句子生成中达到>99 BLEU分数，情感迁移性能与专用模型相当，在文本相似度基准测试中优于模型池化隐藏状态。
AI.conclusion: 冻结的预训练语言模型可通过其潜在控制空间实现有效控制，无需额外微调。

search_text: Extracting Latent Steering Vectors from Pretrained Language Models 从预训练语言模型中提取潜在转向向量 Prior work on controllable text generation has focused on learning how to control language models through trainable decoding, smart-prompt design, or fine-tuning based on a desired objective. We hypothesize that the information needed to steer the model to generate a target sentence is already encoded within the model. Accordingly, we explore a different approach altogether: extracting latent vectors directly from pretrained language model decoders without fine-tuning. Experiments show that there exist steering vectors, which, when added to the hidden states of the language model, generate a target sentence nearly perfectly (> 99 BLEU) for English sentences from a variety of domains. We show that vector arithmetic can be used for unsupervised sentiment transfer on the Yelp sentiment benchmark, with performance comparable to models tailored to this task. We find that distances between steering vectors reflect sentence similarity when evaluated on a textual similarity benchmark (STS-B), outperforming pooled hidden states of models. Finally, we present an analysis of the intrinsic properties of the steering vectors. Taken together, our results suggest that frozen LMs can be effectively controlled through their latent steering space. 先前关于可控文本生成的工作重点是学习如何通过可训练的解码、智能提示设计或基于期望目标的微调来控制语言模型。我们假设引导模型生成目标句子所需的信息已经编码在模型中。因此，我们完全探索了一种不同的方法：直接从预训练的语言模型解码器中提取潜在向量，无需进行微调。实验表明，存在转向向量，当将其添加到语言模型的隐藏状态时，可以为来自各个领域的英语句子生成几乎完美的目标句子（> 99 BLEU）。我们证明向量算术可用于 Yelp 情绪基准上的无监督情绪转移，其性能与针对此任务定制的模型相当。我们发现，在文本相似性基准（STS-B）上评估时，引导向量之间的距离反映了句子相似性，优于模型的池化隐藏状态。最后，我们对引导向量的内在属性进行了分析。综上所述，我们的结果表明，冻结的 LM 可以通过其潜在的转向空间进行有效控制。 本文提出从预训练语言模型中提取潜在控制向量，无需微调即可实现对文本生成的精确控制。 Nishant Subramani,Nivedita Suresh,Matthew E. Peters cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Deep fusion of gray level co-occurrence matrices for lung nodule classification
title_zh: 用于肺结节分类的灰度共生矩阵深度融合
comment: 24 pages, 6 figures, 80 references
comments: 24 pages, 6 figures, 80 references
abstract: Lung cancer is a severe menace to human health, due to which millions of people die because of late diagnoses of cancer; thus, it is vital to detect the disease as early as possible. The Computerized chest analysis Tomography of scan is assumed to be one of the efficient solutions for detecting and classifying lung nodules. The necessity of high accuracy of analyzing C.T. scan images of the lung is considered as one of the crucial challenges in detecting and classifying lung cancer. A new long-short-term-memory (LSTM) based deep fusion structure, is introduced, where, the texture features computed from lung nodules through new volumetric grey-level-co-occurrence-matrices (GLCM) computations are applied to classify the nodules into: benign, malignant and ambiguous. An improved Otsu segmentation method combined with the water strider optimization algorithm (WSA) is proposed to detect the lung nodules. Otsu-WSA thresholding can overcome the restrictions present in previous thresholding methods. Extended experiments are run to assess this fusion structure by considering 2D-GLCM computations based 2D-slices fusion, and an approximation of this 3D-GLCM with volumetric 2.5D-GLCM computations-based LSTM fusion structure. The proposed methods are trained and assessed through the LIDC-IDRI dataset, where 94.4%, 91.6%, and 95.8% Accuracy, sensitivity, and specificity are obtained, respectively for 2D-GLCM fusion and 97.33%, 96%, and 98%, accuracy, sensitivity, and specificity, respectively, for 2.5D-GLCM fusion. The yield of the same are 98.7%, 98%, and 99%, for the 3D-GLCM fusion. The obtained results and analysis indicate that the WSA-Otsu method requires less execution time and yields a more accurate thresholding process. It is found that 3D-GLCM based LSTM outperforms its counterparts.

abstract_zh: 肺癌严重威胁人类健康，数百万人因癌症晚期诊断而死亡；因此，尽早发现这种疾病至关重要。计算机胸部分析断层扫描被认为是检测和分类肺结节的有效解决方案之一。高精度分析CT的必要性肺部扫描图像被认为是检测和分类肺癌的关键挑战之一。引入了一种新的基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的深度融合结构，其中通过新的体积灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）计算从肺结节计算出的纹理特征被应用于将结节分类为：良性、恶性和模糊性。提出了一种改进的Otsu分割方法结合水黾优化算法（WSA）来检测肺结节。 Otsu-WSA 阈值处理可以克服先前阈值处理方法中存在的限制。通过考虑基于 2D 切片融合的 2D-GLCM 计算以及该 3D-GLCM 与基于体积 2.5D-GLCM 计算的 LSTM 融合结构的近似，进行扩展实验来评估该融合结构。所提出的方法通过 LIDC-IDRI 数据集进行训练和评估，其中 2D-GLCM 融合的准确度、灵敏度和特异性分别为 94.4%、91.6% 和 95.8%，2.5D-GLCM 融合的准确度、灵敏度和特异性分别为 97.33%、96% 和 98%。 3D-GLCM 融合的产率分别为 98.7%、98% 和 99%。获得的结果和分析表明 WSA-Otsu 方法需要更少的执行时间并产生更准确的阈值处理。结果发现，基于 3D-GLCM 的 LSTM 优于同类产品。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LSTM的深度融合结构，结合改进的Otsu分割方法和灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）特征，用于肺结节分类。
AI.motivation: 肺癌因晚期诊断导致高死亡率，需通过CT扫描早期检测肺结节，但现有方法在准确性和效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出改进的Otsu-WSA阈值分割算法检测肺结节，并利用2D/2.5D/3D GLCM纹理特征与LSTM融合网络进行分类。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集上，2D-GLCM融合准确率94.4%，2.5D-GLCM达97.33%，3D-GLCM最高达98.7%，且WSA-Otsu方法执行时间更短。
AI.conclusion: 3D-GLCM结合LSTM的融合方法在肺结节分类中表现最优，WSA-Otsu分割算法提升了阈值处理的准确性与效率。

title: An Efficient Calculation of Quaternion Correlation of Signals and Color Images
title_zh: 信号与彩色图像四元数相关性的有效计算
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 1 table
comments: 14 pages, 7 figures, 1 table
abstract: Over the past century, a correlation has been an essential mathematical technique utilized in engineering sciences, including practically every signal/image processing field. This paper describes an effective method of calculating the correlation function of signals and color images in quaternion algebra. We propose using the quaternions with a commutative multiplication operation and defining the corresponding correlation function in this arithmetic. The correlation between quaternion signals and images can be calculated by multiplying two quaternion DFTs of signals and images. The complexity of the correlation of color images is three times higher than in complex algebra.
summary: Over the past century, a correlation has been an essential mathematical technique utilized in engineering sciences, including practically every signal/image processing field. This paper describes an effective method of calculating the correlation function of signals and color images in quaternion algebra. We propose using the quaternions with a commutative multiplication operation and defining the corresponding correlation function in this arithmetic. The correlation between quaternion signals and images can be calculated by multiplying two quaternion DFTs of signals and images. The complexity of the correlation of color images is three times higher than in complex algebra.
abstract_zh: 在过去的一个世纪中，相关性一直是工程科学中使用的基本数学技术，几乎包括每个信号/图像处理领域。本文描述了一种在四元数代数中计算信号与彩色图像相关函数的有效方法。我们建议使用带有交换乘法运算的四元数，并在此算术中定义相应的相关函数。四元数信号和图像之间的相关性可以通过信号和图像的两个四元数DFT相乘来计算。彩色图像相关性的复杂度是复杂代数的三倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于四元数代数的高效计算信号和彩色图像相关函数的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统复数代数在处理彩色图像时存在复杂度不足的问题，需探索更高效的数学工具以提升信号/图像处理性能。
AI.method: 采用具有交换乘法运算的四元数，通过将信号和图像转换为四元数DFT后相乘，定义新的相关函数计算方法。
AI.result: 四元数彩色图像相关计算复杂度为复数代数的三倍，但实现了更高效的多通道信息处理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为信号和彩色图像处理提供了有效的四元数相关计算框架，具有实际应用价值。

We propose using the quaternions with a commutative multiplication operation and defining the corresponding correlation function in this arithmetic. The correlation between quaternion signals and images can be calculated by multiplying two quaternion DFTs of signals and images. The complexity of the correlation of color images is three times higher than in complex algebra. 在过去的一个世纪中，相关性一直是工程科学中使用的基本数学技术，几乎包括每个信号/图像处理领域。本文描述了一种在四元数代数中计算信号与彩色图像相关函数的有效方法。我们建议使用带有交换乘法运算的四元数，并在此算术中定义相应的相关函数。四元数信号和图像之间的相关性可以通过信号和图像的两个四元数DFT相乘来计算。彩色图像相关性的复杂度是复杂代数的三倍。 本文提出一种基于四元数代数的高效计算信号和彩色图像相关函数的方法。 Artyom M. Grigoryan,Sos S. Agaian math.AC,cs.CV,cs.IT

title: Richer Countries and Richer Representations
title_zh: 更富裕的国家和更丰富的代表
comment: Camera Ready for ACL 2022 (Findings)
comments: Camera Ready for ACL 2022 (Findings)
abstract: We examine whether some countries are more richly represented in embedding space than others. We find that countries whose names occur with low frequency in training corpora are more likely to be tokenized into subwords, are less semantically distinct in embedding space, and are less likely to be correctly predicted: e.g., Ghana (the correct answer and in-vocabulary) is not predicted for, "The country producing the most cocoa is [MASK].". Although these performance discrepancies and representational harms are due to frequency, we find that frequency is highly correlated with a country's GDP; thus perpetuating historic power and wealth inequalities. We analyze the effectiveness of mitigation strategies; recommend that researchers report training word frequencies; and recommend future work for the community to define and design representational guarantees.
summary: We examine whether some countries are more richly represented in embedding space than others. We find that countries whose names occur with low frequency in training corpora are more likely to be tokenized into subwords, are less semantically distinct in embedding space, and are less likely to be correctly predicted: e.g., Ghana (the correct answer and in-vocabulary) is not predicted for, "The country producing the most cocoa is [MASK].". Although these performance discrepancies and representational harms are due to frequency, we find that frequency is highly correlated with a country's GDP; thus perpetuating historic power and wealth inequalities. We analyze the effectiveness of mitigation strategies; recommend that researchers report training word frequencies; and recommend future work for the community to define and design representational guarantees.
abstract_zh: 我们研究一些国家在嵌入空间中的代表性是否比其他国家更丰富。我们发现，在训练语料库中名称出现频率较低的国家/地区更有可能被标记为子词，在嵌入空间中的语义差异较小，并且不太可能被正确预测：例如，加纳（正确答案和词汇表）不会被预测为“生产最多可可的国家是[MASK]。”。尽管这些绩效差异和代表性损害是由频率造成的，但我们发现频率与一个国家的 GDP 高度相关；从而使历史上的权力和财富不平等永久化。我们分析缓解策略的有效性；建议研究人员报告训练词频；并建议社区未来定义和设计代表性保证的工作。

AI.tldr: 研究国家名称在嵌入空间中的表示是否与其经济富裕程度相关
AI.motivation: 探讨国家名称在嵌入空间中的表示差异是否与经济不平等有关，并揭示其背后的社会影响
AI.method: 通过分析国家名称在训练语料中的频率、分词方式、语义表示及预测准确性，并与GDP数据关联进行分析
AI.result: 发现低频国家名称在嵌入空间中表示较差，且其频率与GDP高度相关，导致预测性能差异和表示偏差
AI.conclusion: 建议研究者报告训练词频，并推动社区制定表示公平性保障措施

title: Problems with Cosine as a Measure of Embedding Similarity for High Frequency Words
title_zh: 使用余弦作为高频词嵌入相似度度量的问题
comment: Camera Ready for ACL 2022 (Main Conference)
comments: Camera Ready for ACL 2022 (Main Conference)
abstract: Cosine similarity of contextual embeddings is used in many NLP tasks (e.g., QA, IR, MT) and metrics (e.g., BERTScore). Here, we uncover systematic ways in which word similarities estimated by cosine over BERT embeddings are understated and trace this effect to training data frequency. We find that relative to human judgements, cosine similarity underestimates the similarity of frequent words with other instances of the same word or other words across contexts, even after controlling for polysemy and other factors. We conjecture that this underestimation of similarity for high frequency words is due to differences in the representational geometry of high and low frequency words and provide a formal argument for the two-dimensional case.
summary: Cosine similarity of contextual embeddings is used in many NLP tasks (e.g., QA, IR, MT) and metrics (e.g., BERTScore). Here, we uncover systematic ways in which word similarities estimated by cosine over BERT embeddings are understated and trace this effect to training data frequency. We find that relative to human judgements, cosine similarity underestimates the similarity of frequent words with other instances of the same word or other words across contexts, even after controlling for polysemy and other factors. We conjecture that this underestimation of similarity for high frequency words is due to differences in the representational geometry of high and low frequency words and provide a formal argument for the two-dimensional case.
abstract_zh: 上下文嵌入的余弦相似度用于许多 NLP 任务（例如 QA、IR、MT）和指标（例如 BERTScore）。在这里，我们揭示了通过 BERT 嵌入的余弦估计的单词相似度被低估的系统方法，并将这种影响追溯到训练数据频率。我们发现，相对于人类的判断，余弦相似度低估了频繁单词与同一单词的其他实例或跨上下文的其他单词的相似性，即使在控制多义词和其他因素之后也是如此。我们推测，这种对高频词相似性的低估是由于高频词和低频词的表征几何的差异造成的，并为二维情况提供了正式的论证。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在高频率词汇的嵌入相似性度量中，余弦相似度存在的系统性偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 余弦相似度广泛应用于NLP任务，但研究发现其对高频词的相似性估计与人类判断存在显著偏差，需探究原因。
AI.method: 通过对比BERT嵌入的余弦相似度与人类判断数据，控制多义性等因素，分析高频词与低频词的表征几何差异。
AI.result: 余弦相似度低估了高频词在不同上下文中的相似性，且该现象与训练数据频率分布相关。
AI.conclusion: 高频词的表征几何特性导致余弦相似度失效，需重新评估其在相关NLP任务中的适用性。

authors_text: Qiankun Liu,Zhentao Tan,Dongdong Chen,Qi Chu,Xiyang Dai,Yinpeng Chen,Mengchen Liu,Lu Yuan,Nenghai Yu
title: Reduce Information Loss in Transformers for Pluralistic Image Inpainting
title_zh: 减少变形金刚中的信息丢失以实现多元图像修复
comment: CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/liuqk3/PUT
comments: CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/liuqk3/PUT
abstract: Transformers have achieved great success in pluralistic image inpainting recently. However, we find existing transformer based solutions regard each pixel as a token, thus suffer from information loss issue from two aspects: 1) They downsample the input image into much lower resolutions for efficiency consideration, incurring information loss and extra misalignment for the boundaries of masked regions. 2) They quantize $256^3$ RGB pixels to a small number (such as 512) of quantized pixels. The indices of quantized pixels are used as tokens for the inputs and prediction targets of transformer. Although an extra CNN network is used to upsample and refine the low-resolution results, it is difficult to retrieve the lost information back.To keep input information as much as possible, we propose a new transformer based framework "PUT". Specifically, to avoid input downsampling while maintaining the computation efficiency, we design a patch-based auto-encoder P-VQVAE, where the encoder converts the masked image into non-overlapped patch tokens and the decoder recovers the masked regions from inpainted tokens while keeping the unmasked regions unchanged. To eliminate the information loss caused by quantization, an Un-Quantized Transformer (UQ-Transformer) is applied, which directly takes the features from P-VQVAE encoder as input without quantization and regards the quantized tokens only as prediction targets. Extensive experiments show that PUT greatly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on image fidelity, especially for large masked regions and complex large-scale datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/liuqk3/PUT
summary: Transformers have achieved great success in pluralistic image inpainting recently. However, we find existing transformer based solutions regard each pixel as a token, thus suffer from information loss issue from two aspects: 1) They downsample the input image into much lower resolutions for efficiency consideration, incurring information loss and extra misalignment for the boundaries of masked regions. 2) They quantize $256^3$ RGB pixels to a small number (such as 512) of quantized pixels. The indices of quantized pixels are used as tokens for the inputs and prediction targets of transformer. Although an extra CNN network is used to upsample and refine the low-resolution results, it is difficult to retrieve the lost information back.To keep input information as much as possible, we propose a new transformer based framework "PUT". Specifically, to avoid input downsampling while maintaining the computation efficiency, we design a patch-based auto-encoder P-VQVAE, where the encoder converts the masked image into non-overlapped patch tokens and the decoder recovers the masked regions from inpainted tokens while keeping the unmasked regions unchanged. To eliminate the information loss caused by quantization, an Un-Quantized Transformer (UQ-Transformer) is applied, which directly takes the features from P-VQVAE encoder as input without quantization and regards the quantized tokens only as prediction targets. Extensive experiments show that PUT greatly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on image fidelity, especially for large masked regions and complex large-scale datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/liuqk3/PUT
abstract_zh: 近年来，《变形金刚》在多元图像修复方面取得了巨大成功。然而，我们发现现有的基于 Transformer 的解决方案将每个像素视为一个令牌，因此存在两个方面的信息丢失问题：1）出于效率考虑，它们将输入图像下采样为更低的分辨率，从而导致信息丢失和屏蔽区域边界的额外未对准。 2) 它们将 $256^3$ RGB 像素量化为少量（例如 512）个量化像素。量化像素的索引用作变压器输入和预测目标的标记。尽管使用了额外的 CNN 网络来对低分辨率结果进行上采样和细化，但很难找回丢失的信息。为了尽可能多地保留输入信息，我们提出了一种新的基于 Transformer 的框架“PUT”。具体来说，为了在保持计算效率的同时避免输入下采样，我们设计了一种基于补丁的自动编码器 P-VQVAE，其中编码器将屏蔽图像转换为非重叠的补丁令牌，解码器从修复令牌中恢复屏蔽区域，同时保持未屏蔽区域不变。为了消除量化带来的信息损失，采用了非量化变换器（UQ-Transformer），直接将P-VQVAE编码器的特征作为输入而不进行量化，并将量化后的标记仅视为预测目标。大量实验表明，PUT 在图像保真度方面远远优于最先进的方法，特别是对于大型屏蔽区域和复杂的大规模数据集。代码可在 https://github.com/liuqk3/PUT 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的新框架PUT，旨在减少图像修复中的信息损失，提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的图像修复方法将每个像素作为token，因输入图像下采样和像素量化导致信息丢失，尤其在边界对齐和大范围遮挡区域表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计了无需下采样的P-VQVAE编码器-解码器结构，结合非量化Transformer（UQ-Transformer），直接使用编码器特征进行处理，仅将量化token作为预测目标。
AI.result: 在多个大规模数据集和大范围遮挡场景中，PUT在图像保真度指标上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过避免下采样和量化信息损失，PUT框架有效提升了Transformer在图像修复任务中的性能，尤其适用于复杂场景和大区域修复。

motivation: 现有基于Transformer的图像修复方法将每个像素作为token，因输入图像下采样和像素量化导致信息丢失，尤其在边界对齐和大范围遮挡区域表现不佳。
method: 设计了无需下采样的P-VQVAE编码器-解码器结构，结合非量化Transformer（UQ-Transformer），直接使用编码器特征进行处理，仅将量化token作为预测目标。
result: 在多个大规模数据集和大范围遮挡场景中，PUT在图像保真度指标上显著优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过避免下采样和量化信息损失，PUT框架有效提升了Transformer在图像修复任务中的性能，尤其适用于复杂场景和大区域修复。
search_text: Reduce Information Loss in Transformers for Pluralistic Image Inpainting 减少变形金刚中的信息丢失以实现多元图像修复 Transformers have achieved great success in pluralistic image inpainting recently. However, we find existing transformer based solutions regard each pixel as a token, thus suffer from information loss issue from two aspects: 1) They downsample the input image into much lower resolutions for efficiency consideration, incurring information loss and extra misalignment for the boundaries of masked regions. 2) They quantize $256^3$ RGB pixels to a small number (such as 512) of quantized pixels. The indices of quantized pixels are used as tokens for the inputs and prediction targets of transformer. Although an extra CNN network is used to upsample and refine the low-resolution results, it is difficult to retrieve the lost information back.To keep input information as much as possible, we propose a new transformer based framework "PUT". Specifically, to avoid input downsampling while maintaining the computation efficiency, we design a patch-based auto-encoder P-VQVAE, where the encoder converts the masked image into non-overlapped patch tokens and the decoder recovers the masked regions from inpainted tokens while keeping the unmasked regions unchanged. To eliminate the information loss caused by quantization, an Un-Quantized Transformer (UQ-Transformer) is applied, which directly takes the features from P-VQVAE encoder as input without quantization and regards the quantized tokens only as prediction targets. Extensive experiments show that PUT greatly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on image fidelity, especially for large masked regions and complex large-scale datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/liuqk3/PUT 近年来，《变形金刚》在多元图像修复方面取得了巨大成功。然而，我们发现现有的基于 Transformer 的解决方案将每个像素视为一个令牌，因此存在两个方面的信息丢失问题：1）出于效率考虑，它们将输入图像下采样为更低的分辨率，从而导致信息丢失和屏蔽区域边界的额外未对准。 2) 它们将 $256^3$ RGB 像素量化为少量（例如 512）个量化像素。量化像素的索引用作变压器输入和预测目标的标记。尽管使用了额外的 CNN 网络来对低分辨率结果进行上采样和细化，但很难找回丢失的信息。为了尽可能多地保留输入信息，我们提出了一种新的基于 Transformer 的框架“PUT”。具体来说，为了在保持计算效率的同时避免输入下采样，我们设计了一种基于补丁的自动编码器 P-VQVAE，其中编码器将屏蔽图像转换为非重叠的补丁令牌，解码器从修复令牌中恢复屏蔽区域，同时保持未屏蔽区域不变。为了消除量化带来的信息损失，采用了非量化变换器（UQ-Transformer），直接将P-VQVAE编码器的特征作为输入而不进行量化，并将量化后的标记仅视为预测目标。大量实验表明，PUT 在图像保真度方面远远优于最先进的方法，特别是对于大型屏蔽区域和复杂的大规模数据集。代码可在 https://github.com/liuqk3/PUT 获取 本文提出一种基于Transformer的新框架PUT，旨在减少图像修复中的信息损失，提升修复效果。 Qiankun Liu,Zhentao Tan,Dongdong Chen,Qi Chu,Xiyang Dai,Yinpeng Chen,Mengchen Liu,Lu Yuan,Nenghai Yu cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Learning Visual Styles from Audio-Visual Associations
title_zh: 从视听关联中学习视觉风格
abstract: From the patter of rain to the crunch of snow, the sounds we hear often convey the visual textures that appear within a scene. In this paper, we present a method for learning visual styles from unlabeled audio-visual data. Our model learns to manipulate the texture of a scene to match a sound, a problem we term audio-driven image stylization. Given a dataset of paired audio-visual data, we learn to modify input images such that, after manipulation, they are more likely to co-occur with a given input sound. In quantitative and qualitative evaluations, our sound-based model outperforms label-based approaches. We also show that audio can be an intuitive representation for manipulating images, as adjusting a sound's volume or mixing two sounds together results in predictable changes to visual style. Project webpage: https://tinglok.netlify.app/files/avstyle
summary: From the patter of rain to the crunch of snow, the sounds we hear often convey the visual textures that appear within a scene. In this paper, we present a method for learning visual styles from unlabeled audio-visual data. Our model learns to manipulate the texture of a scene to match a sound, a problem we term audio-driven image stylization. Given a dataset of paired audio-visual data, we learn to modify input images such that, after manipulation, they are more likely to co-occur with a given input sound. In quantitative and qualitative evaluations, our sound-based model outperforms label-based approaches. We also show that audio can be an intuitive representation for manipulating images, as adjusting a sound's volume or mixing two sounds together results in predictable changes to visual style. Project webpage: https://tinglok.netlify.app/files/avstyle
abstract_zh: 从淅淅沥沥的雨声到雪花的嘎吱声，我们听到的声音常常传达场景中出现的视觉纹理。在本文中，我们提出了一种从未标记的视听数据中学习视觉风格的方法。我们的模型学习操纵场景的纹理以匹配声音，我们将这个问题称为音频驱动的图像风格化。给定配对视听数据的数据集，我们学习修改输入图像，以便在处理后它们更有可能与给定的输入声音同时出现。在定量和定性评估中，我们基于声音的模型优于基于标签的方法。我们还表明，音频可以是操作图像的直观表示，因为调整声音的音量或将两种声音混合在一起会导致视觉风格的可预测变化。项目网页：https://tinglok.netlify.app/files/avstyle

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从无标签音视频数据中学习视觉风格的方法，通过声音驱动图像风格化，使图像与声音更匹配。
AI.motivation: 声音常蕴含场景的视觉纹理信息，但现有方法依赖标签数据，难以利用未标注的音视频数据进行风格学习。
AI.method: 构建模型通过配对的音视频数据学习纹理调整，使输入图像在修改后更可能与给定声音共现，并验证声音调整（如音量变化或混音）对视觉风格的可预测影响。
AI.result: 定量和定性评估显示，基于声音的模型优于基于标签的方法，且声音调整能直观控制视觉风格变化。
AI.conclusion: 音频可作为直观的图像操控表示，通过声音属性调整可实现可控的视觉风格迁移。

title: Accelerating the Training of Video Super-Resolution Models
title_zh: 加速视频超分辨率模型的训练
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/TencentARC/Efficient-VSR-Training
comments: The code is available at https://github.com/TencentARC/Efficient-VSR-Training
abstract: Despite that convolution neural networks (CNN) have recently demonstrated high-quality reconstruction for video super-resolution (VSR), efficiently training competitive VSR models remains a challenging problem. It usually takes an order of magnitude more time than training their counterpart image models, leading to long research cycles. Existing VSR methods typically train models with fixed spatial and temporal sizes from beginning to end. The fixed sizes are usually set to large values for good performance, resulting to slow training. However, is such a rigid training strategy necessary for VSR? In this work, we show that it is possible to gradually train video models from small to large spatial/temporal sizes, i.e., in an easy-to-hard manner. In particular, the whole training is divided into several stages and the earlier stage has smaller training spatial shape. Inside each stage, the temporal size also varies from short to long while the spatial size remains unchanged. Training is accelerated by such a multigrid training strategy, as most of computation is performed on smaller spatial and shorter temporal shapes. For further acceleration with GPU parallelization, we also investigate the large minibatch training without the loss in accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method is capable of largely speeding up training (up to $6.2\times$ speedup in wall-clock training time) without performance drop for various VSR models. The code is available at https://github.com/TencentARC/Efficient-VSR-Training.
summary: Despite that convolution neural networks (CNN) have recently demonstrated high-quality reconstruction for video super-resolution (VSR), efficiently training competitive VSR models remains a challenging problem. It usually takes an order of magnitude more time than training their counterpart image models, leading to long research cycles. Existing VSR methods typically train models with fixed spatial and temporal sizes from beginning to end. The fixed sizes are usually set to large values for good performance, resulting to slow training. However, is such a rigid training strategy necessary for VSR? In this work, we show that it is possible to gradually train video models from small to large spatial/temporal sizes, i.e., in an easy-to-hard manner. In particular, the whole training is divided into several stages and the earlier stage has smaller training spatial shape. Inside each stage, the temporal size also varies from short to long while the spatial size remains unchanged. Training is accelerated by such a multigrid training strategy, as most of computation is performed on smaller spatial and shorter temporal shapes. For further acceleration with GPU parallelization, we also investigate the large minibatch training without the loss in accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method is capable of largely speeding up training (up to $6.2\times$ speedup in wall-clock training time) without performance drop for various VSR models. The code is available at https://github.com/TencentARC/Efficient-VSR-Training.
abstract_zh: 尽管卷积神经网络 (CNN) 最近展示了视频超分辨率 (VSR) 的高质量重建，但有效训练有竞争力的 VSR 模型仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。它通常比训练对应的图像模型需要多一个数量级的时间，导致研究周期很长。现有的 VSR 方法通常从头到尾训练具有固定空间和时间大小的模型。为了获得良好的性能，固定大小通常设置为较大的值，从而导致训练速度变慢。然而，VSR有必要采用如此严格的训练策略吗？在这项工作中，我们表明可以逐渐从小到大的空间/时间尺寸训练视频模型，即以从易到难的方式。特别是，整个训练分为几个阶段，早期阶段的训练空间形状较小。在每个阶段内，时间大小也由短到长变化，而空间大小保持不变。这种多重网格训练策略可以加速训练，因为大部分计算是在较小的空间和较短的时间形状上执行的。为了进一步加速 GPU 并行化，我们还研究了在不损失准确性的情况下进行大型小批量训练。大量的实验表明，我们的方法能够大大加快训练速度（在挂钟训练时间中加速高达 $6.2\times$），而不会降低各种 VSR 模型的性能。代码可在https://github.com/TencentARC/Efficient-VSR-Training获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多网格训练策略，通过从小到大逐步增加视频超分辨率模型的空间和时间尺寸，加速模型训练过程。
AI.motivation: 现有视频超分辨率模型训练耗时长，因固定大尺寸导致计算量大，而固定策略是否必要尚不明确。
AI.method: 将训练分为多阶段，初期使用小尺寸空间/时间形状逐步增大，结合GPU并行化的大批量训练。
AI.result: 在多种VSR模型上实现最高6.2倍的训练加速，且无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: 多网格训练策略有效提升训练效率，为视频超分辨率模型优化提供新思路。

Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method is capable of largely speeding up training (up to $6.2\times$ speedup in wall-clock training time) without performance drop for various VSR models. The code is available at https://github.com/TencentARC/Efficient-VSR-Training. 尽管卷积神经网络 (CNN) 最近展示了视频超分辨率 (VSR) 的高质量重建，但有效训练有竞争力的 VSR 模型仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。它通常比训练对应的图像模型需要多一个数量级的时间，导致研究周期很长。现有的 VSR 方法通常从头到尾训练具有固定空间和时间大小的模型。为了获得良好的性能，固定大小通常设置为较大的值，从而导致训练速度变慢。然而，VSR有必要采用如此严格的训练策略吗？在这项工作中，我们表明可以逐渐从小到大的空间/时间尺寸训练视频模型，即以从易到难的方式。特别是，整个训练分为几个阶段，早期阶段的训练空间形状较小。在每个阶段内，时间大小也由短到长变化，而空间大小保持不变。这种多重网格训练策略可以加速训练，因为大部分计算是在较小的空间和较短的时间形状上执行的。为了进一步加速 GPU 并行化，我们还研究了在不损失准确性的情况下进行大型小批量训练。大量的实验表明，我们的方法能够大大加快训练速度（在挂钟训练时间中加速高达 $6.2\times$），而不会降低各种 VSR 模型的性能。代码可在https://github.com/TencentARC/Efficient-VSR-Training获取。 本文提出一种多网格训练策略，通过从小到大逐步增加视频超分辨率模型的空间和时间尺寸，加速模型训练过程。 Lijian Lin,Xintao Wang,Zhongang Qi,Ying Shan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Chong Mou,Yanze Wu,Xintao Wang,Chao Dong,Jian Zhang,Ying Shan
title: MM-RealSR: Metric Learning based Interactive Modulation for Real-World Super-Resolution
title_zh: MM-RealSR：基于度量学习的交互式调制，实现现实世界的超分辨率
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022. Code is available at: https://github.com/TencentARC/MM-RealSR
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022. Code is available at: https://github.com/TencentARC/MM-RealSR
abstract: Interactive image restoration aims to restore images by adjusting several controlling coefficients, which determine the restoration strength. Existing methods are restricted in learning the controllable functions under the supervision of known degradation types and levels. They usually suffer from a severe performance drop when the real degradation is different from their assumptions. Such a limitation is due to the complexity of real-world degradations, which can not provide explicit supervision to the interactive modulation during training. However, how to realize the interactive modulation in real-world super-resolution has not yet been studied. In this work, we present a Metric Learning based Interactive Modulation for Real-World Super-Resolution (MM-RealSR). Specifically, we propose an unsupervised degradation estimation strategy to estimate the degradation level in real-world scenarios. Instead of using known degradation levels as explicit supervision to the interactive mechanism, we propose a metric learning strategy to map the unquantifiable degradation levels in real-world scenarios to a metric space, which is trained in an unsupervised manner. Moreover, we introduce an anchor point strategy in the metric learning process to normalize the distribution of metric space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed MM-RealSR achieves excellent modulation and restoration performance in real-world super-resolution. Codes are available at https://github.com/TencentARC/MM-RealSR.
summary: Interactive image restoration aims to restore images by adjusting several controlling coefficients, which determine the restoration strength. Existing methods are restricted in learning the controllable functions under the supervision of known degradation types and levels. They usually suffer from a severe performance drop when the real degradation is different from their assumptions. Such a limitation is due to the complexity of real-world degradations, which can not provide explicit supervision to the interactive modulation during training. However, how to realize the interactive modulation in real-world super-resolution has not yet been studied. In this work, we present a Metric Learning based Interactive Modulation for Real-World Super-Resolution (MM-RealSR). Specifically, we propose an unsupervised degradation estimation strategy to estimate the degradation level in real-world scenarios. Instead of using known degradation levels as explicit supervision to the interactive mechanism, we propose a metric learning strategy to map the unquantifiable degradation levels in real-world scenarios to a metric space, which is trained in an unsupervised manner. Moreover, we introduce an anchor point strategy in the metric learning process to normalize the distribution of metric space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed MM-RealSR achieves excellent modulation and restoration performance in real-world super-resolution. Codes are available at https://github.com/TencentARC/MM-RealSR.
abstract_zh: 交互式图像恢复旨在通过调整多个控制系数来恢复图像，这些控制系数决定恢复强度。现有方法在已知退化类型和水平的监督下学习可控功能受到限制。当实际性能下降与他们的假设不同时，他们通常会遭受严重的性能下降。这种限制是由于现实世界退化的复杂性造成的，它无法在训练期间对交互式调制提供明确的监督。然而，如何实现现实世界超分辨率中的交互调制尚未得到研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于度量学习的现实世界超分辨率交互式调制（MM-RealSR）。具体来说，我们提出了一种无监督退化估计策略来估计现实场景中的退化水平。我们没有使用已知的退化水平作为对交互机制的显式监督，而是提出了一种度量学习策略，将现实世界场景中不可量化的退化水平映射到以无监督方式训练的度量空间。此外，我们在度量学习过程中引入了锚点策略来规范度量空间的分布。大量实验表明，所提出的 MM-RealSR 在现实世界的超分辨率中实现了出色的调制和恢复性能。代码可在 https://github.com/TencentARC/MM-RealSR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MM-RealSR方法，通过度量学习实现真实场景下的交互式超分辨率图像修复。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖已知退化类型和等级进行监督学习，在真实场景中因退化复杂性导致性能下降，亟需解决无显式监督下的交互调制问题。
AI.method: 提出无监督退化估计策略，结合度量学习将真实场景的不可量化退化映射到度量空间，并引入锚点策略规范化分布。
AI.result: 在真实场景超分辨率任务中取得优异的调制与修复效果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MM-RealSR通过度量学习有效处理真实退化问题，推动了无显式监督下的交互式超分辨率研究。

title: Sensible AI: Re-imagining Interpretability and Explainability using Sensemaking Theory
title_zh: Sensible AI：使用意义建构理论重新想象可解释性和可解释性
comment: To appear at FAccT 2022
comments: To appear at FAccT 2022
abstract: Understanding how ML models work is a prerequisite for responsibly designing, deploying, and using ML-based systems. With interpretability approaches, ML can now offer explanations for its outputs to aid human understanding. Though these approaches rely on guidelines for how humans explain things to each other, they ultimately solve for improving the artifact -- an explanation. In this paper, we propose an alternate framework for interpretability grounded in Weick's sensemaking theory, which focuses on who the explanation is intended for. Recent work has advocated for the importance of understanding stakeholders' needs -- we build on this by providing concrete properties (e.g., identity, social context, environmental cues, etc.) that shape human understanding. We use an application of sensemaking in organizations as a template for discussing design guidelines for Sensible AI, AI that factors in the nuances of human cognition when trying to explain itself.
summary: Understanding how ML models work is a prerequisite for responsibly designing, deploying, and using ML-based systems. With interpretability approaches, ML can now offer explanations for its outputs to aid human understanding. Though these approaches rely on guidelines for how humans explain things to each other, they ultimately solve for improving the artifact -- an explanation. In this paper, we propose an alternate framework for interpretability grounded in Weick's sensemaking theory, which focuses on who the explanation is intended for. Recent work has advocated for the importance of understanding stakeholders' needs -- we build on this by providing concrete properties (e.g., identity, social context, environmental cues, etc.) that shape human understanding. We use an application of sensemaking in organizations as a template for discussing design guidelines for Sensible AI, AI that factors in the nuances of human cognition when trying to explain itself.
abstract_zh: 了解 ML 模型的工作原理是负责任地设计、部署和使用基于 ML 的系统的先决条件。通过可解释性方法，机器学习现在可以为其输出提供解释，以帮助人类理解。尽管这些方法依赖于人类如何相互解释事物的指导方针，但它们最终解决的是改进工件——一种解释。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于韦克意义建构理论的可解释性替代框架，该框架重点关注解释的对象是谁。最近的工作提倡理解利益相关者需求的重要性——我们在此基础上提供塑造人类理解的具体属性（例如身份、社会背景、环境线索等）。我们使用组织中意义建构的应用作为讨论 Sensible AI 设计指南的模板，这种 AI 在试图解释自身时考虑了人类认知的细微差别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Weick意义建构理论的Sensible AI框架，重新思考AI可解释性设计，强调解释对象的人类认知复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法过度聚焦于改进解释本身，忽视了人类理解过程中身份、社会语境等关键因素对解释效果的影响。
AI.method: 以组织中的意义建构理论为模板，结合利益相关者属性（身份、环境线索等）构建AI解释性设计指南。
AI.result: 提出包含社会情境、认知偏差等维度的解释性设计框架，为AI系统开发提供新的理论视角和实践指导。
AI.conclusion: 传统解释性研究需转向人类认知复杂性，Sensible AI框架为构建更符合实际需求的AI解释系统提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Stephanie C. Y. Chan,Adam Santoro,Andrew K. Lampinen,Jane X. Wang,Aaditya Singh,Pierre H. Richemond,Jay McClelland,Felix Hill
title: Data Distributional Properties Drive Emergent In-Context Learning in Transformers
title_zh: 数据分布特性推动 Transformers 中的紧急情境学习
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 (Oral). Code is available at: https://github.com/deepmind/emergent_in_context_learning
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 (Oral). Code is available at: https://github.com/deepmind/emergent_in_context_learning
abstract: Large transformer-based models are able to perform in-context few-shot learning, without being explicitly trained for it. This observation raises the question: what aspects of the training regime lead to this emergent behavior? Here, we show that this behavior is driven by the distributions of the training data itself. In-context learning emerges when the training data exhibits particular distributional properties such as burstiness (items appear in clusters rather than being uniformly distributed over time) and having large numbers of rarely occurring classes. In-context learning also emerges more strongly when item meanings or interpretations are dynamic rather than fixed. These properties are exemplified by natural language, but are also inherent to naturalistic data in a wide range of other domains. They also depart significantly from the uniform, i.i.d. training distributions typically used for standard supervised learning. In our initial experiments, we found that in-context learning traded off against more conventional weight-based learning, and models were unable to achieve both simultaneously. However, our later experiments uncovered that the two modes of learning could co-exist in a single model when it was trained on data following a skewed Zipfian distribution -- another common property of naturalistic data, including language. In further experiments, we found that naturalistic data distributions were only able to elicit in-context learning in transformers, and not in recurrent models. In sum, our findings indicate how the transformer architecture works together with particular properties of the training data to drive the intriguing emergent in-context learning behaviour of large language models, and how future work might encourage both in-context and in-weights learning in domains beyond language.
summary: Large transformer-based models are able to perform in-context few-shot learning, without being explicitly trained for it. This observation raises the question: what aspects of the training regime lead to this emergent behavior? Here, we show that this behavior is driven by the distributions of the training data itself. In-context learning emerges when the training data exhibits particular distributional properties such as burstiness (items appear in clusters rather than being uniformly distributed over time) and having large numbers of rarely occurring classes. In-context learning also emerges more strongly when item meanings or interpretations are dynamic rather than fixed. These properties are exemplified by natural language, but are also inherent to naturalistic data in a wide range of other domains. They also depart significantly from the uniform, i.i.d. training distributions typically used for standard supervised learning. In our initial experiments, we found that in-context learning traded off against more conventional weight-based learning, and models were unable to achieve both simultaneously. However, our later experiments uncovered that the two modes of learning could co-exist in a single model when it was trained on data following a skewed Zipfian distribution -- another common property of naturalistic data, including language. In further experiments, we found that naturalistic data distributions were only able to elicit in-context learning in transformers, and not in recurrent models. In sum, our findings indicate how the transformer architecture works together with particular properties of the training data to drive the intriguing emergent in-context learning behaviour of large language models, and how future work might encourage both in-context and in-weights learning in domains beyond language.
abstract_zh: 基于变压器的大型模型能够执行上下文中的小样本学习，而无需经过明确的训练。这一观察提出了一个问题：培训制度的哪些方面导致了这种突发行为？在这里，我们表明这种行为是由训练数据本身的分布驱动的。当训练数据表现出特定的分布特性时，例如突发性（项目出现在集群中，而不是随着时间的推移均匀分布）以及具有大量很少出现的类，上下文学习就会出现。当项目含义或解释是动态的而不是固定的时，情境学习也会更加强烈。这些属性以自然语言为例，但也是其他广泛领域中的自然数据所固有的。它们也与制服 i.i.d 显着不同。通常用于标准监督学习的训练分布。在我们最初的实验中，我们发现上下文学习与更传统的基于权重的学习之间存在权衡，并且模型无法同时实现两者。然而，我们后来的实验发现，当对遵循倾斜 Zipfian 分布的数据进行训练时，这两种学习模式可以在一个模型中共存，这是自然数据（包括语言）的另一个常见属性。在进一步的实验中，我们发现自然数据分布只能在 Transformer 中引发上下文学习，而不能在循环模型中引发。总之，我们的研究结果表明，变压器架构如何与训练数据的特定属性一起工作，以驱动大型语言模型有趣的新兴上下文学习行为，以及未来的工作如何鼓励语言以外领域的上下文和权重学习。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了训练数据的分布特性如何驱动Transformer模型产生上下文内学习能力。
AI.motivation: 大型Transformer模型能实现无需显式训练的上下文内少样本学习，但其背后机制尚不明确，需探究训练数据分布特性的影响。
AI.method: 通过设计不同分布特性的训练数据（如突发性、Zipfian分布），对比Transformer与循环模型在上下文学习任务中的表现，并分析学习模式的权衡关系。
AI.result: 发现突发性、稀有类和动态语义等自然语言数据特性能促进上下文学习，而Zipfian分布可使模型同时实现上下文学习与权重学习，且此能力仅在Transformer中出现。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构与自然数据分布特性协同作用，驱动上下文学习能力的涌现，未来可探索在非语言领域结合两种学习模式的方法。

search_text: Data Distributional Properties Drive Emergent In-Context Learning in Transformers 数据分布特性推动 Transformers 中的紧急情境学习 Large transformer-based models are able to perform in-context few-shot learning, without being explicitly trained for it. This observation raises the question: what aspects of the training regime lead to this emergent behavior? Here, we show that this behavior is driven by the distributions of the training data itself. In-context learning emerges when the training data exhibits particular distributional properties such as burstiness (items appear in clusters rather than being uniformly distributed over time) and having large numbers of rarely occurring classes. In-context learning also emerges more strongly when item meanings or interpretations are dynamic rather than fixed. These properties are exemplified by natural language, but are also inherent to naturalistic data in a wide range of other domains. They also depart significantly from the uniform, i.i.d. training distributions typically used for standard supervised learning. In our initial experiments, we found that in-context learning traded off against more conventional weight-based learning, and models were unable to achieve both simultaneously. However, our later experiments uncovered that the two modes of learning could co-exist in a single model when it was trained on data following a skewed Zipfian distribution -- another common property of naturalistic data, including language. In further experiments, we found that naturalistic data distributions were only able to elicit in-context learning in transformers, and not in recurrent models. In sum, our findings indicate how the transformer architecture works together with particular properties of the training data to drive the intriguing emergent in-context learning behaviour of large language models, and how future work might encourage both in-context and in-weights learning in domains beyond language. 基于变压器的大型模型能够执行上下文中的小样本学习，而无需经过明确的训练。这一观察提出了一个问题：培训制度的哪些方面导致了这种突发行为？在这里，我们表明这种行为是由训练数据本身的分布驱动的。当训练数据表现出特定的分布特性时，例如突发性（项目出现在集群中，而不是随着时间的推移均匀分布）以及具有大量很少出现的类，上下文学习就会出现。当项目含义或解释是动态的而不是固定的时，情境学习也会更加强烈。这些属性以自然语言为例，但也是其他广泛领域中的自然数据所固有的。它们也与制服 i.i.d 显着不同。通常用于标准监督学习的训练分布。在我们最初的实验中，我们发现上下文学习与更传统的基于权重的学习之间存在权衡，并且模型无法同时实现两者。然而，我们后来的实验发现，当对遵循倾斜 Zipfian 分布的数据进行训练时，这两种学习模式可以在一个模型中共存，这是自然数据（包括语言）的另一个常见属性。在进一步的实验中，我们发现自然数据分布只能在 Transformer 中引发上下文学习，而不能在循环模型中引发。总之，我们的研究结果表明，变压器架构如何与训练数据的特定属性一起工作，以驱动大型语言模型有趣的新兴上下文学习行为，以及未来的工作如何鼓励语言以外领域的上下文和权重学习。 本文研究了训练数据的分布特性如何驱动Transformer模型产生上下文内学习能力。 Stephanie C. authors_text: T. Hennen,A. Elias,J. F. Nodin,G. Molas,R. Waser,D. J. Wouters,D. Bedau
title: A High Throughput Generative Vector Autoregression Model for Stochastic Synapses
title_zh: 随机突触的高通量生成向量自回归模型
abstract: By imitating the synaptic connectivity and plasticity of the brain, emerging electronic nanodevices offer new opportunities as the building blocks of neuromorphic systems. One challenge for largescale simulations of computational architectures based on emerging devices is to accurately capture device response, hysteresis, noise, and the covariance structure in the temporal domain as well as between the different device parameters. We address this challenge with a high throughput generative model for synaptic arrays that is based on a recently available type of electrical measurement data for resistive memory cells. We map this real world data onto a vector autoregressive stochastic process to accurately reproduce the device parameters and their cross-correlation structure. While closely matching the measured data, our model is still very fast; we provide parallelized implementations for both CPUs and GPUs and demonstrate array sizes above one billion cells and throughputs exceeding one hundred million weight updates per second, above the pixel rate of a 30 frames/s 4K video stream.
summary: By imitating the synaptic connectivity and plasticity of the brain, emerging electronic nanodevices offer new opportunities as the building blocks of neuromorphic systems. One challenge for largescale simulations of computational architectures based on emerging devices is to accurately capture device response, hysteresis, noise, and the covariance structure in the temporal domain as well as between the different device parameters. We address this challenge with a high throughput generative model for synaptic arrays that is based on a recently available type of electrical measurement data for resistive memory cells. We map this real world data onto a vector autoregressive stochastic process to accurately reproduce the device parameters and their cross-correlation structure. While closely matching the measured data, our model is still very fast; we provide parallelized implementations for both CPUs and GPUs and demonstrate array sizes above one billion cells and throughputs exceeding one hundred million weight updates per second, above the pixel rate of a 30 frames/s 4K video stream.
abstract_zh: 通过模仿大脑的突触连接和可塑性，新兴的电子纳米设备为神经形态系统的构建模块提供了新的机会。基于新兴设备的计算架构的大规模模拟面临的一项挑战是准确捕获时域中以及不同设备参数之间的设备响应、滞后、噪声和协方差结构。我们通过突触阵列的高吞吐量生成模型来解决这一挑战，该模型基于最近可用的电阻存储单元电气测量数据类型。我们将现实世界的数据映射到矢量自回归随机过程上，以准确地再现设备参数及其互相关结构。在与测量数据紧密匹配的同时，我们的模型仍然非常快；我们为 CPU 和 GPU 提供并行化实现，并展示了超过 10 亿个单元的阵列大小和每秒超过 1 亿次权重更新的吞吐量，高于 30 帧/秒 4K 视频流的像素速率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量自回归的高吞吐量生成模型，用于精确且高效地模拟随机突触的时序特性及参数协方差结构。
AI.motivation: 新兴电子器件在模拟生物突触连接与可塑性方面具有潜力，但大规模仿真需解决器件响应、迟滞、噪声及参数间时序协方差的准确建模问题。
AI.method: 基于电阻存储器的实测数据，将真实世界数据映射到向量自回归随机过程，并开发了支持CPU/GPU并行计算的高效实现方案。
AI.result: 模型在保持与实测数据高度一致的同时，实现了超10亿单元阵列规模及每秒超1亿次权重更新的吞吐量，远超4K视频流像素率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于新兴器件的神经形态系统提供了兼顾精度与效率的大规模仿真解决方案，推动了类脑计算架构的发展。

authors_text: Michael J Mahoney,Lucas K Johnson,Abigail Z Guinan,Colin M Beier
title: Classification and mapping of low-statured 'shrubland' cover types in post-agricultural landscapes of the US Northeast
title_zh: 美国东北部后农业景观中低矮“灌木丛”覆盖类型的分类和制图
comment: 43 pages (35 main text, 8 supplementary materials); 11 figures (10 main text, 1 supplementary materials), 10 tables (4 main text, 6 supplementary materials)
comments: 43 pages (35 main text, 8 supplementary materials); 11 figures (10 main text, 1 supplementary materials), 10 tables (4 main text, 6 supplementary materials)
abstract: Novel plant communities reshape landscapes and pose challenges for land cover classification and mapping that can constrain research and stewardship efforts. In the US Northeast, emergence of low-statured woody vegetation, or shrublands, instead of secondary forests in post-agricultural landscapes is well-documented by field studies, but poorly understood from a landscape perspective, which limits the ability to systematically study and manage these lands. To address gaps in classification/mapping of low-statured cover types where they have been historically rare, we developed models to predict shrubland distributions at 30m resolution across New York State (NYS), using a stacked ensemble combining a random forest, gradient boosting machine, and artificial neural network to integrate remote sensing of structural (airborne LIDAR) and optical (satellite imagery) properties of vegetation cover. We first classified a 1m canopy height model (CHM), derived from a patchwork of available LIDAR coverages, to define shrubland presence/absence. Next, these non-contiguous maps were used to train a model ensemble based on temporally-segmented imagery to predict shrubland probability for the entire study landscape (NYS). Approximately 2.5% of the CHM coverage area was classified as shrubland. Models using Landsat predictors trained on the classified CHM were effective at identifying shrubland (test set AUC=0.893, real-world AUC=0.904), in discriminating between shrub/young forest and other cover classes, and produced qualitatively sensible maps, even when extending beyond the original training data. Our results suggest that incorporation of airborne LiDAR, even from a discontinuous patchwork of coverages, can improve land cover classification of historically rare but increasingly prevalent shrubland habitats across broader areas.

Next, these non-contiguous maps were used to train a model ensemble based on temporally-segmented imagery to predict shrubland probability for the entire study landscape (NYS). Approximately 2.5% of the CHM coverage area was classified as shrubland. Models using Landsat predictors trained on the classified CHM were effective at identifying shrubland (test set AUC=0.893, real-world AUC=0.904), in discriminating between shrub/young forest and other cover classes, and produced qualitatively sensible maps, even when extending beyond the original training data. Our results suggest that incorporation of airborne LiDAR, even from a discontinuous patchwork of coverages, can improve land cover classification of historically rare but increasingly prevalent shrubland habitats across broader areas.
abstract_zh: 新颖的植物群落重塑了景观，并对土地覆盖分类和制图提出了挑战，从而限制了研究和管理工作。在美国东北部，实地研究充分记录了后农业景观中出现的低矮木本植被或灌木丛，而不是次生林，但从景观角度了解甚少，这限制了系统研究和管理这些土地的能力。为了解决历史上罕见的低矮覆盖类型分类/制图方面的差距，我们开发了模型来预测纽约州 (NYS) 30m 分辨率的灌木丛分布，使用结合了随机森林、梯度增强机和人工神经网络的堆叠集成来集成植被覆盖结构（机载激光雷达）和光学（卫星图像）特性的遥感。我们首先对 1m 冠层高度模型 (CHM) 进行分类，该模型源自可用 LIDAR 覆盖范围的拼凑，以定义灌木丛的存在/不存在。接下来，这些不连续的地图用于训练基于时间分段图像的模型集合，以预测整个研究景观（NYS）的灌木丛概率。大约 2.5% 的 CHM 覆盖面积被归类为灌木丛。使用在分类 CHM 上训练的 Landsat 预测器的模型可以有效识别灌木丛（测试集 AUC=0.893，现实世界 AUC=0.904），区分灌木/幼林和其他覆盖类别，并生成定性合理的地图，即使超出原始训练数据也是如此。我们的结果表明，机载激光雷达的结合，即使是不连续的覆盖范围，也可以改善更广泛地区历史上罕见但日益普遍的灌木丛栖息地的土地覆盖分类。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在对美国东北部农业后景观中低矮灌木丛覆盖类型进行分类与制图，解决传统方法在景观尺度上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法难以有效识别和管理日益增多的灌木丛景观，限制了相关研究与生态保护工作的开展。
AI.method: 采用随机森林、梯度提升机和人工神经网络的堆叠集成模型，结合机载LIDAR结构数据与卫星光学影像进行预测建模。
AI.result: 模型在测试集和实际应用中AUC达0.893-0.904，成功识别约2.5%区域的灌木丛，并生成超出训练数据范围的有效地图。
AI.conclusion: 即使LIDAR数据不连续，结合多源遥感数据的集成模型仍能显著提升对历史罕见灌木丛景观的分类精度与制图能力。

search_text: Classification and mapping of low-statured 'shrubland' cover types in post-agricultural landscapes of the US Northeast 美国东北部后农业景观中低矮“灌木丛”覆盖类型的分类和制图 Novel plant communities reshape landscapes and pose challenges for land cover classification and mapping that can constrain research and stewardship efforts. In the US Northeast, emergence of low-statured woody vegetation, or shrublands, instead of secondary forests in post-agricultural landscapes is well-documented by field studies, but poorly understood from a landscape perspective, which limits the ability to systematically study and manage these lands. To address gaps in classification/mapping of low-statured cover types where they have been historically rare, we developed models to predict shrubland distributions at 30m resolution across New York State (NYS), using a stacked ensemble combining a random forest, gradient boosting machine, and artificial neural network to integrate remote sensing of structural (airborne LIDAR) and optical (satellite imagery) properties of vegetation cover. We first classified a 1m canopy height model (CHM), derived from a patchwork of available LIDAR coverages, to define shrubland presence/absence. Next, these non-contiguous maps were used to train a model ensemble based on temporally-segmented imagery to predict shrubland probability for the entire study landscape (NYS). Approximately 2.5% of the CHM coverage area was classified as shrubland. Models using Landsat predictors trained on the classified CHM were effective at identifying shrubland (test set AUC=0.893, real-world AUC=0.904), in discriminating between shrub/young forest and other cover classes, and produced qualitatively sensible maps, even when extending beyond the original training data. Our results suggest that incorporation of airborne LiDAR, even from a discontinuous patchwork of coverages, can improve land cover classification of historically rare but increasingly prevalent shrubland habitats across broader areas. 新颖的植物群落重塑了景观，并对土地覆盖分类和制图提出了挑战，从而限制了研究和管理工作。在美国东北部，实地研究充分记录了后农业景观中出现的低矮木本植被或灌木丛，而不是次生林，但从景观角度了解甚少，这限制了系统研究和管理这些土地的能力。为了解决历史上罕见的低矮覆盖类型分类/制图方面的差距，我们开发了模型来预测纽约州 (NYS) 30m 分辨率的灌木丛分布，使用结合了随机森林、梯度增强机和人工神经网络的堆叠集成来集成植被覆盖结构（机载激光雷达）和光学（卫星图像）特性的遥感。我们首先对 1m 冠层高度模型 (CHM) 进行分类，该模型源自可用 LIDAR 覆盖范围的拼凑，以定义灌木丛的存在/不存在。接下来，这些不连续的地图用于训练基于时间分段图像的模型集合，以预测整个研究景观（NYS）的灌木丛概率。大约 2.5% 的 CHM 覆盖面积被归类为灌木丛。使用在分类 CHM 上训练的 Landsat 预测器的模型可以有效识别灌木丛（测试集 AUC=0.893，现实世界 AUC=0.904），区分灌木/幼林和其他覆盖类别，并生成定性合理的地图，即使超出原始训练数据也是如此。我们的结果表明，机载激光雷达的结合，即使是不连续的覆盖范围，也可以改善更广泛地区历史上罕见但日益普遍的灌木丛栖息地的土地覆盖分类。 本文旨在对美国东北部农业后景观中低矮灌木丛覆盖类型进行分类与制图，解决传统方法在景观尺度上的不足。 Michael J Mahoney,Lucas K Johnson,Abigail Z Guinan,Colin M Beier cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.AP

title: Environmental Sensing Options for Robot Teams: A Computational Complexity Perspective
title_zh: 机器人团队的环境传感选项：计算复杂性的角度
comment: 77 pages, 7 figures
comments: 77 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Visual and scalar-field (e.g., chemical) sensing are two of the options robot teams can use to perceive their environments when performing tasks. We give the first comparison of the computational characteristic of visual and scalar-field sensing, phrased in terms of the computational complexities of verifying and designing teams of robots to efficiently and robustly perform distributed construction tasks. This is done relative a basic model in which teams of robots with deterministic finite-state controllers operate in a synchronous error-free manner in 2D grid-based environments. Our results show that for both types of sensing, all of our problems are polynomial-time intractable in general and remain intractable under a variety of restrictions on parameters characterizing robot controllers, teams, and environments. That being said, these results also include restricted situations for each of our problems in which those problems are effectively polynomial-time tractable. Though there are some differences, our results suggest that (at least in this stage of our investigation) verification and design problems relative to visual and scalar-field sensing have roughly the same patterns and types of tractability and intractability results.
summary: Visual and scalar-field (e.g., chemical) sensing are two of the options robot teams can use to perceive their environments when performing tasks. We give the first comparison of the computational characteristic of visual and scalar-field sensing, phrased in terms of the computational complexities of verifying and designing teams of robots to efficiently and robustly perform distributed construction tasks. This is done relative a basic model in which teams of robots with deterministic finite-state controllers operate in a synchronous error-free manner in 2D grid-based environments. Our results show that for both types of sensing, all of our problems are polynomial-time intractable in general and remain intractable under a variety of restrictions on parameters characterizing robot controllers, teams, and environments. That being said, these results also include restricted situations for each of our problems in which those problems are effectively polynomial-time tractable. Though there are some differences, our results suggest that (at least in this stage of our investigation) verification and design problems relative to visual and scalar-field sensing have roughly the same patterns and types of tractability and intractability results.
abstract_zh: 视觉和标量场（例如化学）传感是机器人团队在执行任务时可以用来感知环境的两种选择。我们首次比较了视觉和标量场传感的计算特征，以验证和设计机器人团队以高效、鲁棒地执行分布式施工任务的计算复杂性来表述。这是相对于基本模型完成的，在该模型中，具有确定性有限状态控制器的机器人团队在基于二维网格的环境中以同步无差错方式操作。我们的结果表明，对于这两种类型的传感，我们的所有问题通常都是多项式时间难以解决的，并且在表征机器人控制器、团队和环境的参数的各种限制下仍然难以解决。话虽这么说，这些结果还包括我们每个问题的限制情况，其中这些问题实际上是多项式时间可处理的。尽管存在一些差异，但我们的结果表明（至少在我们调查的这个阶段）与视觉和标量场传感相关的验证和设计问题具有大致相同的易处理和难处理结果的模式和类型。

AI.tldr: 本文从计算复杂度的角度比较了机器人团队使用视觉感知和标量场感知（如化学感知）在分布式构建任务中的计算特性。
AI.motivation: 理解机器人团队在不同环境感知方式下的计算复杂性，有助于优化任务验证与设计的效率，从而提升分布式系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 基于同步无错误的2D网格环境模型，通过分析确定性有限状态控制器的计算复杂性，比较视觉感知与标量场感知在验证与设计问题上的复杂度差异。
AI.result: 两种感知方式在一般情况下均为多项式时间不可行，但在特定参数限制下存在有效多项式时间可解的情况，且复杂度模式相似。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究显示，视觉与标量场感知在计算复杂性上呈现相似的可解性模式，尚未发现显著差异。

ai_content.tldr: 本文从计算复杂度的角度比较了机器人团队使用视觉感知和标量场感知（如化学感知）在分布式构建任务中的计算特性。

title: A Quantitative Symbolic Approach to Individual Human Reasoning
title_zh: 人类个体推理的定量符号方法
abstract: Cognitive theories for reasoning are about understanding how humans come to conclusions from a set of premises. Starting from hypothetical thoughts, we are interested which are the implications behind basic everyday language and how do we reason with them. A widely studied topic is whether cognitive theories can account for typical reasoning tasks and be confirmed by own empirical experiments. This paper takes a different view and we do not propose a theory, but instead take findings from the literature and show how these, formalized as cognitive principles within a logical framework, can establish a quantitative notion of reasoning, which we call plausibility. For this purpose, we employ techniques from non-monotonic reasoning and computer science, namely, a solving paradigm called answer set programming (ASP). Finally, we can fruitfully use plausibility reasoning in ASP to test the effects of an existing experiment and explain different majority responses.
summary: Cognitive theories for reasoning are about understanding how humans come to conclusions from a set of premises. Starting from hypothetical thoughts, we are interested which are the implications behind basic everyday language and how do we reason with them. A widely studied topic is whether cognitive theories can account for typical reasoning tasks and be confirmed by own empirical experiments. This paper takes a different view and we do not propose a theory, but instead take findings from the literature and show how these, formalized as cognitive principles within a logical framework, can establish a quantitative notion of reasoning, which we call plausibility. For this purpose, we employ techniques from non-monotonic reasoning and computer science, namely, a solving paradigm called answer set programming (ASP). Finally, we can fruitfully use plausibility reasoning in ASP to test the effects of an existing experiment and explain different majority responses.
abstract_zh: 推理认知理论是关于理解人类如何从一组前提得出结论。从假设的想法开始，我们感兴趣的是基本日常语言背后的含义以及我们如何用它们进行推理。一个广泛研究的话题是认知理论是否可以解释典型的推理任务并通过自己的经验实验得到证实。本文采取了不同的观点，我们不提出理论，而是从文献中获取发现，并展示这些在逻辑框架内形式化为认知原则的方法如何建立定量的推理概念，我们称之为合理性。为此，我们采用非单调推理和计算机科学的技术，即称为答案集编程（ASP）的解决范式。最后，我们可以有效地使用 ASP 中的合理性推理来测试现有实验的效果并解释不同的多数响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于符号逻辑的量化方法，用于分析个体人类推理过程，并通过答案集编程（ASP）技术验证实验效果。
AI.motivation: 传统认知理论难以量化日常语言推理的逻辑规则，需建立可形式化、可计算的推理模型以解释人类决策机制。
AI.method: 整合非单调推理与ASP技术，将认知原则形式化为逻辑框架，构建量化推理模型（可计算的合理性概念）进行实验验证。
AI.result: 成功应用该模型分析既有实验数据，解释了不同情境下多数人的推理反应差异。
AI.conclusion: 量化符号方法能有效建模人类推理过程，为认知科学与人工智能的交叉研究提供新工具。

search_text: A Quantitative Symbolic Approach to Individual Human Reasoning 人类个体推理的定量符号方法 Cognitive theories for reasoning are about understanding how humans come to conclusions from a set of premises. Starting from hypothetical thoughts, we are interested which are the implications behind basic everyday language and how do we reason with them. A widely studied topic is whether cognitive theories can account for typical reasoning tasks and be confirmed by own empirical experiments. This paper takes a different view and we do not propose a theory, but instead take findings from the literature and show how these, formalized as cognitive principles within a logical framework, can establish a quantitative notion of reasoning, which we call plausibility. For this purpose, we employ techniques from non-monotonic reasoning and computer science, namely, a solving paradigm called answer set programming (ASP). Finally, we can fruitfully use plausibility reasoning in ASP to test the effects of an existing experiment and explain different majority responses. 推理认知理论是关于理解人类如何从一组前提得出结论。从假设的想法开始，我们感兴趣的是基本日常语言背后的含义以及我们如何用它们进行推理。一个广泛研究的话题是认知理论是否可以解释典型的推理任务并通过自己的经验实验得到证实。本文采取了不同的观点，我们不提出理论，而是从文献中获取发现，并展示这些在逻辑框架内形式化为认知原则的方法如何建立定量的推理概念，我们称之为合理性。为此，我们采用非单调推理和计算机科学的技术，即称为答案集编程（ASP）的解决范式。最后，我们可以有效地使用 ASP 中的合理性推理来测试现有实验的效果并解释不同的多数响应。 本文提出一种基于符号逻辑的量化方法，用于分析个体人类推理过程，并通过答案集编程（ASP）技术验证实验效果。 Emmanuelle Dietz,Johannes K. Fichte,Florim Hamiti cs.AI

authors_text: Antoine Yang,Antoine Miech,Josef Sivic,Ivan Laptev,Cordelia Schmid
title: Learning to Answer Visual Questions from Web Videos
title_zh: 学习回答网络视频中的视觉问题
comment: Accepted at the TPAMI Special Issue on the Best Papers of ICCV 2021. Journal extension of the conference paper arXiv:2012.00451. 16 pages, 13 figures
comments: Accepted at the TPAMI Special Issue on the Best Papers of ICCV 2021. Journal extension of the conference paper arXiv:2012.00451. 16 pages, 13 figures
abstract: Recent methods for visual question answering rely on large-scale annotated datasets. Manual annotation of questions and answers for videos, however, is tedious, expensive and prevents scalability. In this work, we propose to avoid manual annotation and generate a large-scale training dataset for video question answering making use of automatic cross-modal supervision. We leverage a question generation transformer trained on text data and use it to generate question-answer pairs from transcribed video narrations. Given narrated videos, we then automatically generate the HowToVQA69M dataset with 69M video-question-answer triplets. To handle the open vocabulary of diverse answers in this dataset, we propose a training procedure based on a contrastive loss between a video-question multi-modal transformer and an answer transformer. We introduce the zero-shot VideoQA task and the VideoQA feature probe evaluation setting and show excellent results, in particular for rare answers. Furthermore, our method achieves competitive results on MSRVTT-QA, ActivityNet-QA, MSVD-QA and How2QA datasets. We also show that our VideoQA dataset generation approach generalizes to another source of web video and text data. We use our method to generate the WebVidVQA3M dataset from the WebVid dataset, i.e., videos with alt-text annotations, and show its benefits for training VideoQA models. Finally, for a detailed evaluation we introduce iVQA, a new VideoQA dataset with reduced language bias and high-quality manual annotations. Code, datasets and trained models are available at https://antoyang.github.io/just-ask.html
summary: Recent methods for visual question answering rely on large-scale annotated datasets. Manual annotation of questions and answers for videos, however, is tedious, expensive and prevents scalability. In this work, we propose to avoid manual annotation and generate a large-scale training dataset for video question answering making use of automatic cross-modal supervision. We leverage a question generation transformer trained on text data and use it to generate question-answer pairs from transcribed video narrations. Given narrated videos, we then automatically generate the HowToVQA69M dataset with 69M video-question-answer triplets. To handle the open vocabulary of diverse answers in this dataset, we propose a training procedure based on a contrastive loss between a video-question multi-modal transformer and an answer transformer. We introduce the zero-shot VideoQA task and the VideoQA feature probe evaluation setting and show excellent results, in particular for rare answers. Furthermore, our method achieves competitive results on MSRVTT-QA, ActivityNet-QA, MSVD-QA and How2QA datasets. We also show that our VideoQA dataset generation approach generalizes to another source of web video and text data. We use our method to generate the WebVidVQA3M dataset from the WebVid dataset, i.e., videos with alt-text annotations, and show its benefits for training VideoQA models. Finally, for a detailed evaluation we introduce iVQA, a new VideoQA dataset with reduced language bias and high-quality manual annotations. Code, datasets and trained models are available at https://antoyang.github.io/just-ask.html
abstract_zh: 最近的视觉问答方法依赖于大规模带注释的数据集。然而，对视频问题和答案进行手动注释既繁琐又昂贵，并且阻碍了可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们建议避免手动注释，并利用自动跨模式监督生成用于视频问答的大规模训练数据集。我们利用在文本数据上训练的问题生成转换器，并使用它从转录的视频旁白生成问答对。给定叙述视频，我们会自动生成包含 69M 视频-问题-答案三元组的 HowToVQA69M 数据集。为了处理该数据集中不同答案的开放词汇，我们提出了一种基于视频问题多模态转换器和答案转换器之间的对比损失的训练程序。我们引入了零样本 VideoQA 任务和 VideoQA 特征探测评估设置，并显示出出色的结果，特别是对于罕见的答案。此外，我们的方法在 MSRVTT-QA、ActivityNet-QA、MSVD-QA 和 How2QA 数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果。我们还表明，我们的 VideoQA 数据集生成方法可以推广到网络视频和文本数据的另一个来源。我们使用我们的方法从 WebVid 数据集（即带有替代文本注释的视频）生成 WebVidVQA3M 数据集，并展示其对于训练 VideoQA 模型的好处。最后，为了进行详细评估，我们引入了 iVQA，这是一个新的 VideoQA 数据集，具有减少的语言偏差和高质量的手动注释。代码、数据集和训练模型可在 https://antoyang.github.io/just-ask.html 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的视觉问答（VideoQA）方法，通过自动跨模态监督生成大规模训练数据集，并改进模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉问答方法依赖大规模人工标注数据集，但人工标注成本高且难以扩展，因此需探索自动化数据生成方案。
AI.method: 利用文本训练的问答生成模型，从视频字幕自动生成问题-答案对，构建包含69M三元组的HowToVQA69M数据集；采用对比损失训练多模态与答案Transformer，引入零样本任务及iVQA数据集评估。
AI.result: 在MSRVTT-QA等数据集上取得竞争力结果，对罕见答案效果显著；方法可扩展至WebVid生成WebVidVQA3M数据集，且iVQA验证了模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了大规模VideoQA数据的自动化生成，提升了模型在罕见答案场景下的性能，且具有跨数据源的泛化能力，为未来研究提供了新数据与评估基准。

authors_text: Sai Vidyaranya Nuthalapati,Marcela Vizcaychipi,Pallav Shah,Piotr Chudzik,Chee Hau Leow,Paria Yousefi,Ahmed Selim,Keiran Tait,Ben Irving
title: Using Deep Learning-based Features Extracted from CT scans to Predict Outcomes in COVID-19 Patients
title_zh: 使用从 CT 扫描中提取的基于深度学习的特征来预测 COVID-19 患者的结果
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has had a considerable impact on day-to-day life. Tackling the disease by providing the necessary resources to the affected is of paramount importance. However, estimation of the required resources is not a trivial task given the number of factors which determine the requirement. This issue can be addressed by predicting the probability that an infected patient requires Intensive Care Unit (ICU) support and the importance of each of the factors that influence it. Moreover, to assist the doctors in determining the patients at high risk of fatality, the probability of death is also calculated. For determining both the patient outcomes (ICU admission and death), a novel methodology is proposed by combining multi-modal features, extracted from Computed Tomography (CT) scans and Electronic Health Record (EHR) data. Deep learning models are leveraged to extract quantitative features from CT scans. These features combined with those directly read from the EHR database are fed into machine learning models to eventually output the probabilities of patient outcomes. This work demonstrates both the ability to apply a broad set of deep learning methods for general quantification of Chest CT scans and the ability to link these quantitative metrics to patient outcomes. The effectiveness of the proposed method is shown by testing it on an internally curated dataset, achieving a mean area under Receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) of 0.77 on ICU admission prediction and a mean AUC of 0.73 on death prediction using the best performing classifiers.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has had a considerable impact on day-to-day life. Tackling the disease by providing the necessary resources to the affected is of paramount importance. However, estimation of the required resources is not a trivial task given the number of factors which determine the requirement. This issue can be addressed by predicting the probability that an infected patient requires Intensive Care Unit (ICU) support and the importance of each of the factors that influence it. Moreover, to assist the doctors in determining the patients at high risk of fatality, the probability of death is also calculated. For determining both the patient outcomes (ICU admission and death), a novel methodology is proposed by combining multi-modal features, extracted from Computed Tomography (CT) scans and Electronic Health Record (EHR) data. Deep learning models are leveraged to extract quantitative features from CT scans. These features combined with those directly read from the EHR database are fed into machine learning models to eventually output the probabilities of patient outcomes. This work demonstrates both the ability to apply a broad set of deep learning methods for general quantification of Chest CT scans and the ability to link these quantitative metrics to patient outcomes. The effectiveness of the proposed method is shown by testing it on an internally curated dataset, achieving a mean area under Receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) of 0.77 on ICU admission prediction and a mean AUC of 0.73 on death prediction using the best performing classifiers.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行对日常生活产生了相当大的影响。通过向受影响者提供必要的资源来应对这种疾病至关重要。然而，考虑到决定需求的因素有很多，估计所需资源并不是一项简单的任务。这个问题可以通过预测受感染患者需要重症监护病房 (ICU) 支持的概率以及影响它的每个因素的重要性来解决。此外，为了协助医生确定死亡高危患者，还计算了死亡概率。为了确定患者的结果（ICU 入院和死亡），通过结合从计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描和电子健康记录 (EHR) 数据中提取的多模态特征，提出了一种新的方法。利用深度学习模型从 CT 扫描中提取定量特征。这些特征与直接从 EHR 数据库读取的特征相结合，被输入机器学习模型，最终输出患者结果的概率。这项工作展示了应用广泛的深度学习方法对胸部 CT 扫描进行一般量化的能力，以及将这些定量指标与患者结果联系起来的能力。通过在内部管理的数据集上进行测试，证明了所提出方法的有效性，使用性能最佳的分类器，ICU 入院预测的接收者操作特征曲线 (AUC) 下的平均面积 (AUC) 为 0.77，死亡预测的平均 AUC 为 0.73。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CT扫描深度学习特征与电子健康记录（EHR）数据的方法，用于预测COVID-19患者的ICU入院和死亡概率。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情下准确预测患者重症风险对资源分配和临床决策至关重要，但现有方法难以综合多模态数据并量化CT影像特征。
AI.method: 利用深度学习模型从CT扫描中提取定量特征，结合EHR数据构建机器学习模型，通过多模态特征融合预测患者结局。
AI.result: 在内部数据集上实现ICU入院预测AUC均值0.77，死亡预测AUC均值0.73，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了深度学习量化CT影像特征的能力及其与临床结局的关联性，为临床风险分层提供了新工具。
