search_text: Shadow-Aware Dynamic Convolution for Shadow Removal 用于阴影去除的阴影感知动态卷积 With a wide range of shadows in many collected images, shadow removal has aroused increasing attention since uncontaminated images are of vital importance for many downstream multimedia tasks. Current methods consider the same convolution operations for both shadow and non-shadow regions while ignoring the large gap between the color mappings for the shadow region and the non-shadow region, leading to poor quality of reconstructed images and a heavy computation burden. To solve this problem, this paper introduces a novel plug-and-play Shadow-Aware Dynamic Convolution (SADC) module to decouple the interdependence between the shadow region and the non-shadow region. Inspired by the fact that the color mapping of the non-shadow region is easier to learn, our SADC processes the non-shadow region with a lightweight convolution module in a computationally cheap manner and recovers the shadow region with a more complicated convolution module to ensure the quality of image reconstruction. Given that the non-shadow region often contains more background color information, we further develop a novel intra-convolution distillation loss to strengthen the information flow from the non-shadow region to the shadow region. Extensive experiments on the ISTD and SRD datasets show our method achieves better performance in shadow removal over many state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/xuyimin0926/SADC. 由于许多收集的图像中存在广泛的阴影，阴影去除引起了越来越多的关注，因为未受污染的图像对于许多下游多媒体任务至关重要。当前的方法考虑对阴影和非阴影区域进行相同的卷积操作，而忽略了阴影区域和非阴影区域的颜色映射之间的大差距，导致重建图像的质量差和计算负担重。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了一种新颖的即插即用阴影感知动态卷积（SADC）模块来解耦阴影区域和非阴影区域之间的相互依赖性。受非阴影区域的颜色映射更容易学习这一事实的启发，我们的SADC以计算成本低的方式使用轻量级卷积模块处理非阴影区域，并使用更复杂的卷积模块恢复阴影区域，以确保图像重建的质量。鉴于非阴影区域通常包含更多的背景颜色信息，我们进一步开发了一种新颖的卷积内蒸馏损失，以加强从非阴影区域到阴影区域的信息流。对 ISTD 和 SRD 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法在阴影去除方面比许多最先进的方法取得了更好的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/xuyimin0926/SADC 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Shadow-Aware Dynamic Convolution (SADC)的模块，用于改进阴影去除任务中的图像重建质量并减少计算负担。 Yimin Xu,Mingbao Lin,Hong Yang,Fei Chao,Rongrong Ji cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Yuanwei Liu,Nian Liu,Qinglong Cao,Xiwen Yao,Junwei Han,Ling Shao
title: Learning Non-target Knowledge for Few-shot Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 学习非目标知识进行小样本语义分割
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022
abstract: Existing studies in few-shot semantic segmentation only focus on mining the target object information, however, often are hard to tell ambiguous regions, especially in non-target regions, which include background (BG) and Distracting Objects (DOs). To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel framework, namely Non-Target Region Eliminating (NTRE) network, to explicitly mine and eliminate BG and DO regions in the query. First, a BG Mining Module (BGMM) is proposed to extract the BG region via learning a general BG prototype. To this end, we design a BG loss to supervise the learning of BGMM only using the known target object segmentation ground truth. Then, a BG Eliminating Module and a DO Eliminating Module are proposed to successively filter out the BG and DO information from the query feature, based on which we can obtain a BG and DO-free target object segmentation result. Furthermore, we propose a prototypical contrastive learning algorithm to improve the model ability of distinguishing the target object from DOs. Extensive experiments on both PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i datasets show that our approach is effective despite its simplicity.
summary: Existing studies in few-shot semantic segmentation only focus on mining the target object information, however, often are hard to tell ambiguous regions, especially in non-target regions, which include background (BG) and Distracting Objects (DOs). To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel framework, namely Non-Target Region Eliminating (NTRE) network, to explicitly mine and eliminate BG and DO regions in the query. First, a BG Mining Module (BGMM) is proposed to extract the BG region via learning a general BG prototype. To this end, we design a BG loss to supervise the learning of BGMM only using the known target object segmentation ground truth. Then, a BG Eliminating Module and a DO Eliminating Module are proposed to successively filter out the BG and DO information from the query feature, based on which we can obtain a BG and DO-free target object segmentation result. Furthermore, we propose a prototypical contrastive learning algorithm to improve the model ability of distinguishing the target object from DOs. Extensive experiments on both PASCAL-5i and COCO-20i datasets show that our approach is effective despite its simplicity.
abstract_zh: 现有的少样本语义分割研究仅集中于挖掘目标对象信息，然而，通常很难区分模糊区域，特别是在非目标区域，其中包括背景（BG）和干扰对象（DO）。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新的框架，即非目标区域消除（NTRE）网络，来显式挖掘和消除查询中的 BG 和 DO 区域。首先，提出了 BG 挖掘模块（BGMM），通过学习通用 BG 原型来提取 BG 区域。为此，我们设计了一个 BG 损失来仅使用已知的目标对象分割地面实况来监督 BGMM 的学习。然后，提出BG消除模块和DO消除模块，依次从查询特征中过滤掉BG和DO信息，基于此我们可以获得无BG和DO的目标对象分割结果。此外，我们提出了一种原型对比学习算法来提高区分目标对象和 DO 的模型能力。对 PASCAL-5i 和 COCO-20i 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法尽管简单，但仍然有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种少样本语义分割方法，通过挖掘和消除非目标区域（背景和干扰物）来提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分割方法仅关注目标对象信息，难以处理非目标区域的模糊性问题，导致分割结果不准确。
AI.method: 设计NTRE框架，包含BGMM模块提取背景原型、BG/DO消除模块过滤非目标信息，并结合对比学习增强目标与干扰物区分能力。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5i和COCO-20i数据集上实验验证，所提方法在保持简洁性的同时显著提升分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式消除非目标区域信息，本文方法有效解决了少样本分割中的模糊区域问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Ningtao Liu,Ruoxi Gao,Jing Yuan,Calire Park,Shuwei Xing,Shuiping Gou
title: GRU-TV: Time- and velocity-aware GRU for patient representation on multivariate clinical time-series data
title_zh: GRU-TV：时间和速度感知 GRU，用于多变量临床时间序列数据上的患者表示
abstract: Electronic health records (EHRs) are usually highly dimensional, heterogeneous, and multimodal. Besides, the random recording of clinical variables results in high missing rates and uneven time intervals between adjacent records in the multivariate clinical time-series data extracted from EHRs. Current works using clinical time-series data for patient representation regard the patients' physiological status as a discrete process described by sporadically collected records. However, changes in the patient's physiological condition are continuous and dynamic processes. The perception of time and velocity of change is crucial for patient representation learning. In this study, we propose a time- and velocity-aware gated recurrent unit model (GRU-TV) for patient representation learning of clinical multivariate time-series data in a time-continuous manner. The neural ordinary differential equations (ODEs) and velocity perception mechanism are applied to perceive the time interval between adjacent records and changing rate of the patient's physiological status, respectively. Our experiments on two real clinical EHR datasets (PhysioNet2012, MIMIC-III) establish that GRU-TV is a robust model on computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) tasks, especially on sequences with high-variance time intervals.
summary: Electronic health records (EHRs) are usually highly dimensional, heterogeneous, and multimodal. Besides, the random recording of clinical variables results in high missing rates and uneven time intervals between adjacent records in the multivariate clinical time-series data extracted from EHRs. Current works using clinical time-series data for patient representation regard the patients' physiological status as a discrete process described by sporadically collected records. However, changes in the patient's physiological condition are continuous and dynamic processes. The perception of time and velocity of change is crucial for patient representation learning. In this study, we propose a time- and velocity-aware gated recurrent unit model (GRU-TV) for patient representation learning of clinical multivariate time-series data in a time-continuous manner. The neural ordinary differential equations (ODEs) and velocity perception mechanism are applied to perceive the time interval between adjacent records and changing rate of the patient's physiological status, respectively. Our experiments on two real clinical EHR datasets (PhysioNet2012, MIMIC-III) establish that GRU-TV is a robust model on computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) tasks, especially on sequences with high-variance time intervals.
abstract_zh: 电子健康记录 (EHR) 通常是高维、异构和多模式的。此外，临床变量的随机记录导致从EHR中提取的多变量临床时间序列数据中缺失率较高且相邻记录之间的时间间隔不均匀。当前使用临床时间序列数据来代表患者的工作将患者的生理状态视为由零星收集的记录描述的离散过程。然而，患者生理状况的变化是连续的、动态的过程。对时间和变化速度的感知对于患者表征学习至关重要。在本研究中，我们提出了一种时间和速度感知的门控循环单元模型（GRU-TV），用于以时间连续的方式对临床多变量时间序列数据进行患者表征学习。应用神经常微分方程（ODE）和速度感知机制分别感知相邻记录之间的时间间隔和患者生理状态的变化率。我们在两个真实临床 EHR 数据集（PhysioNet2012、MIMIC-III）上进行的实验表明，GRU-TV 是计算机辅助诊断 (CAD) 任务的稳健模型，尤其是在具有高方差时间间隔的序列上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合时间和速度感知的门控循环单元模型（GRU-TV），用于处理多变量临床时间序列数据中的患者表示问题，以解决电子健康记录（EHR）中数据缺失和时间间隔不均的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将患者生理状态视为离散过程，忽略了其连续动态变化特性。时间间隔和变化速率对患者表示学习至关重要，需通过模型改进以提升临床诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用神经常微分方程（ODEs）感知相邻记录的时间间隔，并引入速度感知机制捕捉患者生理状态的变化速率，从而在时间连续性框架下建模多变量临床时间序列。
AI.result: 在PhysioNet2012和MIMIC-III两个真实临床数据集上的实验表明，GRU-TV在计算机辅助诊断（CAD）任务中表现稳健，尤其在时间间隔高度不规则的序列中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: GRU-TV通过融合时间与速度感知机制，有效提升了多变量临床时间序列数据的患者表示能力，为动态生理状态建模提供了新思路。

The neural ordinary differential equations (ODEs) and velocity perception mechanism are applied to perceive the time interval between adjacent records and changing rate of the patient's physiological status, respectively. Our experiments on two real clinical EHR datasets (PhysioNet2012, MIMIC-III) establish that GRU-TV is a robust model on computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) tasks, especially on sequences with high-variance time intervals. 电子健康记录 (EHR) 通常是高维、异构和多模式的。此外，临床变量的随机记录导致从EHR中提取的多变量临床时间序列数据中缺失率较高且相邻记录之间的时间间隔不均匀。当前使用临床时间序列数据来代表患者的工作将患者的生理状态视为由零星收集的记录描述的离散过程。然而，患者生理状况的变化是连续的、动态的过程。对时间和变化速度的感知对于患者表征学习至关重要。在本研究中，我们提出了一种时间和速度感知的门控循环单元模型（GRU-TV），用于以时间连续的方式对临床多变量时间序列数据进行患者表征学习。应用神经常微分方程（ODE）和速度感知机制分别感知相邻记录之间的时间间隔和患者生理状态的变化率。我们在两个真实临床 EHR 数据集（PhysioNet2012、MIMIC-III）上进行的实验表明，GRU-TV 是计算机辅助诊断 (CAD) 任务的稳健模型，尤其是在具有高方差时间间隔的序列上。 本文提出了一种结合时间和速度感知的门控循环单元模型（GRU-TV），用于处理多变量临床时间序列数据中的患者表示问题，以解决电子健康记录（EHR）中数据缺失和时间间隔不均的问题。 Ningtao Liu,Ruoxi Gao,Jing Yuan,Calire Park,Shuwei Xing,Shuiping Gou cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Martin Tappler,Filip Cano Córdoba,Bernhard K. Aichernig,Bettina Könighofer
title: Search-Based Testing of Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于搜索的强化学习测试
comment: 11 pages, 15 figures, Accepted at IJCAI-ECAI 2022 (Main Track)
comments: 11 pages, 15 figures, Accepted at IJCAI-ECAI 2022 (Main Track)
abstract: Evaluation of deep reinforcement learning (RL) is inherently challenging. Especially the opaqueness of learned policies and the stochastic nature of both agents and environments make testing the behavior of deep RL agents difficult. We present a search-based testing framework that enables a wide range of novel analysis capabilities for evaluating the safety and performance of deep RL agents. For safety testing, our framework utilizes a search algorithm that searches for a reference trace that solves the RL task. The backtracking states of the search, called boundary states, pose safety-critical situations. We create safety test-suites that evaluate how well the RL agent escapes safety-critical situations near these boundary states. For robust performance testing, we create a diverse set of traces via fuzz testing. These fuzz traces are used to bring the agent into a wide variety of potentially unknown states from which the average performance of the agent is compared to the average performance of the fuzz traces. We apply our search-based testing approach on RL for Nintendo's Super Mario Bros.
summary: Evaluation of deep reinforcement learning (RL) is inherently challenging. Especially the opaqueness of learned policies and the stochastic nature of both agents and environments make testing the behavior of deep RL agents difficult. We present a search-based testing framework that enables a wide range of novel analysis capabilities for evaluating the safety and performance of deep RL agents. For safety testing, our framework utilizes a search algorithm that searches for a reference trace that solves the RL task. The backtracking states of the search, called boundary states, pose safety-critical situations. We create safety test-suites that evaluate how well the RL agent escapes safety-critical situations near these boundary states. For robust performance testing, we create a diverse set of traces via fuzz testing. These fuzz traces are used to bring the agent into a wide variety of potentially unknown states from which the average performance of the agent is compared to the average performance of the fuzz traces. We apply our search-based testing approach on RL for Nintendo's Super Mario Bros.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）的评估本质上是具有挑战性的。特别是学习策略的不透明性以及代理和环境的随机性使得测试深度强化学习代理的行为变得困难。我们提出了一个基于搜索的测试框架，该框架支持各种新颖的分析功能，用于评估深度强化学习代理的安全性和性能。对于安全测试，我们的框架利用搜索算法来搜索解决 RL 任务的参考轨迹。搜索的回溯状态（称为边界状态）会造成安全关键情况。我们创建了安全测试套件，用于评估 RL 代理在这些边界状态附近逃脱安全关键情况的能力。为了进行稳健的性能测试，我们通过模糊测试创建了一组不同的跟踪。这些模糊跟踪用于使代理进入各种潜在的未知状态，从中将代理的平均性能与模糊跟踪的平均性能进行比较。我们将基于搜索的测试方法应用于任天堂的超级马里奥兄弟的强化学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于搜索的测试框架，用于评估深度强化学习代理的安全性和性能。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习的评估因策略不透明性和环境随机性而困难，传统方法难以有效测试安全性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过搜索算法生成参考轨迹及边界状态进行安全测试，利用模糊测试生成多样化轨迹评估性能。
AI.result: 在超级马里奥兄弟的RL应用中，该方法发现了代理在临界状态下的安全问题并量化了性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 基于搜索的测试框架能有效识别深度RL代理的安全隐患和性能缺陷，优于传统测试方法。

title: Adaptive Graph Convolutional Network Framework for Multidimensional Time Series Prediction
title_zh: 用于多维时间序列预测的自适应图卷积网络框架
comment: 5 pages,2 figures
comments: 5 pages,2 figures
abstract: In the real world, long sequence time-series forecasting (LSTF) is needed in many cases, such as power consumption prediction and air quality prediction.Multi-dimensional long time series model has more strict requirements on the model, which not only needs to effectively capture the accurate long-term dependence between input and output, but also needs to capture the relationship between data of different dimensions.Recent research shows that the Informer model based on Transformer has achieved excellent performance in long time series prediction.However, this model still has some deficiencies in multidimensional prediction,it cannot capture the relationship between different dimensions well. We improved Informer to address its shortcomings in multidimensional forecasting. First,we introduce an adaptive graph neural network to capture hidden dimension dependencies in mostly time series prediction. Secondly,we integrate adaptive graph convolutional networks into various spatio-temporal series prediction models to solve the defect that they cannot capture the relationship between different dimensions. Thirdly,After experimental testing with multiple data sets, the accuracy of our framework improved by about 10\% after being introduced into the model.
summary: In the real world, long sequence time-series forecasting (LSTF) is needed in many cases, such as power consumption prediction and air quality prediction.Multi-dimensional long time series model has more strict requirements on the model, which not only needs to effectively capture the accurate long-term dependence between input and output, but also needs to capture the relationship between data of different dimensions.Recent research shows that the Informer model based on Transformer has achieved excellent performance in long time series prediction.However, this model still has some deficiencies in multidimensional prediction,it cannot capture the relationship between different dimensions well. We improved Informer to address its shortcomings in multidimensional forecasting. First,we introduce an adaptive graph neural network to capture hidden dimension dependencies in mostly time series prediction. Secondly,we integrate adaptive graph convolutional networks into various spatio-temporal series prediction models to solve the defect that they cannot capture the relationship between different dimensions. Thirdly,After experimental testing with multiple data sets, the accuracy of our framework improved by about 10\% after being introduced into the model.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中，很多情况下都需要长序列时间序列预测（LSTF），例如用电量预测、空气质量预测等。多维长序列模型对模型的要求更加严格，不仅需要有效捕捉输入和输出之间准确的长期依赖关系，还需要捕捉不同维度数据之间的关系。最近的研究表明，基于Transformer的Informer模型在长序列预测方面取得了优异的性能。但是，该模型在长序列预测方面仍然存在一些不足。多维预测，不能很好地捕捉不同维度之间的关系。我们改进了 Informer，以解决其在多维预测方面的缺陷。首先，我们引入自适应图神经网络来捕获大多数时间序列预测中的隐藏维度依赖性。其次，我们将自适应图卷积网络集成到各种时空序列预测模型中，以解决它们无法捕获不同维度之间关系的缺陷。第三，经过多个数据集的实验测试，我们的框架引入模型后准确率提高了约10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应图卷积网络框架，用于改进多维时间序列预测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型（如Informer）在多维时间序列预测中难以有效捕捉不同维度间的关系，限制了预测准确性。
AI.method: 引入自适应图神经网络捕获时间序列中的隐藏维度依赖关系，并将其集成到多种时空序列预测模型中。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验验证后，该框架使模型预测精度提升约10%。
AI.conclusion: 自适应图卷积网络能有效增强多维时间序列预测模型对跨维度关系的建模能力。

title: Identical Image Retrieval using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行相同图像检索
abstract: In recent years, we know that the interaction with images has increased. Image similarity involves fetching similar-looking images abiding by a given reference image. The target is to find out whether the image searched as a query can result in similar pictures. We are using the BigTransfer Model, which is a state-of-art model itself. BigTransfer(BiT) is essentially a ResNet but pre-trained on a larger dataset like ImageNet and ImageNet-21k with additional modifications. Using the fine-tuned pre-trained Convolution Neural Network Model, we extract the key features and train on the K-Nearest Neighbor model to obtain the nearest neighbor. The application of our model is to find similar images, which are hard to achieve through text queries within a low inference time. We analyse the benchmark of our model based on this application.
summary: In recent years, we know that the interaction with images has increased. Image similarity involves fetching similar-looking images abiding by a given reference image. The target is to find out whether the image searched as a query can result in similar pictures. We are using the BigTransfer Model, which is a state-of-art model itself. BigTransfer(BiT) is essentially a ResNet but pre-trained on a larger dataset like ImageNet and ImageNet-21k with additional modifications. Using the fine-tuned pre-trained Convolution Neural Network Model, we extract the key features and train on the K-Nearest Neighbor model to obtain the nearest neighbor. The application of our model is to find similar images, which are hard to achieve through text queries within a low inference time. We analyse the benchmark of our model based on this application.
abstract_zh: 近年来，我们知道与图像的交互有所增加。图像相似性涉及获取遵守给定参考图像的相似图像。目标是找出作为查询搜索的图像是否可以得到相似的图片。我们正在使用 BigTransfer 模型，它本身就是一个最先进的模型。 BigTransfer(BiT) 本质上是一个 ResNet，但在 ImageNet 和 ImageNet-21k 等更大的数据集上进行了预训练，并进行了额外的修改。使用经过微调的预训练卷积神经网络模型，我们提取关键特征并在 K 最近邻模型上进行训练以获得最近邻。我们的模型的应用是找到相似的图像，这很难在较短的推理时间内通过文本查询来实现。我们基于此应用程序分析了我们模型的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的图像检索方法，利用BigTransfer模型提取图像特征并结合K近邻算法实现快速相似图像检索。
AI.motivation: 随着图像交互需求增长，传统文本查询难以精准获取相似图像，需开发高效视觉检索方法满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 采用BigTransfer模型（改进型ResNet）进行图像特征提取，通过微调预训练CNN模型获取关键特征，并训练K近邻算法实现相似图像匹配。
AI.result: 在基准测试中验证了该方法在低推断时间下的有效性，能够准确检索出与查询图像相似的图片。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的图像检索方法在效率和准确性上表现优异，为视觉搜索应用提供了可行解决方案，未来可进一步优化模型轻量化与扩展应用场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的图像检索方法，利用BigTransfer模型提取图像特征并结合K近邻算法实现快速相似图像检索。

search_text: Identical Image Retrieval using Deep Learning 使用深度学习进行相同图像检索 In recent years, we know that the interaction with images has increased. Image similarity involves fetching similar-looking images abiding by a given reference image. The target is to find out whether the image searched as a query can result in similar pictures. We are using the BigTransfer Model, which is a state-of-art model itself. BigTransfer(BiT) is essentially a ResNet but pre-trained on a larger dataset like ImageNet and ImageNet-21k with additional modifications. Using the fine-tuned pre-trained Convolution Neural Network Model, we extract the key features and train on the K-Nearest Neighbor model to obtain the nearest neighbor. The application of our model is to find similar images, which are hard to achieve through text queries within a low inference time. We analyse the benchmark of our model based on this application. 近年来，我们知道与图像的交互有所增加。图像相似性涉及获取遵守给定参考图像的相似图像。目标是找出作为查询搜索的图像是否可以得到相似的图片。我们正在使用 BigTransfer 模型，它本身就是一个最先进的模型。 BigTransfer(BiT) 本质上是一个 ResNet，但在 ImageNet 和 ImageNet-21k 等更大的数据集上进行了预训练，并进行了额外的修改。使用经过微调的预训练卷积神经网络模型，我们提取关键特征并在 K 最近邻模型上进行训练以获得最近邻。我们的模型的应用是找到相似的图像，这很难在较短的推理时间内通过文本查询来实现。我们基于此应用程序分析了我们模型的基准。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的图像检索方法，利用BigTransfer模型提取图像特征并结合K近邻算法实现快速相似图像检索。 Sayan Nath,Nikhil Nayak cs.CV,cs.SE

title: Strong Equivalence of Logic Programs with Ordered Disjunction: a Logical Perspective
title_zh: 逻辑程序与有序析取的强等价性：逻辑视角
comment: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 15 pages + 3 pages appendix
comments: Paper presented at the 38th International Conference on Logic Programming (ICLP 2022), 15 pages + 3 pages appendix
abstract: Logic Programs with Ordered Disjunction (LPODs) extend classical logic programs with the capability of expressing preferential disjunctions in the heads of program rules. The initial semantics of LPODs, although simple and quite intuitive, is not purely model-theoretic. A consequence of this is that certain properties of programs appear non-trivial to formalize in purely logical terms. An example of this state of affairs is the characterization of the notion of strong equivalence for LPODs. Although the results of Faber et al. (2008) are accurately developed, they fall short of characterizing strong equivalence of LPODs as logical equivalence in some specific logic. This comes in sharp contrast with the well-known characterization of strong equivalence for classical logic programs, which, as proved by Lifschitz et al. (2001), coincides with logical equivalence in the logic of here-and-there. In this paper we obtain a purely logical characterization of strong equivalence of LPODs as logical equivalence in a four-valued logic. Moreover, we provide a new proof of the coNP-completeness of strong equivalence for LPODs, which has an interest in its own right since it relies on the special structure of such programs. Our results are based on the recent logical semantics of LPODs introduced by Charalambidis et al. (2021), a fact which we believe indicates that this new semantics may prove to be a useful tool in the further study of LPODs.

abstract_zh: 具有有序析取的逻辑程序 (LPOD) 扩展了经典逻辑程序，具有在程序规则头部表达优先析取的能力。 LPOD 的初始语义虽然简单且非常直观，但并不是纯粹的模型理论。这样做的结果是，程序的某些属性对于用纯逻辑术语形式化来说似乎并不平凡。这种情况的一个例子是 LPOD 强等价概念的表征。尽管 Faber 等人的结果。 （2008）虽然得到了准确的发展，但他们未能将 LPOD 的强等价性描述为某些特定逻辑中的逻辑等价性。这与众所周知的经典逻辑程序的强等价性特征形成鲜明对比，Lifschitz 等人证明了这一点。 (2001)，与此处和那里的逻辑中的逻辑等价性相一致。在本文中，我们获得了 LPOD 强等价性的纯逻辑表征作为四值逻辑中的逻辑等价性。此外，我们还提供了 LPOD 强等价性的 coNP 完整性的新证明，该证明本身就很有趣，因为它依赖于此类程序的特殊结构。我们的结果基于 Charalambidis 等人引入的 LPOD 的最新逻辑语义。 （2021），我们相信这一事实表明这种新语义可能被证明是进一步研究 LPOD 的有用工具。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为带有序列不相容的逻辑程序（LPODs）的强等价性提供一个纯粹的逻辑刻画，并证明其复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有LPODs语义非纯粹模型论，导致强等价性难以形式化，需寻找逻辑等价刻画以解决此问题。
AI.method: 基于Charalambidis等人（2021）提出的LPODs新逻辑语义，结合四值逻辑框架进行分析。
AI.result: 在四值逻辑中确立LPODs强等价性的逻辑等价刻画，并提供其coNP完全性的新证明。
AI.conclusion: 新逻辑语义为LPODs的进一步研究提供了有效工具，并深化了其理论基础。

authors_text: Asel Sagingalieva,Mo Kordzanganeh,Andrii Kurkin,Artem Melnikov,Daniil Kuhmistrov,Michael Perelshtein,Alexey Melnikov,Andrea Skolik,David Von Dollen
title: Hybrid quantum ResNet for car classification and its hyperparameter optimization
title_zh: 用于汽车分类的混合量子 ResNet 及其超参数优化
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures
comments: 16 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Image recognition is one of the primary applications of machine learning algorithms. Nevertheless, machine learning models used in modern image recognition systems consist of millions of parameters that usually require significant computational time to be adjusted. Moreover, adjustment of model hyperparameters leads to additional overhead. Because of this, new developments in machine learning models and hyperparameter optimization techniques are required. This paper presents a quantum-inspired hyperparameter optimization technique and a hybrid quantum-classical machine learning model for supervised learning. We benchmark our hyperparameter optimization method over standard black-box objective functions and observe performance improvements in the form of reduced expected run times and fitness in response to the growth in the size of the search space. We test our approaches in a car image classification task and demonstrate a full-scale implementation of the hybrid quantum ResNet model with the tensor train hyperparameter optimization. Our tests show a qualitative and quantitative advantage over the corresponding standard classical tabular grid search approach used with a deep neural network ResNet34. A classification accuracy of 0.97 was obtained by the hybrid model after 18 iterations, whereas the classical model achieved an accuracy of 0.92 after 75 iterations.
summary: Image recognition is one of the primary applications of machine learning algorithms. Nevertheless, machine learning models used in modern image recognition systems consist of millions of parameters that usually require significant computational time to be adjusted. Moreover, adjustment of model hyperparameters leads to additional overhead. Because of this, new developments in machine learning models and hyperparameter optimization techniques are required. This paper presents a quantum-inspired hyperparameter optimization technique and a hybrid quantum-classical machine learning model for supervised learning. We benchmark our hyperparameter optimization method over standard black-box objective functions and observe performance improvements in the form of reduced expected run times and fitness in response to the growth in the size of the search space. We test our approaches in a car image classification task and demonstrate a full-scale implementation of the hybrid quantum ResNet model with the tensor train hyperparameter optimization. Our tests show a qualitative and quantitative advantage over the corresponding standard classical tabular grid search approach used with a deep neural network ResNet34. A classification accuracy of 0.97 was obtained by the hybrid model after 18 iterations, whereas the classical model achieved an accuracy of 0.92 after 75 iterations.
abstract_zh: 图像识别是机器学习算法的主要应用之一。然而，现代图像识别系统中使用的机器学习模型由数百万个参数组成，通常需要大量的计算时间进行调整。此外，模型超参数的调整会带来额外的开销。因此，需要机器学习模型和超参数优化技术的新发展。本文提出了一种受量子启发的超参数优化技术和一种用于监督学习的混合量子经典机器学习模型。我们通过标准黑盒目标函数对超参数优化方法进行基准测试，并观察到性能改进，其形式是减少预期运行时间和适应搜索空间大小的增长。我们在汽车图像分类任务中测试了我们的方法，并演示了具有张量训练超参数优化的混合量子 ResNet 模型的全面实现。我们的测试表明，与深度神经网络 ResNet34 所使用的相应标准经典表格网格搜索方法相比，具有定性和定量优势。混合模型经过 18 次迭代后获得了 0.97 的分类准确率，而经典模型经过 75 次迭代后获得了 0.92 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合量子-经典机器学习模型（量子启发式ResNet）及超参数优化技术，用于汽车图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型参数量大、超参数调优耗时长，亟需更高效的优化方法和计算框架。
AI.method: 结合量子启发式超参数优化算法与量子-经典混合ResNet架构，采用张量训练（Tensor Train）技术实现参数优化。
AI.result: 混合模型在18次迭代中达到0.97分类准确率，显著优于经典ResNet34模型的0.92准确率（需75次迭代）。
AI.conclusion: 量子-经典混合框架在图像分类任务中展现出更高的效率与精度，为未来量子机器学习应用提供了可行方案。

We test our approaches in a car image classification task and demonstrate a full-scale implementation of the hybrid quantum ResNet model with the tensor train hyperparameter optimization. Our tests show a qualitative and quantitative advantage over the corresponding standard classical tabular grid search approach used with a deep neural network ResNet34. A classification accuracy of 0.97 was obtained by the hybrid model after 18 iterations, whereas the classical model achieved an accuracy of 0.92 after 75 iterations. 图像识别是机器学习算法的主要应用之一。然而，现代图像识别系统中使用的机器学习模型由数百万个参数组成，通常需要大量的计算时间进行调整。此外，模型超参数的调整会带来额外的开销。因此，需要机器学习模型和超参数优化技术的新发展。本文提出了一种受量子启发的超参数优化技术和一种用于监督学习的混合量子经典机器学习模型。我们通过标准黑盒目标函数对超参数优化方法进行基准测试，并观察到性能改进，其形式是减少预期运行时间和适应搜索空间大小的增长。我们在汽车图像分类任务中测试了我们的方法，并演示了具有张量训练超参数优化的混合量子 ResNet 模型的全面实现。我们的测试表明，与深度神经网络 ResNet34 所使用的相应标准经典表格网格搜索方法相比，具有定性和定量优势。混合模型经过 18 次迭代后获得了 0.97 的分类准确率，而经典模型经过 75 次迭代后获得了 0.92 的准确率。 本文提出了一种混合量子-经典机器学习模型（量子启发式ResNet）及超参数优化技术，用于汽车图像分类任务。 Asel Sagingalieva,Mo Kordzanganeh,Andrii Kurkin,Artem Melnikov,Daniil Kuhmistrov,Michael Perelshtein,Alexey Melnikov,Andrea Skolik,David Von Dollen quant-ph,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Terrence Chan,Carla Arus Gomez,Anish Kothikar,Pedro Baiz
title: Joint Study of Above Ground Biomass and Soil Organic Carbon for Total Carbon Estimation using Satellite Imagery in Scotland
title_zh: 苏格兰地上生物量和土壤有机碳联合研究，利用卫星图像估算总碳
abstract: Land Carbon verification has long been a challenge in the carbon credit market. Carbon verification methods currently available are expensive, and may generate low-quality credit. Scalable and accurate remote sensing techniques enable new approaches to monitor changes in Above Ground Biomass (AGB) and Soil Organic Carbon (SOC). The majority of state-of-the-art research employs remote sensing on AGB and SOC separately, although some studies indicate a positive correlation between the two. We intend to combine the two domains in our research to improve state-of-the-art total carbon estimation and to provide insight into the voluntary carbon trading market. We begin by establishing baseline model in our study area in Scotland, using state-of-the-art methodologies in the SOC and AGB domains. The effects of feature engineering techniques such as variance inflation factor and feature selection on machine learning models are then investigated. This is extended by combining predictor variables from the two domains. Finally, we leverage the possible correlation between AGB and SOC to establish a relationship between the two and propose novel models in an attempt outperform the state-of-the-art results. We compared three machine learning techniques, boosted regression tree, random forest, and xgboost. These techniques have been demonstrated to be the most effective in both domains.
summary: Land Carbon verification has long been a challenge in the carbon credit market. Carbon verification methods currently available are expensive, and may generate low-quality credit. Scalable and accurate remote sensing techniques enable new approaches to monitor changes in Above Ground Biomass (AGB) and Soil Organic Carbon (SOC). The majority of state-of-the-art research employs remote sensing on AGB and SOC separately, although some studies indicate a positive correlation between the two. We intend to combine the two domains in our research to improve state-of-the-art total carbon estimation and to provide insight into the voluntary carbon trading market. We begin by establishing baseline model in our study area in Scotland, using state-of-the-art methodologies in the SOC and AGB domains. The effects of feature engineering techniques such as variance inflation factor and feature selection on machine learning models are then investigated. This is extended by combining predictor variables from the two domains. Finally, we leverage the possible correlation between AGB and SOC to establish a relationship between the two and propose novel models in an attempt outperform the state-of-the-art results. We compared three machine learning techniques, boosted regression tree, random forest, and xgboost. These techniques have been demonstrated to be the most effective in both domains.
abstract_zh: 土地碳核查长期以来一直是碳信用市场的一个挑战。目前可用的碳核查方法价格昂贵，并且可能产生低质量的信用。可扩展且准确的遥感技术使监测地上生物量（AGB）和土壤有机碳（SOC）变化的新方法成为可能。大多数最先进的研究分别对 AGB 和 SOC 进行遥感，尽管一些研究表明两者之间存在正相关。我们打算在我们的研究中结合这两个领域，以改进最先进的总碳估算，并提供对自愿碳交易市场的洞察。我们首先使用 SOC 和 AGB 领域最先进的方法在苏格兰的研究区域建立基线模型。然后研究特征工程技术（例如方差膨胀因子和特征选择）对机器学习模型的影响。这是通过组合来自两个域的预测变量来扩展的。最后，我们利用 AGB 和 SOC 之间可能的相关性来建立两者之间的关系，并提出新颖的模型，试图超越最先进的结果。我们比较了三种机器学习技术：增强回归树、随机森林和 xgboost。这些技术已被证明在这两个领域都是最有效的。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过结合卫星遥感数据中的地上生物量（AGB）和土壤有机碳（SOC），改进总碳估算方法以支持碳信用市场。
AI.motivation: 现有碳验证方法成本高且精度不足，而AGB与SOC存在潜在关联，联合建模可能提升总碳估算的准确性与可扩展性。
AI.method: 基于苏格兰地区数据，采用提升回归树、随机森林和XGBoost三种机器学习模型，结合特征工程（如方差膨胀因子分析）及跨领域预测变量融合方法。
AI.result: 验证了AGB与SOC的关联性，提出新型联合模型，在三种机器学习方法中实现了优于单独建模的总碳估算效果。
AI.conclusion: 联合AGB与SOC的遥感分析可为自愿碳交易市场提供更精准、低成本的碳储量评估方案，具有重要的应用前景。

title: Safety-guaranteed trajectory planning and control based on GP estimation for unmanned surface vessels
title_zh: 基于GP估计的水面无人船安全轨迹规划与控制
abstract: We propose a safety-guaranteed planning and control framework for unmanned surface vessels (USVs), using Gaussian processes (GPs) to learn uncertainties. The uncertainties encountered by USVs, including external disturbances and model mismatches, are potentially state-dependent, time-varying, and hard to capture with constant models. GP is a powerful learning-based tool that can be integrated with a model-based planning and control framework, which employs a Hamilton-Jacobi differential game formulation. Such a combination yields less conservative trajectories and safety-guaranteeing control strategies. We demonstrate the proposed framework in simulations and experiments on a CLEARPATH Heron USV.
summary: We propose a safety-guaranteed planning and control framework for unmanned surface vessels (USVs), using Gaussian processes (GPs) to learn uncertainties. The uncertainties encountered by USVs, including external disturbances and model mismatches, are potentially state-dependent, time-varying, and hard to capture with constant models. GP is a powerful learning-based tool that can be integrated with a model-based planning and control framework, which employs a Hamilton-Jacobi differential game formulation. Such a combination yields less conservative trajectories and safety-guaranteeing control strategies. We demonstrate the proposed framework in simulations and experiments on a CLEARPATH Heron USV.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了无人水面舰艇（USV）的安全保障规划和控制框架，使用高斯过程（GP）来学习不确定性。 USV 遇到的不确定性，包括外部干扰和模型不匹配，可能是状态相关的、随时间变化的，并且很难用恒定模型来捕获。 GP 是一种强大的基于学习的工具，可以与基于模型的规划和控制框架集成，该框架采用 Hamilton-Jacobi 微分博弈公式。这种组合产生不太保守的轨迹和安全保证控制策略。我们在 CLEARPATH Heron USV 上的模拟和实验中演示了所提出的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯过程（GP）的无人水面船（USV）安全轨迹规划与控制框架，用于应对动态不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统模型难以捕捉USV面临的时变、状态依赖的外部干扰和模型不匹配问题，导致轨迹规划过于保守。
AI.method: 结合高斯过程学习不确定性与汉密尔顿-雅可比微分博弈方法，构建安全保证的轨迹规划与控制框架。
AI.result: 通过仿真与CLEARPATH Heron USV实验验证，框架能生成更优轨迹并确保安全。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了轨迹优化与安全性，为复杂环境下的USV控制提供了新思路。

title: Scaling-up Generalized Planning as Heuristic Search with Landmarks
title_zh: 将广义规划扩大为具有地标的启发式搜索
comment: Accepted at SoCS 2022 (extended version)
comments: Accepted at SoCS 2022 (extended version)
abstract: Landmarks are one of the most effective search heuristics for classical planning, but largely ignored in generalized planning. Generalized planning (GP) is usually addressed as a combinatorial search in a given space of algorithmic solutions, where candidate solutions are evaluated w.r.t.~the instances they solve. This type of solution evaluation ignores any sub-goal information that is not explicit in the representation of the planning instances, causing plateaus in the space of candidate generalized plans. Furthermore, node expansion in GP is a run-time bottleneck since it requires evaluating every child node over the entire batch of classical planning instances in a GP problem. In this paper we define a landmark counting heuristic for GP (that considers sub-goal information that is not explicitly represented in the planning instances), and a novel heuristic search algorithm for GP (that we call PGP) and that progressively processes subsets of the planning instances of a GP problem. Our two orthogonal contributions are analyzed in an ablation study, showing that both improve the state-of-the-art in GP as heuristic search, and that both benefit from each other when used in combination.
summary: Landmarks are one of the most effective search heuristics for classical planning, but largely ignored in generalized planning. Generalized planning (GP) is usually addressed as a combinatorial search in a given space of algorithmic solutions, where candidate solutions are evaluated w.r.t.~the instances they solve. This type of solution evaluation ignores any sub-goal information that is not explicit in the representation of the planning instances, causing plateaus in the space of candidate generalized plans. Furthermore, node expansion in GP is a run-time bottleneck since it requires evaluating every child node over the entire batch of classical planning instances in a GP problem. In this paper we define a landmark counting heuristic for GP (that considers sub-goal information that is not explicitly represented in the planning instances), and a novel heuristic search algorithm for GP (that we call PGP) and that progressively processes subsets of the planning instances of a GP problem. Our two orthogonal contributions are analyzed in an ablation study, showing that both improve the state-of-the-art in GP as heuristic search, and that both benefit from each other when used in combination.
abstract_zh: 地标是经典规划最有效的搜索启发法之一，但在广义规划中很大程度上被忽视。广义规划（GP）通常被视为给定算法解决方案空间中的组合搜索，其中候选解决方案根据它们解决的实例进行评估。这种类型的解决方案评估忽略了规划实例表示中不明确的任何子目标信息，导致候选广义计划空间出现停滞。此外，GP 中的节点扩展是一个运行时瓶颈，因为它需要评估 GP 问题中整批经典规划实例的每个子节点。在本文中，我们定义了 GP 的里程碑计数启发式算法（考虑规划实例中未明确表示的子目标信息），以及 GP 的新颖启发式搜索算法（我们称为 PGP），并逐步处理 GP 问题的规划实例的子集。我们的两个正交贡献在消融研究中进行了分析，表明两者都提高了 GP 作为启发式搜索的最先进水平，并且在组合使用时两者都受益匪浅。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将通用规划作为启发式搜索进行扩展，通过引入地标信息和新型算法PGP提升搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有通用规划方法在评估候选解时忽略隐含子目标信息，导致搜索效率低下且存在高原现象，节点扩展过程耗时严重。
AI.method: 定义地标计数启发式方法（考虑隐含子目标）及分步处理实例子集的PGP算法，通过消融研究验证效果。
AI.result: 两种方法均优于现有技术，组合使用时性能进一步提升，有效解决高原现象和计算瓶颈问题。
AI.conclusion: 地标启发式与PGP算法的结合为通用规划提供了更高效、更精准的搜索框架，推动该领域方法革新。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出将通用规划作为启发式搜索进行扩展，通过引入地标信息和新型算法PGP提升搜索效率。

search_text: Scaling-up Generalized Planning as Heuristic Search with Landmarks 将广义规划扩大为具有地标的启发式搜索 Landmarks are one of the most effective search heuristics for classical planning, but largely ignored in generalized planning. Generalized planning (GP) is usually addressed as a combinatorial search in a given space of algorithmic solutions, where candidate solutions are evaluated w.r.t.~the instances they solve. This type of solution evaluation ignores any sub-goal information that is not explicit in the representation of the planning instances, causing plateaus in the space of candidate generalized plans. Furthermore, node expansion in GP is a run-time bottleneck since it requires evaluating every child node over the entire batch of classical planning instances in a GP problem. In this paper we define a landmark counting heuristic for GP (that considers sub-goal information that is not explicitly represented in the planning instances), and a novel heuristic search algorithm for GP (that we call PGP) and that progressively processes subsets of the planning instances of a GP problem. Our two orthogonal contributions are analyzed in an ablation study, showing that both improve the state-of-the-art in GP as heuristic search, and that both benefit from each other when used in combination. 地标是经典规划最有效的搜索启发法之一，但在广义规划中很大程度上被忽视。广义规划（GP）通常被视为给定算法解决方案空间中的组合搜索，其中候选解决方案根据它们解决的实例进行评估。这种类型的解决方案评估忽略了规划实例表示中不明确的任何子目标信息，导致候选广义计划空间出现停滞。此外，GP 中的节点扩展是一个运行时瓶颈，因为它需要评估 GP 问题中整批经典规划实例的每个子节点。在本文中，我们定义了 GP 的里程碑计数启发式算法（考虑规划实例中未明确表示的子目标信息），以及 GP 的新颖启发式搜索算法（我们称为 PGP），并逐步处理 GP 问题的规划实例的子集。我们的两个正交贡献在消融研究中进行了分析，表明两者都提高了 GP 作为启发式搜索的最先进水平，并且在组合使用时两者都受益匪浅。 本文提出将通用规划作为启发式搜索进行扩展，通过引入地标信息和新型算法PGP提升搜索效率。 Javier Segovia-Aguas,Sergio Jiménez,Anders Jonsson,Laura Sebastiá cs.AI

title: Multi-Tree Guided Efficient Robot Motion Planning
title_zh: 多树引导高效机器人运动规划
abstract: Motion Planning is necessary for robots to complete different tasks. Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) and its variants have been widely used in robot motion planning due to their fast search in state space. However, they perform not well in many complex environments since the motion planning needs to simultaneously consider the geometry constraints and differential constraints. In this article, we propose a novel robot motion planning algorithm that utilizes multi-tree to guide the exploration and exploitation. The proposed algorithm maintains more than two trees to search the state space at first. Each tree will explore the local environment. The tree starts from the root will gradually collect information from other trees and grow towards the goal state. This simultaneous exploration and exploitation method can quickly find a feasible trajectory. We compare the proposed algorithm with other popular motion planning algorithms. The experiment results demonstrate that our algorithm achieves the best performance on different evaluation metrics.
summary: Motion Planning is necessary for robots to complete different tasks. Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) and its variants have been widely used in robot motion planning due to their fast search in state space. However, they perform not well in many complex environments since the motion planning needs to simultaneously consider the geometry constraints and differential constraints. In this article, we propose a novel robot motion planning algorithm that utilizes multi-tree to guide the exploration and exploitation. The proposed algorithm maintains more than two trees to search the state space at first. Each tree will explore the local environment. The tree starts from the root will gradually collect information from other trees and grow towards the goal state. This simultaneous exploration and exploitation method can quickly find a feasible trajectory. We compare the proposed algorithm with other popular motion planning algorithms. The experiment results demonstrate that our algorithm achieves the best performance on different evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 运动规划对于机器人完成不同的任务是必要的。快速探索随机树（RRT）及其变体由于其在状态空间中的快速搜索而被广泛用于机器人运动规划。然而，它们在许多复杂环境中表现不佳，因为运动规划需要同时考虑几何约束和微分约束。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的机器人运动规划算法，利用多树来指导探索和利用。该算法首先维护两棵以上的树来搜索状态空间。每棵树都会探索当地的环境。树从根开始会逐渐收集其他树的信息并向目标状态生长。这种同时勘探和开采的方法可以快速找到可行的轨迹。我们将所提出的算法与其他流行的运动规划算法进行比较。实验结果表明，我们的算法在不同的评估指标上均取得了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多树引导的高效机器人运动规划算法，以解决复杂环境下的路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RRT算法在处理几何约束和微分约束并存的复杂环境时表现不佳，需改进探索与利用策略以提升效率。
AI.method: 通过维护多个树结构同时探索状态空间，各树逐步共享信息并协同向目标状态生长，实现探索与利用的平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在不同评估指标上均优于其他主流运动规划算法，能快速找到可行轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 多树引导方法有效解决了复杂环境下的机器人运动规划问题，为高效路径搜索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhangfu Dong,Yuting He,Xiaoming Qi,Yang Chen,Huazhong Shu,Jean-Louis Coatrieux,Guanyu Yang,Shuo Li
title: MNet: Rethinking 2D/3D Networks for Anisotropic Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: MNet：重新思考各向异性医学图像分割的 2D/3D 网络
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2022
comments: Accepted by IJCAI 2022
abstract: The nature of thick-slice scanning causes severe inter-slice discontinuities of 3D medical images, and the vanilla 2D/3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) fail to represent sparse inter-slice information and dense intra-slice information in a balanced way, leading to severe underfitting to inter-slice features (for vanilla 2D CNNs) and overfitting to noise from long-range slices (for vanilla 3D CNNs). In this work, a novel mesh network (MNet) is proposed to balance the spatial representation inter axes via learning. 1) Our MNet latently fuses plenty of representation processes by embedding multi-dimensional convolutions deeply into basic modules, making the selections of representation processes flexible, thus balancing representation for sparse inter-slice information and dense intra-slice information adaptively. 2) Our MNet latently fuses multi-dimensional features inside each basic module, simultaneously taking the advantages of 2D (high segmentation accuracy of the easily recognized regions in 2D view) and 3D (high smoothness of 3D organ contour) representations, thus obtaining more accurate modeling for target regions. Comprehensive experiments are performed on four public datasets (CT\&MR), the results consistently demonstrate the proposed MNet outperforms the other methods. The code and datasets are available at: https://github.com/zfdong-code/MNet
summary: The nature of thick-slice scanning causes severe inter-slice discontinuities of 3D medical images, and the vanilla 2D/3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs) fail to represent sparse inter-slice information and dense intra-slice information in a balanced way, leading to severe underfitting to inter-slice features (for vanilla 2D CNNs) and overfitting to noise from long-range slices (for vanilla 3D CNNs). In this work, a novel mesh network (MNet) is proposed to balance the spatial representation inter axes via learning. 1) Our MNet latently fuses plenty of representation processes by embedding multi-dimensional convolutions deeply into basic modules, making the selections of representation processes flexible, thus balancing representation for sparse inter-slice information and dense intra-slice information adaptively. 2) Our MNet latently fuses multi-dimensional features inside each basic module, simultaneously taking the advantages of 2D (high segmentation accuracy of the easily recognized regions in 2D view) and 3D (high smoothness of 3D organ contour) representations, thus obtaining more accurate modeling for target regions. Comprehensive experiments are performed on four public datasets (CT\&MR), the results consistently demonstrate the proposed MNet outperforms the other methods. The code and datasets are available at: https://github.com/zfdong-code/MNet
abstract_zh: 厚切片扫描的性质导致3D医学图像严重的切片间不连续性，而普通的2D/3D卷积神经网络（CNN）无法以平衡的方式表示稀疏的切片间信息和密集的切片内信息，导致对切片间特征的严重欠拟合（对于普通2D CNN）和对来自远程切片的噪声（对于普通3D CNN）的过度拟合。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的网状网络（MNet）来通过学习来平衡轴间的空间表示。 1）我们的MNet通过将多维卷积深入嵌入到基本模块中，潜在地融合了大量的表示过程，使得表示过程的选择更加灵活，从而自适应地平衡稀疏片间信息和密集片内信息的表示。 2）我们的MNet在每个基本模块内部潜在地融合了多维特征，同时利用2D（2D视图中容易识别的区域的高分割精度）和3D（3D器官轮廓的高平滑度）表示的优点，从而获得对目标区域更准确的建模。在四个公共数据集（CT\&MR）上进行了综合实验，结果一致证明所提出的 MNet 优于其他方法。代码和数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/zfdong-code/MNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型网络MNet，用于解决医学图像分割中因厚层扫描导致的层间不连续性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统2D/3D卷积网络无法平衡医学图像的层间稀疏信息与层内密集信息，导致2D网络欠拟合层间特征，3D网络过拟合噪声。
AI.method: 通过深度嵌入多维卷积模块实现特征融合：1) 自适应平衡层间与层内表示；2) 融合2D高精度分割与3D轮廓平滑优势。
AI.result: 在四个公开CT/MR数据集实验中，MNet性能优于现有方法，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: MNet通过多维特征融合有效解决了医学图像各向异性分割难题，实现了更准确的靶区建模。

The code and datasets are available at: https://github.com/zfdong-code/MNet 厚切片扫描的性质导致3D医学图像严重的切片间不连续性，而普通的2D/3D卷积神经网络（CNN）无法以平衡的方式表示稀疏的切片间信息和密集的切片内信息，导致对切片间特征的严重欠拟合（对于普通2D CNN）和对来自远程切片的噪声（对于普通3D CNN）的过度拟合。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的网状网络（MNet）来通过学习来平衡轴间的空间表示。 1）我们的MNet通过将多维卷积深入嵌入到基本模块中，潜在地融合了大量的表示过程，使得表示过程的选择更加灵活，从而自适应地平衡稀疏片间信息和密集片内信息的表示。 2）我们的MNet在每个基本模块内部潜在地融合了多维特征，同时利用2D（2D视图中容易识别的区域的高分割精度）和3D（3D器官轮廓的高平滑度）表示的优点，从而获得对目标区域更准确的建模。在四个公共数据集（CT\&MR）上进行了综合实验，结果一致证明所提出的 MNet 优于其他方法。代码和数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/zfdong-code/MNet 本文提出一种新型网络MNet，用于解决医学图像分割中因厚层扫描导致的层间不连续性问题。 Zhangfu Dong,Yuting He,Xiaoming Qi,Yang Chen,Huazhong Shu,Jean-Louis Coatrieux,Guanyu Yang,Shuo Li eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Revisiting Walking-in-Place by Introducing Step-Height Control, Elastic Input, and Pseudo-Haptic Feedback
title_zh: 通过引入阶梯高度控制、弹性输入和伪触觉反馈重新审视原地行走
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE TVCG
comments: This paper has been accepted by IEEE TVCG
abstract: Walking-in-place (WIP) is a locomotion technique that enables users to "walk infinitely" through vast virtual environments using walking-like gestures within a limited physical space. This paper investigates alternative interaction schemes for WIP, addressing successively the control, input, and output of WIP. First, we introduce a novel height-based control to increase advanced speed. Second, we introduce a novel input system for WIP based on elastic and passive strips. Third, we introduce the use of pseudo-haptic feedback as a novel output for WIP meant to alter walking sensations. The results of a series of user studies show that height and frequency based control of WIP can facilitate higher virtual speed with greater efficacy and ease than in frequency-based WIP. Second, using an upward elastic input system can result in a stable virtual speed control, although excessively strong elastic forces may impact the usability and user experience. Finally, using a pseudo-haptic approach can improve the perceived realism of virtual slopes. Taken together, our results suggest that, for future VR applications, there is value in further research into the use of alternative interaction schemes for walking-in-place.

Second, using an upward elastic input system can result in a stable virtual speed control, although excessively strong elastic forces may impact the usability and user experience. Finally, using a pseudo-haptic approach can improve the perceived realism of virtual slopes. Taken together, our results suggest that, for future VR applications, there is value in further research into the use of alternative interaction schemes for walking-in-place.
abstract_zh: 原地行走 (WIP) 是一种移动技术，使用户能够在有限的物理空间内使用类似行走的手势在广阔的虚拟环境中“无限行走”。本文研究了 WIP 的替代交互方案，依次解决了 WIP 的控制、输入和输出问题。首先，我们引入一种新颖的基于高度的控制来提高先进速度。其次，我们介绍了一种基于弹性和被动条的新型 WIP 输入系统。第三，我们介绍了使用伪触觉反馈作为 WIP 的新颖输出，旨在改变步行感觉。一系列用户研究的结果表明，基于高度和频率的 WIP 控制可以促进更高的虚拟速度，并且比基于频率的 WIP 更高效、更轻松。其次，使用向上的弹性输入系统可以实现稳定的虚拟速度控制，尽管过大的弹力可能会影响可用性和用户体验。最后，使用伪触觉方法可以提高虚拟斜坡的感知真实感。总而言之，我们的结果表明，对于未来的 VR 应用，进一步研究使用替代交互方案进行原地行走是有价值的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究并改进原地行走（WIP）的交互方案，通过引入步高控制、弹性输入和伪触觉反馈来提升虚拟环境中的行走体验。
AI.motivation: 现有WIP方法在速度控制、输入稳定性和虚拟现实感方面存在不足，需探索新的交互方案以提升用户体验。
AI.method: 引入基于步高的速度控制、弹性被动条输入系统以及伪触觉反馈输出，分别优化WIP的控制、输入和输出环节。
AI.result: 实验显示，高度与频率控制提升虚拟速度效率；弹性输入系统实现稳定速度控制但过强弹性影响体验；伪触觉反馈增强虚拟坡度的真实感。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实改进的交互方案能有效提升WIP体验，建议未来VR应用进一步探索此类替代交互方法。

title: Assessing Streamline Plausibility Through Randomized Iterative Spherical-Deconvolution Informed Tractogram Filtering
title_zh: 通过随机迭代球形反卷积知情束图过滤评估流线的合理性
comment: 38 pages, 18 figures
comments: 38 pages, 18 figures
abstract: Tractography has become an indispensable part of brain connectivity studies. However, it is currently facing problems with reliability. In particular, a substantial amount of nerve fiber reconstructions (streamlines) in tractograms produced by state-of-the-art tractography methods are anatomically implausible. To address this problem, tractogram filtering methods have been developed to remove faulty connections in a postprocessing step. This study takes a closer look at one such method, \textit{Spherical-deconvolution Informed Filtering of Tractograms} (SIFT), which uses a global optimization approach to improve the agreement between the remaining streamlines after filtering and the underlying diffusion magnetic resonance imaging data. SIFT is not suitable to judge the plausibility of individual streamlines since its results depend on the size and composition of the surrounding tractogram. To tackle this problem, we propose applying SIFT to randomly selected tractogram subsets in order to retrieve multiple assessments for each streamline. This approach makes it possible to identify streamlines with very consistent filtering results, which were used as pseudo ground truths for training classifiers. The trained classifier is able to distinguish the obtained groups of plausible and implausible streamlines with accuracy above 80%. The software code used in the paper and pretrained weights of the classifier are distributed freely via the Github repository https://github.com/djoerch/randomised_filtering.
summary: Tractography has become an indispensable part of brain connectivity studies. However, it is currently facing problems with reliability. In particular, a substantial amount of nerve fiber reconstructions (streamlines) in tractograms produced by state-of-the-art tractography methods are anatomically implausible. To address this problem, tractogram filtering methods have been developed to remove faulty connections in a postprocessing step. This study takes a closer look at one such method, \textit{Spherical-deconvolution Informed Filtering of Tractograms} (SIFT), which uses a global optimization approach to improve the agreement between the remaining streamlines after filtering and the underlying diffusion magnetic resonance imaging data. SIFT is not suitable to judge the plausibility of individual streamlines since its results depend on the size and composition of the surrounding tractogram. To tackle this problem, we propose applying SIFT to randomly selected tractogram subsets in order to retrieve multiple assessments for each streamline. This approach makes it possible to identify streamlines with very consistent filtering results, which were used as pseudo ground truths for training classifiers. The trained classifier is able to distinguish the obtained groups of plausible and implausible streamlines with accuracy above 80%. The software code used in the paper and pretrained weights of the classifier are distributed freely via the Github repository https://github.com/djoerch/randomised_filtering.
abstract_zh: 纤维束成像已成为大脑连接研究中不可或缺的一部分。但目前它面临着可靠性问题。特别是，由最先进的纤维束成像方法产生的纤维束图中的大量神经纤维重建（流线）在解剖学上是不可信的。为了解决这个问题，开发了束图过滤方法来消除后处理步骤中的错误连接。这项研究仔细研究了这样一种方法，\textit{球状反卷积纤维图知情滤波} (SIFT)，它使用全局优化方法来提高滤波后剩余流线与底层扩散磁共振成像数据之间的一致性。 SIFT 不适合判断单个流线的合理性，因为它的结果取决于周围束图的大小和组成。为了解决这个问题，我们建议将 SIFT 应用于随机选择的纤维束图子集，以便为每个流线检索多个评估。这种方法可以识别具有非常一致的过滤结果的流线，这些流线被用作训练分类器的伪地面事实。经过训练的分类器能够区分获得的合理流线组和不合理流线组，准确率超过 80%。论文中使用的软件代码和分类器的预训练权重通过 Github 存储库 https://github.com/djoerch/randomized_filtering 免费分发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过随机迭代球面解卷积信息束图过滤方法评估神经纤维重建的合理性的技术。
AI.motivation: 现有束图过滤方法无法独立评估单个神经纤维的合理性，且结果依赖于整体束图的规模和组成，需改进个体流线的可靠性判断方法。
AI.method: 对随机选取的束图子集多次应用SIFT过滤，获取每条流线的多组过滤结果，利用一致性高的结果训练分类器区分合理与不合理流线。
AI.result: 训练的分类器准确率超过80%，可有效区分合理与不合理流线，相关代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过随机子集迭代评估和机器学习分类，显著提升了单个流线合理性的判断能力，为脑连接研究提供更可靠的工具。

title: Object Detection in Indian Food Platters using Transfer Learning with YOLOv4
title_zh: 使用 YOLOv4 迁移学习进行印度食品拼盘中的物体检测
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, 38th IEEE International Conference on Data Engineering, 2022, DECOR Workshop
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, 38th IEEE International Conference on Data Engineering, 2022, DECOR Workshop
abstract: Object detection is a well-known problem in computer vision. Despite this, its usage and pervasiveness in the traditional Indian food dishes has been limited. Particularly, recognizing Indian food dishes present in a single photo is challenging due to three reasons: 1. Lack of annotated Indian food datasets 2. Non-distinct boundaries between the dishes 3. High intra-class variation. We solve these issues by providing a comprehensively labelled Indian food dataset- IndianFood10, which contains 10 food classes that appear frequently in a staple Indian meal and using transfer learning with YOLOv4 object detector model. Our model is able to achieve an overall mAP score of 91.8% and f1-score of 0.90 for our 10 class dataset. We also provide an extension of our 10 class dataset- IndianFood20, which contains 10 more traditional Indian food classes.
summary: Object detection is a well-known problem in computer vision. Despite this, its usage and pervasiveness in the traditional Indian food dishes has been limited. Particularly, recognizing Indian food dishes present in a single photo is challenging due to three reasons: 1. Lack of annotated Indian food datasets 2. Non-distinct boundaries between the dishes 3. High intra-class variation. We solve these issues by providing a comprehensively labelled Indian food dataset- IndianFood10, which contains 10 food classes that appear frequently in a staple Indian meal and using transfer learning with YOLOv4 object detector model. Our model is able to achieve an overall mAP score of 91.8% and f1-score of 0.90 for our 10 class dataset. We also provide an extension of our 10 class dataset- IndianFood20, which contains 10 more traditional Indian food classes.
abstract_zh: 目标检测是计算机视觉中的一个众所周知的问题。尽管如此，它在传统印度菜肴中的使用和普及仍然受到限制。特别是，由于以下三个原因，识别单张照片中存在的印度美食具有挑战性：1.缺乏带注释的印度美食数据集2.菜肴之间的界限不明显3.类内差异较大。我们通过提供全面标记的印度食品数据集 - IndianFood10 来解决这些问题，其中包含印度主食中经常出现的 10 个食品类别，并使用 YOLOv4 对象检测器模型进行迁移学习。对于 10 类数据集，我们的模型能够实现 91.8% 的总体 mAP 分数和 0.90 的 f1 分数。我们还提供了 10 类数据集的扩展 - IndianFood20，其中包含 10 个以上的传统印度食品类别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用YOLOv4和迁移学习解决印度食物盘中目标检测的挑战，并构建了印度食物数据集IndianFood10和IndianFood20。
AI.motivation: 传统印度食物盘的目标检测因缺乏标注数据集、菜品边界不清晰及类内差异大而面临困难，需通过新数据集和改进模型解决这些问题。
AI.method: 创建包含10类常见印度食物的IndianFood10数据集，并扩展为20类的IndianFood20；采用YOLOv4模型结合迁移学习进行目标检测。
AI.result: 在10类数据集上达到91.8%的mAP和0.90的F1分数，同时提供了扩展至20类的数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了印度食物检测的挑战，高精度模型与新数据集为相关研究提供了重要资源。

title: Programming Data Structures for Large-Scale Desktop Simulations of Complex Systems
title_zh: 复杂系统大规模桌面仿真的数据结构编程
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, 1 table
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure, 1 table
abstract: The investigation of complex systems requires running large-scale simulations over many temporal iterations. It is therefore important to provide efficient implementations. The present study borrows philosophical concepts from Gilbert Simondon to identify data structures and algorithms that have the biggest impact on running time and memory usage. These are the entity $e$-tuple $\mathcal{E}$ and the intertwined update function $φ$. Focusing on implementing data structures in C#, $\mathcal{E}$ is implemented as a list of objects according to current software engineering practice and as an array of pointers according to theoretical considerations. Cellular automaton simulations with $10^9$ entities over one iteration reveal that the object-list with dynamic typing and multi-state readiness has a drastic effect on running time and memory usage, especially dynamic typing as it has a big impact on the evolution time. Pointer-arrays are possible to implement in C# and are more running time and memory efficient as compared to the object-list implementation, however, they are cumbersome to implement. In conclusion, avoiding dynamic typing in object-list based implementations or using pointer-arrays gives evolution times that are acceptable in practice, even on desktop computers.
summary: The investigation of complex systems requires running large-scale simulations over many temporal iterations. It is therefore important to provide efficient implementations. The present study borrows philosophical concepts from Gilbert Simondon to identify data structures and algorithms that have the biggest impact on running time and memory usage. These are the entity $e$-tuple $\mathcal{E}$ and the intertwined update function $φ$. Focusing on implementing data structures in C#, $\mathcal{E}$ is implemented as a list of objects according to current software engineering practice and as an array of pointers according to theoretical considerations. Cellular automaton simulations with $10^9$ entities over one iteration reveal that the object-list with dynamic typing and multi-state readiness has a drastic effect on running time and memory usage, especially dynamic typing as it has a big impact on the evolution time. Pointer-arrays are possible to implement in C# and are more running time and memory efficient as compared to the object-list implementation, however, they are cumbersome to implement. In conclusion, avoiding dynamic typing in object-list based implementations or using pointer-arrays gives evolution times that are acceptable in practice, even on desktop computers.
abstract_zh: 对复杂系统的研究需要在多次时间迭代中运行大规模模拟。因此，提供有效的实施非常重要。本研究借用 Gilbert Simondon 的哲学概念来识别对运行时间和内存使用影响最大的数据结构和算法。它们是实体 $e$-tuple $\mathcal{E}$ 和相互交织的更新函数 $φ$。 $\mathcal{E}$ 专注于在 C# 中实现数据结构，根据当前软件工程实践将 $\mathcal{E}$ 实现为对象列表，并根据理论考虑实现为指针数组。在一次迭代中使用 10^9$ 实体进行的元胞自动机模拟表明，具有动态类型和多状态就绪性的对象列表对运行时间和内存使用量有巨大影响，尤其是动态类型，因为它对演化时间有很大影响。指针数组可以在 C# 中实现，并且与对象列表实现相比，运行时间和内存效率更高，但是，它们实现起来很麻烦。总之，避免在基于对象列表的实现中使用动态类型或使用指针数组提供了实践中可接受的演化时间，即使在台式计算机上也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于大规模桌面模拟复杂系统的数据结构，重点分析了实体元组和交织更新函数对运行时间和内存使用的影响。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统的研究需要运行大规模的模拟，因此需要高效的实现方法，以减少运行时间和内存使用。
AI.method: 本文借鉴了Gilbert Simondon的哲学概念，识别了对运行时间和内存使用影响最大的数据结构和算法，包括实体e-元组和交织更新函数，并在C#中进行了实现和比较。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，基于对象列表的实现由于动态类型和多状态准备，对运行时间和内存使用有显著影响，而指针数组实现虽然效率更高，但实现起来较为繁琐。
AI.conclusion: 避免对象列表中的动态类型或使用指针数组可以实现可接受的演化时间，即使在桌面计算机上也能达到实际应用的需求。

authors_text: Yanni Kouskoulas,T. J. Machado,Daniel Genin,Aurora Schmidt,Ivan Papusha,Joshua Brulé
title: Envelopes and Waves: Safe Multivehicle Collision Avoidance for Horizontal Non-deterministic Turns
title_zh: 包络线和波浪：水平非确定性转弯的安全多车碰撞避免
comment: Coq proofs are at https://bitbucket.org/ykouskoulas/ottb-foundation-proofs; Accepted 08 Mar 2022 (International Journal on Software Tools for Technology Transfer)
comments: Coq proofs are at https://bitbucket.org/ykouskoulas/ottb-foundation-proofs; Accepted 08 Mar 2022 (International Journal on Software Tools for Technology Transfer)
abstract: We present an approach to analyzing the safety of asynchronous, independent, non-deterministic, turn-to-bearing horizontal maneuvers for two vehicles. Future turn rates, final bearings, and continuously varying ground speeds throughout the encounter are unknown but restricted to known ranges. We develop a library of formal proofs about turning kinematics, and apply the library to create a formally verified timing computation. Additionally, we create a technique that evaluates future collision possibilities that is based on waves of position possibilities and relies on the timing computation. The result either determines that the encounter will be collision-free, or computes a safe overapproximation for when and where collisions may occur.
summary: We present an approach to analyzing the safety of asynchronous, independent, non-deterministic, turn-to-bearing horizontal maneuvers for two vehicles. Future turn rates, final bearings, and continuously varying ground speeds throughout the encounter are unknown but restricted to known ranges. We develop a library of formal proofs about turning kinematics, and apply the library to create a formally verified timing computation. Additionally, we create a technique that evaluates future collision possibilities that is based on waves of position possibilities and relies on the timing computation. The result either determines that the encounter will be collision-free, or computes a safe overapproximation for when and where collisions may occur.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法来分析两辆车异步、独立、非确定性、转向方位水平操纵的安全性。未来的转弯速率、最终方位以及整个遭遇战中不断变化的地面速度都是未知的，但仅限于已知范围。我们开发了一个关于转动运动学的形式证明库，并应用该库来创建形式验证的计时计算。此外，我们创建了一种评估未来碰撞可能性的技术，该技术基于位置可能性波并依赖于定时计算。结果要么确定相遇将是无碰撞的，要么计算可能发生碰撞的时间和地点的安全过度近似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，用于分析两辆车辆在水平非确定性转向过程中的安全碰撞避免问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理异步、独立且非确定性转向带来的不确定性，需更可靠的安全验证技术。
AI.method: 构建转向运动学的形式化证明库，并结合基于位置可能性波的碰撞评估技术与时间计算。
AI.result: 确定遭遇是否无碰撞，或计算碰撞可能发生的时间与地点的安全过近似范围。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多车辆非确定性转向提供了形式化验证的安全保障，有效提升碰撞避免的可靠性。

method: 构建转向运动学的形式化证明库，并结合基于位置可能性波的碰撞评估技术与时间计算。
result: 确定遭遇是否无碰撞，或计算碰撞可能发生的时间与地点的安全过近似范围。
conclusion: 该方法为多车辆非确定性转向提供了形式化验证的安全保障，有效提升碰撞避免的可靠性。
search_text: Envelopes and Waves: Safe Multivehicle Collision Avoidance for Horizontal Non-deterministic Turns 包络线和波浪：水平非确定性转弯的安全多车碰撞避免 We present an approach to analyzing the safety of asynchronous, independent, non-deterministic, turn-to-bearing horizontal maneuvers for two vehicles. Future turn rates, final bearings, and continuously varying ground speeds throughout the encounter are unknown but restricted to known ranges. We develop a library of formal proofs about turning kinematics, and apply the library to create a formally verified timing computation. Additionally, we create a technique that evaluates future collision possibilities that is based on waves of position possibilities and relies on the timing computation. The result either determines that the encounter will be collision-free, or computes a safe overapproximation for when and where collisions may occur. 我们提出了一种方法来分析两辆车异步、独立、非确定性、转向方位水平操纵的安全性。未来的转弯速率、最终方位以及整个遭遇战中不断变化的地面速度都是未知的，但仅限于已知范围。我们开发了一个关于转动运动学的形式证明库，并应用该库来创建形式验证的计时计算。此外，我们创建了一种评估未来碰撞可能性的技术，该技术基于位置可能性波并依赖于定时计算。结果要么确定相遇将是无碰撞的，要么计算可能发生碰撞的时间和地点的安全过度近似。 本文提出一种方法，用于分析两辆车辆在水平非确定性转向过程中的安全碰撞避免问题。 Yanni Kouskoulas,T. J. Machado,Daniel Genin,Aurora Schmidt,Ivan Papusha,Joshua Brulé cs.LO,cs.RO,math.OC

title: An Engineer's Nightmare: 102 Years of Critical Robotics
title_zh: 工程师的噩梦：102 年的关键机器人技术
comment: Presented at the "Re-Configuring Human-Robot Interaction" workshop, HRI'22
comments: Presented at the "Re-Configuring Human-Robot Interaction" workshop, HRI'22
abstract: A critical and re-configured HRI might look to the arts, where another history of robots has been unfolding since the Czech artist Karel Capek's critical robotic labor parable of 1921, in which the word robot was coined in its modern usage. This paper explores several vectors by which artist-created robots, both physical and imaginary, have offered pronounced contrasts to robots-as-usual, and offers directions as to how these more emancipated cousins might be useful to the field of HRI.
summary: A critical and re-configured HRI might look to the arts, where another history of robots has been unfolding since the Czech artist Karel Capek's critical robotic labor parable of 1921, in which the word robot was coined in its modern usage. This paper explores several vectors by which artist-created robots, both physical and imaginary, have offered pronounced contrasts to robots-as-usual, and offers directions as to how these more emancipated cousins might be useful to the field of HRI.
abstract_zh: 批判性和重新配置的 HRI 可能会关注艺术，自捷克艺术家卡雷尔·恰佩克 (Karel Capek) 1921 年批判性的机器人劳动寓言以来，机器人的另一段历史已经展开，在寓言中，机器人这个词是在现代用法中创造的。本文探讨了艺术家创造的机器人（无论是物理的还是想象的）的几种载体，它们与通常的机器人形成了鲜明的对比，并就这些更加解放的表兄弟如何在人机交互领域发挥作用提供了方向。

AI.tldr: 探讨艺术家创作的机器人与传统机器人的对比，为HRI领域提供新的视角和方向
AI.motivation: 传统机器人研究侧重技术，而艺术领域提供批判性视角，有助于HRI的创新
AI.method: 通过分析艺术领域中的机器人案例，对比传统机器人，探讨其差异与潜在应用
AI.result: 发现艺术机器人与传统机器人的对比，为HRI提供新的研究方向和应用潜力
AI.conclusion: 艺术机器人提供批判性视角，推动HRI向更包容和多元的方向发展

title: Probabilistic and Non-Deterministic Event Data in Process Mining: Embedding Uncertainty in Process Analysis Techniques
title_zh: 流程挖掘中的概率性和非确定性事件数据：在流程分析技术中嵌入不确定性
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, 16 references. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.00334
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, 16 references. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.00334
abstract: Process mining is a subfield of process science that analyzes event data collected in databases called event logs. Recently, novel types of event data have become of interest due to the wide industrial application of process mining analyses. In this paper, we examine uncertain event data. Such data contain meta-attributes describing the amount of imprecision tied with attributes recorded in an event log. We provide examples of uncertain event data, present the state of the art in regard of uncertainty in process mining, and illustrate open challenges related to this research direction.
summary: Process mining is a subfield of process science that analyzes event data collected in databases called event logs. Recently, novel types of event data have become of interest due to the wide industrial application of process mining analyses. In this paper, we examine uncertain event data. Such data contain meta-attributes describing the amount of imprecision tied with attributes recorded in an event log. We provide examples of uncertain event data, present the state of the art in regard of uncertainty in process mining, and illustrate open challenges related to this research direction.
abstract_zh: 流程挖掘是流程科学的一个子领域，它分析在称为事件日志的数据库中收集的事件数据。最近，由于过程挖掘分析的广泛工业应用，新​​型事件数据引起了人们的兴趣。在本文中，我们研究不确定事件数据。此类数据包含元属性，描述与事件日志中记录的属性相关的不精确程度。我们提供了不确定事件数据的示例，介绍了流程挖掘中不确定性的最新技术，并说明了与该研究方向相关的开放挑战。

AI.tldr: 研究流程挖掘中的不确定事件数据，探讨如何在过程分析技术中嵌入不确定性。
AI.motivation: 随着工业应用中新型事件数据的出现，传统流程挖掘方法难以处理不确定性，需探索新的分析技术。
AI.method: 通过案例分析、文献综述和挑战识别，探讨不确定事件数据的处理方法。
AI.result: 展示了不确定事件数据在流程挖掘中的现状，并指出了相关研究方向的开放挑战。
AI.conclusion: 论文为处理流程挖掘中的不确定性提供了框架，并强调了未来研究需要解决的关键问题。

authors_text: Il Yong Chun,Dongwon Park,Xuehang Zheng,Se Young Chun,Yong Long
title: Self-supervised regression learning using domain knowledge: Applications to improving self-supervised denoising in imaging
title_zh: 使用领域知识的自监督回归学习：改善成像中自监督去噪的应用
comment: 17 pages, 16 figures, 2 tables, submitted to IEEE T-IP
comments: 17 pages, 16 figures, 2 tables, submitted to IEEE T-IP
abstract: Regression that predicts continuous quantity is a central part of applications using computational imaging and computer vision technologies. Yet, studying and understanding self-supervised learning for regression tasks - except for a particular regression task, image denoising - have lagged behind. This paper proposes a general self-supervised regression learning (SSRL) framework that enables learning regression neural networks with only input data (but without ground-truth target data), by using a designable pseudo-predictor that encapsulates domain knowledge of a specific application. The paper underlines the importance of using domain knowledge by showing that under different settings, the better pseudo-predictor can lead properties of SSRL closer to those of ordinary supervised learning. Numerical experiments for low-dose computational tomography denoising and camera image denoising demonstrate that proposed SSRL significantly improves the denoising quality over several existing self-supervised denoising methods.
summary: Regression that predicts continuous quantity is a central part of applications using computational imaging and computer vision technologies. Yet, studying and understanding self-supervised learning for regression tasks - except for a particular regression task, image denoising - have lagged behind. This paper proposes a general self-supervised regression learning (SSRL) framework that enables learning regression neural networks with only input data (but without ground-truth target data), by using a designable pseudo-predictor that encapsulates domain knowledge of a specific application. The paper underlines the importance of using domain knowledge by showing that under different settings, the better pseudo-predictor can lead properties of SSRL closer to those of ordinary supervised learning. Numerical experiments for low-dose computational tomography denoising and camera image denoising demonstrate that proposed SSRL significantly improves the denoising quality over several existing self-supervised denoising methods.
abstract_zh: 预测连续量的回归是使用计算成像和计算机视觉技术的应用的核心部分。然而，对回归任务的自监督学习的研究和理解——除了特定的回归任务，图像去噪——已经落后了。本文提出了一种通用的自监督回归学习（SSRL）框架，通过使用封装特定应用领域知识的可设计伪预测器，能够仅使用输入数据（但没有真实目标数据）来学习回归神经网络。该论文强调了使用领域知识的重要性，表明在不同的设置下，更好的伪预测器可以使 SSRL 的特性更接近普通监督学习的特性。低剂量计算断层扫描去噪和相机图像去噪的数值实验表明，与几种现有的自监督去噪方法相比，所提出的 SSRL 显着提高了去噪质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域知识的自监督回归学习框架，用于改进成像领域的自监督去噪方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习在回归任务（除图像去噪外）研究不足，缺乏有效利用领域知识提升模型性能的通用框架。
AI.method: 设计可定制的伪预测器封装领域知识，构建无需真实标签数据的自监督回归学习框架（SSRL）。
AI.result: 在低剂量CT和相机图像去噪任务中，SSRL方法显著优于现有自监督去噪技术。
AI.conclusion: 领域知识能有效提升自监督回归学习性能，所提框架在成像去噪任务中验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Shane Gilroy,Darragh Mullins,Edward Jones,Ashkan Parsi,Martin Glavin
title: The Impact of Partial Occlusion on Pedestrian Detectability
title_zh: 部分遮挡对行人可检测性的影响
comment: This research has been published under the title "Replacing the human driver: An objective benchmark for occluded pedestrian detection" in Biomimetic Intelligence and Robotics https://doi.org/10.1016/j.birob.2023.100115
comments: This research has been published under the title "Replacing the human driver: An objective benchmark for occluded pedestrian detection" in Biomimetic Intelligence and Robotics https://doi.org/10.1016/j.birob.2023.100115
abstract: Robust detection of vulnerable road users is a safety critical requirement for the deployment of autonomous vehicles in heterogeneous traffic. One of the most complex outstanding challenges is that of partial occlusion where a target object is only partially available to the sensor due to obstruction by another foreground object. A number of leading pedestrian detection benchmarks provide annotation for partial occlusion, however each benchmark varies greatly in their definition of the occurrence and severity of occlusion. Recent research demonstrates that a high degree of subjectivity is used to classify occlusion level in these cases and occlusion is typically categorized into 2 to 3 broad categories such as partially and heavily occluded. This can lead to inaccurate or inconsistent reporting of pedestrian detection model performance depending on which benchmark is used. This research introduces a novel, objective benchmark for partially occluded pedestrian detection to facilitate the objective characterization of pedestrian detection models. Characterization is carried out on seven popular pedestrian detection models for a range of occlusion levels from 0-99%, in order to demonstrate the efficacy and increased analysis capabilities of the proposed characterization method. Results demonstrate that pedestrian detection performance degrades, and the number of false negative detections increase as pedestrian occlusion level increases. Of the seven popular pedestrian detection routines characterized, CenterNet has the greatest overall performance, followed by SSDlite. RetinaNet has the lowest overall detection performance across the range of occlusion levels.

This can lead to inaccurate or inconsistent reporting of pedestrian detection model performance depending on which benchmark is used. This research introduces a novel, objective benchmark for partially occluded pedestrian detection to facilitate the objective characterization of pedestrian detection models. Characterization is carried out on seven popular pedestrian detection models for a range of occlusion levels from 0-99%, in order to demonstrate the efficacy and increased analysis capabilities of the proposed characterization method. Of the seven popular pedestrian detection routines characterized, CenterNet has the greatest overall performance, followed by SSDlite. RetinaNet has the lowest overall detection performance across the range of occlusion levels.
abstract_zh: 对弱势道路使用者的稳健检测是在异构交通中部署自动驾驶车辆的安全关键要求。最复杂的突出挑战之一是部分遮挡，其中由于另一个前景物体的遮挡，目标物体仅部分可供传感器使用。许多领先的行人检测基准提供了部分遮挡的注释，但是每个基准在遮挡发生和严重程度的定义方面差异很大。最近的研究表明，在这些情况下，使用高度主观性对遮挡级别进行分类，遮挡通常分为 2 至 3 个大类，例如部分遮挡和严重遮挡。这可能会导致行人检测模型性能报告不准确或不一致，具体取决于使用的基准。这项研究引入了一种新颖的、客观的部分遮挡行人检测基准，以促进行人检测模型的客观表征。在七种流行的行人检测模型上对 0-99% 的遮挡级别进行了表征，以证明所提出的表征方法的有效性和增强的分析能力。结果表明，行人检测性能会下降，并且随着行人遮挡程度的增加，误报检测的数量也会增加。在七个流行的行人检测例程中，CenterNet 的整体性能最高，其次是 SSDlite。 RetinaNet 在遮挡级别范围内的整体检测性能最低。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了部分遮挡对行人检测性能的影响，并提出了一种新的客观基准来评估检测模型。
AI.motivation: 由于部分遮挡是自动驾驶车辆在异构交通环境中检测行人时的一个主要挑战，而现有基准对遮挡的分类存在主观性和不一致性，因此需要一种新的客观基准来评估检测模型。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新的客观基准，对七种流行的行人检测模型在不同遮挡水平（0-99%）下的性能进行了评估。
AI.result: 结果表明，随着行人遮挡水平的增加，检测性能下降，误检率增加。在七种检测模型中，CenterNet表现最好，其次是SSDlite，RetinaNet表现最差。
AI.conclusion: 新的客观基准能够更准确地评估行人检测模型在部分遮挡情况下的性能，有助于改进自动驾驶系统的安全性。

search_text: The Impact of Partial Occlusion on Pedestrian Detectability 部分遮挡对行人可检测性的影响 Robust detection of vulnerable road users is a safety critical requirement for the deployment of autonomous vehicles in heterogeneous traffic. One of the most complex outstanding challenges is that of partial occlusion where a target object is only partially available to the sensor due to obstruction by another foreground object. A number of leading pedestrian detection benchmarks provide annotation for partial occlusion, however each benchmark varies greatly in their definition of the occurrence and severity of occlusion. Recent research demonstrates that a high degree of subjectivity is used to classify occlusion level in these cases and occlusion is typically categorized into 2 to 3 broad categories such as partially and heavily occluded. This can lead to inaccurate or inconsistent reporting of pedestrian detection model performance depending on which benchmark is used. This research introduces a novel, objective benchmark for partially occluded pedestrian detection to facilitate the objective characterization of pedestrian detection models. Characterization is carried out on seven popular pedestrian detection models for a range of occlusion levels from 0-99%, in order to demonstrate the efficacy and increased analysis capabilities of the proposed characterization method. Results demonstrate that pedestrian detection performance degrades, and the number of false negative detections increase as pedestrian occlusion level increases. Of the seven popular pedestrian detection routines characterized, CenterNet has the greatest overall performance, followed by SSDlite. RetinaNet has the lowest overall detection performance across the range of occlusion levels. 对弱势道路使用者的稳健检测是在异构交通中部署自动驾驶车辆的安全关键要求。最复杂的突出挑战之一是部分遮挡，其中由于另一个前景物体的遮挡，目标物体仅部分可供传感器使用。许多领先的行人检测基准提供了部分遮挡的注释，但是每个基准在遮挡发生和严重程度的定义方面差异很大。最近的研究表明，在这些情况下，使用高度主观性对遮挡级别进行分类，遮挡通常分为 2 至 3 个大类，例如部分遮挡和严重遮挡。这可能会导致行人检测模型性能报告不准确或不一致，具体取决于使用的基准。这项研究引入了一种新颖的、客观的部分遮挡行人检测基准，以促进行人检测模型的客观表征。在七种流行的行人检测模型上对 0-99% 的遮挡级别进行了表征，以证明所提出的表征方法的有效性和增强的分析能力。结果表明，行人检测性能会下降，并且随着行人遮挡程度的增加，误报检测的数量也会增加。在七个流行的行人检测例程中，CenterNet 的整体性能最高，其次是 SSDlite。 RetinaNet 在遮挡级别范围内的整体检测性能最低。 本文研究了部分遮挡对行人检测性能的影响，并提出了一种新的客观基准来评估检测模型。 Shane Gilroy,Darragh Mullins,Edward Jones,Ashkan Parsi,Martin Glavin cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Weisfeiler-Leman Invariant Promise Valued CSPs
title_zh: Weisfeiler-Leman 不变承诺有价值的 CSP
comment: In Proceedings of the 28th International Conference on Principles and Practice of Constraint Programming (CP2022)
comments: In Proceedings of the 28th International Conference on Principles and Practice of Constraint Programming (CP2022)
abstract: In a recent line of work, Butti and Dalmau have shown that a fixed-template Constraint Satisfaction Problem is solvable by a certain natural linear programming relaxation (equivalent to the basic linear programming relaxation) if and only if it is solvable on a certain distributed network, and this happens if and only if its set of Yes instances is closed under Weisfeiler-Leman equivalence. We generalize this result to the much broader framework of fixed-template Promise Valued Constraint Satisfaction Problems. Moreover, we show that two commonly used linear programming relaxations are no longer equivalent in this broader framework.
summary: In a recent line of work, Butti and Dalmau have shown that a fixed-template Constraint Satisfaction Problem is solvable by a certain natural linear programming relaxation (equivalent to the basic linear programming relaxation) if and only if it is solvable on a certain distributed network, and this happens if and only if its set of Yes instances is closed under Weisfeiler-Leman equivalence. We generalize this result to the much broader framework of fixed-template Promise Valued Constraint Satisfaction Problems. Moreover, we show that two commonly used linear programming relaxations are no longer equivalent in this broader framework.
abstract_zh: 在最近的工作中，Butti 和 Dalmau 表明，当且仅当固定模板约束满足问题在某个分布式网络上可解时，它才可以通过某种自然线性规划松弛（相当于基本线性规划松弛）来解决，并且当且仅当其 Yes 实例集在 Weisfeiler-Leman 等价下封闭时，才会发生这种情况。我们将这个结果推广到更广泛的固定模板承诺值约束满足问题框架。此外，我们表明，在这个更广泛的框架中，两种常用的线性规划松弛不再等效。

AI.tldr: 本文将Weisfeiler-Leman等价性与线性规划松弛的关系从约束满足问题（CSP）推广到承诺值约束满足问题（PVCSps），并揭示两种常见线性规划松弛方法在此框架下不再等价。
AI.motivation: 此前研究已证明CSP的线性规划松弛解与分布式网络求解及Weisfeiler-Leman等价性相关，但该结论是否适用于更广泛的承诺值约束问题（PVCSps）尚不明确，需进一步探索其理论边界。
AI.method: 通过理论分析推广Butti和Dalmau的结论，结合对两种线性规划松弛方法的比较，验证其在PVCSps框架下的等价性失效现象。
AI.result: 证明了PVCSps的Yes实例集在Weisfeiler-Leman等价性下闭合的条件，并发现两种常见线性规划松弛方法在该框架下不再等价。
AI.conclusion: Weisfeiler-Leman等价性可扩展至PVCSps，但传统线性规划松弛方法的等价性不成立，提示需开发新的求解策略以适应更复杂的约束问题。
